programme.title: Andromeda: Twilight of the Idols
programme.desc: Mannskapet søker en tapt koloni av Nietzscheans og oppdager et annet mannskap som i det skjulte har hjulpet dem.

programme.title: Mutant X: She's Come Undone
programme.desc: Mutant X-teamet oppdager at lagkameraten deres Lexa er gjenstand for et skjult eksperiment som kontrollerer henne, og hunter etter ansvarlig lege.

programme.title: Mutant X: In Between
programme.desc: Når Jesses liv henger i sving, må Brennan koble seg til ham og lede ham gjennom minner de har delt for å redde livet hans.

programme.title: Mutant X: Dream Lover
programme.desc: Mutant X må stoppe en forsker fra å klone kvinner for bruk som slaver i sin ultra-eksklusive herreklubb.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Faux Fox
programme.desc: Når Nigel blir sjarmert av den briljante studenten Lorraine å vise henne kontorene sine (og kyss), slår en innbruddstyv Sidney ut, men hva ble ranet?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Pandora's Box
programme.desc: Sidney arver fra den beste relikviejegeren fra forrige generasjon en nøkkel og skynder seg med Nigel på jakt etter den ene skatten han aldri fant: Pandoras boks.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Warlord
programme.desc: Bekkastan, 1401 e.Kr.: krigerprinsesse Kahina beviser sin rett til å herske. 2002: Sydney og Nigel avdekker et hulemaleri som kan føre dem til Kahinas sal. Men hennes etterkommere forårsaker komplikasjoner.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dommens dag, Vredens dag
programme.desc: Mannskapet installerer en ny AI i et nytt Commonwealth-slagskip, og naturlig nok går ikke ting som de skal.

programme.title: Andromeda: Skygger kastet av en siste hilsen
programme.desc: Tyr overbeviser Nietzscheans at han er reinkarnasjonen til Drago Museveni.
programme.sub-title: Skygger kastet av en siste hilsen

programme.title: Andromeda: Svar gitt på spørsmål som aldri er stilt
programme.desc: En melding fra en samler sender Dylan på et oppdrag for å redde et gissel og finne restene av Commonwealth-flåten.
programme.sub-title: Svar gitt på spørsmål som aldri er stilt

programme.title: Andromeda: Biter av åtte
programme.desc: Citizen Eight prøver å fjerne Dylan fra kommandoen over Andromeda.

programme.title: Mutant X: The Prophecy
programme.desc: Brennan kjemper med en Guardian of the Prophecy for å stoppe den avdøde mutanten Ashlockes plan utover verdensherredømmets grav.

programme.title: Mutant X: Cirque des Merveilles
programme.desc: Lexas mistanker får Mutant X til å avdekke en omreisende dødsleir, som blir presentert som et sirkus for mutante flyktninger og Mutant Xs fiende i Dominion.

programme.title: Mutant X: The Assault
programme.desc: Mange av mysteriene rundt Mutant X blir avslørt når Lexa og Jesse blir fanget av Dominion, og teamet, sammen med Adam, går inn for å redde dem.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: Mens Nigel øver sin hovedtale på et hotellrom i Sevilla, knekker en jente nesten nesen og krever noe - det viser seg at hun var ute etter vannet fra Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Arthur's Cross
programme.desc: Scotland Yard kaller Sidney og Nigel for å identifisere et drapsvåpen fra 500-tallet. Det viser seg å være gravkorset til King Arthur, men i tillegg til offeret leter flere andre etter det.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: So Shall It Be
programme.desc: Når Sidney og Nigel er i ferd med å gå inn på stedet for en Bristol-foredrag, nærmer en ung forfatter dem å følge opp et øyeblikkelig tips om et kart til de tapte nøklene til druidekulten i Stonehenge.

programme.title: Andromeda: Under natten
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt igjen strandet i nærheten av et svart hull, blir kaptein Dylan Hunt oppdaget av et leiesoldat bergingsskip og finner at han har vært frossen i tide i 300 år.

programme.title: Andromeda: En bekreftende flamme
programme.desc: Dylan beskytter Andromeda mot leiesoldater mens Beka begynner å lure på om de kjemper for feil side.

programme.title: Andromeda: Å miste den skjebnesvangre lynet
programme.desc: Dylan finner en romstasjon full av barn som tror at han er der for å bringe fred ved å drepe fiendene sine.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Special guest and comic book legend Stan Lee takes a seat at the chef's table, where he and his friends comment about the action in the kitchen as the service progresses.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining four chefs sample one of Ramsay's complex entrées and then must re-create it correctly and two of the chefs face elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The cooking competition reaches its climax, Gordon presides as the two remaining contestants choose a kitchen team made up of their former rivals. Who will best organise their former teammates and lead themselves to victory this year?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay splits the contestants into two teams along gender lines and asks them to present their signature dishes, with the winning team getting to spend an evening with William Shatner.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The men's team get a head start on the first challenge after some successful crab fishing, but can the women edge ahead when it comes to the cooking? Dinner service sees an infuriated Gordon throws an entire team out of the kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: This time, the chefs are given a rude awakening as they are tasked with entering an icy lake early in the morning to match up fish heads to their correct bodies. The winning team end up getting even wetter during surfing lessons.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: This time, the remaining teams are given an American comfort food challenge, with Gordon expecting them to come up with some outstanding spaghetti, burger, pizza and mac and cheese dishes. The challenge winners are taken aboard a ship for cocktails.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: This time, the teams compete to make the most impressive cheesy dishes in order to win an ocean adventure. Later, divisions between the strong and weak contestants grow during another star-studded dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: This time, the chefs compete in a special lunch service in honour of two charities run by Los Angeles firefighters, Nick surprises everyone when he bumps into an ex-girlfriend, and further tensions emerge during dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: This time, the chefs must prepare a Greek meal each choosing a protein as a basis for their dish. Meanwhile, Josh gives himself a motivational speech after being singled out for his lack of leadership.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Today, the chefs must create a dish using an alcohol - either beer, wine or a spirit. Judging the dishes along with Gordon are a couple of guest bartenders. Meanwhile, a slipped disc threatens Bret's progress.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Today, the chefs are faced with a selection of exotic protein foods and have to try to grab what they want to use for their dish, including alligator, wild boar and ostrich.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Today's challenge is to prepare a homecoming dinner for the Calabasas High School with the theme of Mardi Gras using seafood, chicken and beef.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The team that identifies the most foods in a blind taste test wins a shopping spree. During dinner service, the chefs present a five-course meal for two charitable organisations.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants must find keys for lockers containing various cuts of steak, then prepare a delicious dish in under 35 minutes. Dinner service sees the return of steak night.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay puts aspiring chefs through a series of gruelling challenges. Pairs of contestants battle it out in the 'Taste It and Make It' challenge, with the winning duo visiting the Queen Mary ocean liner.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The top five chefs prepare a unique and elegant small-plate dish in under 45 minutes for people attending a private symphony performance, for which the challenge winner earns a private helicopter tour of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs who prepare the best vegetarian dish win a parasailing experience and a slap-up meal. Emotions run high as the hopefuls receive a visit from their friends and family.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The 14th series of Gordon Ramsay's fiercely fought chef challenge concludes. The top two chefs visit previous winner Christina Wilson in Las Vegas for some motivation, before preparing five dishes to be judged by top chefs.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay puts 18 more hopeful chefs through their paces. Will they impress by putting together their signature dishes in just 45 minutes?
programme.sub-title: When the Wall Comes Tumbling Down

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Mens Jeremy utfører en grundig test av en Renaultsport Twingo 133, møter James damen som er ansvarlig for utformingen av britiske veiskilt.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Top Gear-gutta prøver å bevise at biler kan være mer populære enn tradisjonell kunst - ved å arrangere en motorutstilling i Middlesbrough.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Til tross for at produsentene krever at de holder seg innenfor budsjettet, utfører James den dyreste biltesten i Top Gears historie med en BMW X6.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: James kjører opp en aktiv vulkan på Island i en Toyota Hilux, og Richard gir Chevrolet Lacettien en verdig avskjed.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 2
programme.desc: Jeremy, Richard og James finner den beste bilen for å ta familien med på handletur med et budsjett på 5000 pund.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Gutta prøver å finne verdens beste fireseters superbil, og Harry Potter-stjernen Rupert Grint er ukens kjendis i billigbilen.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Top Gear-gutta bygger tøffe og interessante bobiler før de setter kursen mot Sørvest-England for en langhelg.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Tom Cruise og Cameron Diaz er ukens kjendiser i en billigbil, og James May forsøker å slå sin egen fartsrekord i en Bugatti Veyron.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 6
programme.desc: Gutta tar et vemodig tilbakeblikk på restene av Storbritannias sportsbilindustri, og Jeff Goldblum prøver seg i billigbilen.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Gutta tar en storslått kjøretur langs USAs østkyst i en Mercedes SLS, en Porsche 911 GT3 RS, og en Ferrari 458 Italia.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond og James May legger ut på en sesongbasert biltur mens de prøver å følge veien til de tre vise menn over Midtøsten.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 2
programme.desc: Teamets "Cool Wall" blir gjenstand for opphisset debatt i studio. Standup-komikeren John Bishop er ukens kjendis i en billigbil.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Jeremy, Richard og James møter sine australske Top Gear-motsatser, og det blir et hatoppgjør som nesten garantert vil ende i tårer.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 4
programme.desc: Gutta drar til Albania for å teste en Rolls-Royce Ghost, en Bentley Mulsanne og en Mercedes S65 AMG. Jonathan Ross er ukens stjerne i en billigbil.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 5
programme.desc: Lær mer om noen av de vanligste fallgruvene du må se opp for når du kjøper en bruktbil. Simon Pegg og Nick Frost er ukens stjerner i en billigbil.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 6
programme.desc: Teamet prøver å få orden på snøkaoset i Storbritannia med en skurtresker, grunnleggende ingeniørkunnskaper og en tur til Norge.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 606
programme.desc: Hypokondrieren Malcolm Rayner sliter med pusten og Martin spør ham om han noen gang har jobbet med asbest.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 607
programme.desc: Al får besøk av to militære politimenn som prøver å spore opp barnevakten James, Mike Pruddy.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 608
programme.desc: Louisa drar til Spania, Bert og Jennifer forlovelsesfest ender med et smell, og Al blir hyllet som en helt for å ha reddet Carolines liv.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 701
programme.desc: Martin vender tilbake til Portwenn, men uten Louisa som har dratt for å bo hos moren sin i Spania.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 702
programme.desc: Louisas retur reiser ytterligere spørsmål om forholdet deres, og kanskje de trenger å tilbringe mer tid fra hverandre.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 703
programme.desc: Etter en ny katastrofe på restauranten hans tar Bert drastiske grep og forsvinner, noe som fører til at Al kontakter P.C. Penhale, selv om han er mer interessert i å flørte med Louisas barnevakt Janice.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa og Martin har sin første terapiøkt sammen, og ingen av dem var forberedt på å få hjemmelekser.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 705
programme.desc: Louisa og Morwenna overtaler Martin til å finne et nytt hjem til Buddy. Martin er ikke spesielt imponert over Angelas alternative tilnærming til medisin.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 706
programme.desc: Louisa hjelper ekskjæresten Danny når han tar med seg syv barn fra London for å bo på Ruths gård - overvåket av Al og Bert - mens hun og Martin planlegger en date etter råd fra dr. Timoney.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 707
programme.desc: Louisa er ikke veldig fornøyd når hennes nye kunstlærer Erica vil teste noen ganske alternative ideer på barna, mens dr. Timoney blir involvert i en bilulykke utenfor skolen.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa og Martin bestemmer seg for å prøve seg på et forhold, og starter med en forsonende middag, men Louisa er bekymret når Martin ikke klarer å dukke opp.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 801
programme.desc: Forberedelsene til Janice og Penhales bryllup fortsetter, noe som gjør Portwenn gal og Louisa og Martin har flyttet sammen igjen.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 802
programme.desc: Martin og Louisa leter etter en barnehage for James og fru Tishell er sjokkert over å oppdage at Al har høyt blodtrykk. Louisa utforsker mulighetene for en ny karriere.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 803
programme.desc: Da Louisa er ute og seiler, må Martin passe på James. Al og Morwenna arrangerer et event for å redde puben.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 804
programme.desc: Louisas første Skype-samtale for hennes nye kurs går ikke som planlagt når Martin bestemmer seg for å fortelle læreren sine tanker om kurset.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 805
programme.desc: Med James i bitestadiet er Martin og Louisa desperate etter mer søvn. Fru Tishell stenger apoteket.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 806
programme.desc: Penhale bestemmer seg for at politiet skal ha åpent hus for å øke samfunnsbevisstheten, men oppmøtet er ikke det han håpet på.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 807
programme.desc: Al og Morwenna deltar i det årlige konsert-kappløpet mot en annen by. Louisa kjøper en ny bil, og Martins blodfobi forårsaker en katastrofe med en pasient.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Ansvarlig din
programme.desc: Mens han kjører en drosje i travle gater, får Billy øye på en kvinnelig sjåfør i nød. Han tilbyr å hjelpe, men er ingen bilmekaniker.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Brent
programme.desc: Jake kommer hjem igjen og stopper for å prate med Sandy på gårdsplassen. Men når Billy drar, støter han på en kvinne kalt Stella som leter etter Jake.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Et brutt løfte
programme.desc: Hele gruppen samles i Jane og Michaels leilighet for å se hjemmevideoer fra da Jane var en nyfødt.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Urene affærer
programme.desc: Alisons leder, Lucy, inviterer henne på en bildeøkt i lunsjpausen og spør der om hun ville være interessert i frilansforskning.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Drømmer går i oppfyllelse
programme.desc: Når Alison tilbringer nok en natt med Keith i strandhuset hans, konfronterer Billy henne med det at Keith er gift.

programme.title: Melrose Place: En grense trekkes
programme.desc: Keiths kone dukker opp, og selv om han forsikrer Alison at han skal be om en skilsmisse, bestemmer Alison seg for å slå opp med ham.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Guds hus
programme.desc: En mystisk fotograf fra New York City flytter inn i Rhondas leilighet og blir venner med Alison, som fremdeles har hjertesorg etter Keith.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Hele sannheten
programme.desc: Jake tilbyr å hjelpe Jo som sliter økonomisk, men hun avslår og begynner å oppføre seg rart når han stiller for mange spørsmål.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Jake mot Jake
programme.desc: En ekskjæreste forteller Jake at hennes fire år gamle sønn kan være hans, men hun vil at Jake skal la hennes ektemann adoptere ham.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Jul i Melrose Place
programme.desc: Billy blir overbeskyttende etter Alisons operasjon. Når Jake prøver å ha samleie med Jo, sier hun at hun trenger tid til å tenke.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Enslig, hvit kvinne
programme.desc: Når Janes ville og utadvendte lillesøster, Sydney, kommer på besøk uanmeldt, går hun med en gang på Janes nerver.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Peanøttsmør og sjalusi
programme.desc: Jos eksmann, Charles, ankommer og prøver å overbevise henne om at han har sluttet å drikke. Jake sliter med å holde seg unna mens Charles er der.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Et uperfekt bilde
programme.desc: Når Alison forfremmes fra resepsjonist til kundeansvarlig, ansetter hun Jo for å ta bilder for et undertøysfirma.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Tre er for mange
programme.desc: Amanda inviterer Alison og Billy til hennes fars hus ved innsjøen i helgen, hvor hun og Billy straks føler en tiltrekning.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Min nye partner
programme.desc: Alison er fortsatt sjalu fordi Billy er sammen med Amanda, men så dukker hennes gamle flamme Keith opp. Han er nå skilt og vil skvære opp.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Ha det Billy
programme.desc: Alison søker støtte fra Keith etter at hun blir truet med våpen og frastjålet bilen hans. Amanda introduserer Billy til hennes far.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Uforenlige likheter
programme.desc: Billy og Amandas samliv trues av krangler som følge av deres ulike smaker: Billy er praktisk, mens Amanda er havesyk.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Sluttspillet
programme.desc: Når Billys far plutselig dør av et massivt hjerteinfarkt, forsøker storesøsteren hans å overbevise ham om at faren faktisk elsket ham.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Testen
programme.desc: Når en ekskjæreste besøker Jake for å fortelle ham at hun har AIDS, får Jake panikk, og han informerer Jo så de begge kan teste seg.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Brennpunkt
programme.desc: Når frafalne IRA-medlemmer prøver å drepe en embetsmann som megler fred mellom IRA og Storbritannia, må Walker og Trivette finne gjerningsmennene for å unngå en internasjonal konflikt.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Innbrudd
programme.desc: Et beskyttet vitne blir drept mens Walker og Trivette vokter ham, noe som kan føre til at en mafioso slipper ut av fengsel. Under dekke av å være en leiemorder drar Walker til fengselet for å få en drapstilståelse ut av mafiosoen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: LaRues tilbakekomst
programme.desc: Alex satte Victor LaRue, mannen som kidnappet og prøvde å voldta henne, i fengsel, men minnet hjemsøker henne. Hun frykter for livet når han slippes ut grunnet en formalitet og søker hevn.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Ødeleggeren
programme.desc: Alex prøver å overbevise en kvinne om å forlate ektemannen som sitter inne for konemishandling. Mannen blir rasende og sverger å få kona si tilbake eller få Alex til å svi.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: El Coyote, del 1
programme.desc: Walker oppdager at en gruppe amerikanere ulovlig sniker meksikanere over grensa og selger dem som slaver. Han later som han er en meksikansk bonde for å infiltrere operasjonen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: El Coyote, del 2
programme.desc: Walker oppdager at en gruppe amerikanere ulovlig sniker meksikanere over grensa og selger dem som slaver. Han later som han er en meksikansk bonde for å infiltrere operasjonen.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Hevneren
programme.desc: Walker dreper en våpenhandler under en razzia, og den døde mannens bror bruker C.D. som gissel for å lokke Walker i en felle og hevne seg.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Bak skiltet
programme.desc: Når en TV-reporter fra en politiserie vil filme rangerne i aksjon, nekter både Walker eller Trivette å ta oppdraget, helt til de møter den vakre reporteren.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Blackout
programme.desc: Walker prøver å ta en kasinoeier for hvitvasking, men blir slått bevisstløs. Han våkner med hukommelsestap mens han slepes ut av kasinoet av en ung, kvinnelig blackjack-kortgiver.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Fristen
programme.desc: En rik senator prøver å oppløse Texas Rangers og skylder på budsjettinnstramming. Trivette kommer til høringen for å tale deres sak, men Walker nekter å forsvare en institusjon han mener ikke trenger noe forsvar.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Beleiring
programme.desc: Rangernes ferie på et avsidesliggende sted blir til en katt-og-mus-lek med en notorisk heroinlanger som fanger Walker, Trivette, C.D. og Alex i en forlatt hytte etter at Alex ser ham lange.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Moskva-forbindelsen
programme.desc: En rekke lagerran leder Walker og Trivette til en russisk mafiasjef, og rangerne innkaller Moskva-politiet for å identifisere og fakke skurken.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Mirakel i Middle Creek
programme.desc: En seksåring faller ned i et 12 meter dypt avløp, og Walker prøver å redde ham. Men når hullet raser sammen, blir Walker og gutten sittende fast uten mye til håp.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Æresgalleriet
programme.desc: Kvelden før C.D. skal innlemmes i Texas Rangers’ Æresgalleri hjemsøker en seriemorder fra en 11 år gammel sak ham, og han begynner å tvile på om han fortjener æren.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Høyere makter
programme.desc: Walker prøver å holde en familie samlet etter at en tibetansk munk oppdager at ånden til Lama Dolgin har blitt reinkarnert som en ung gutt og prøver å ta gutten med til Tibet.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Patriot
programme.desc: Når Walker og Trivette arresterer lederen for en høyreekstrem gruppe, hevner gruppen seg ved å ta Alex og de ansatte ved en minoritetseid TV-stasjon som gissel.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Spøkelsesrytteren
programme.desc: Når byggarbeidere avdekker en ung indianergutts forråtnede lik, prøver Walker og Trivette å løse en gammel forbrytelse. Men når ingen i byen vil snakke, har de bare skjelettet å gå ut fra.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Brorskap
programme.desc: Et hevnlystent politibrorskap begynner å drepe skurker som slippes fri, og Walker må gjøre slutt på terroren.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Pest
programme.desc: Walker må redde livet til sine venner på Cherokee-reservatet når de settes i fare av et selskap som driver et eksperimentelt meieri og velger fremtidig profitt fremfor sikkerhet.

programme.title: Fortress: Sniper's Eye
programme.desc: Den pensjonerte CIA-agenten Robert legger ut på en dristig redningsaksjon av erkefiendens enke, Sasha. Men snart blir Robert konfrontert med et kjent ansikt han trodde han aldri ville se igjen...

programme.title: Till Death
programme.desc: Etter en romantisk kveld i deres avsidesliggende hus, våkner Emma opp lenket til sin døde ektemann. Hun er fanget og isolert og må kjempe mot leiemordere for å unnslippe ektemannens avsindige plan.

programme.title: Official Secrets
programme.desc: Den sanne historien om en britisk varsler som lekket informasjon til media om en ulovlig NSA-operasjon, hvis formål var å presse FNs sikkerhetsråd til å godkjenne invasjonen av Irak i 2003.

programme.title: Red Dawn
programme.desc: Når en amerikansk by blir invadert av nordkoreanske soldater, kommer en gruppe unge mennesker sammen for å beskytte hverandre, frigjøre byen og gjenvinne sin frihet.

programme.title: Taken
programme.desc: Den tidligere agenten Bryan Mills begynner de lengste 96 timene i sitt liv når han tar opp jakten på mennene som kidnappet datteren hans.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Eleanor Rigby: Them
programme.desc: Engang var Conor og Eleanor lykkelig gift. Nå føler de seg fremmed for hverandre, og i kjølevannet av en tragisk hendelse lengter de etter å finne tilbake til det liv og den kjærligheten de engang hadde.

programme.title: Sweet Carolina
programme.desc: Josie vender tilbake til den lille hjembyen sin da hun uventet blir verge for niesen og nevøen sin. Der møter hun Cooper, kjæresten fra high school.

programme.title: Worth
programme.desc: Etter angrepene på World Trade Center og Pentagon utnevner kongressen advokaten Kenneth Feinberg til å lede erstatningsfondet for ofrene. Feinberg står overfor en umulig oppgave - å bestemme hvor mye et liv er verdt.

programme.title: Barely Lethal
programme.desc: 16-år gamle Megan Walsh er i trening for å bli en iskald internasjonal leiemorder, men i hemmelighet lengter hun etter å være en normal tenåring. Hun forfalsker derfor sin egen død.

programme.title: The Vows We Keep
programme.desc: En eventplanlegger finner kjærligheten mens hun jobber med å arrangere det siste bryllupet på en historisk taverna.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Comeback
programme.desc: With Jean still out of commission, Kris and Matt do their best to run the dude ranch at Raintree while also preparing for the next race, which features Dani's new horse in the field

programme.title: Wildfire: Being Mrs. Junior
programme.desc: Universal disapproval of Kris and Junior's wedding plans has everyone on edge, and even Kris wonders if she has what it takes to be part of the Davis family.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Ties That Bind: Part 1
programme.desc: Kris and Junior consider a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to relocate to Alaska for a year to work on a geothermal project in the series' penultimate episode.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Ties That Bind: Part 2
programme.desc: In the series finale, Junior's schedule goes haywire when an urgent matter in Alaska that requires his attention coincides with Kris'ride on Wildfire in the Tucker Stakes and their wedding.

programme.title: Wildfire: Pilot
programme.desc: Kris Furillo is released from the juvenile detention center and begins working at the Ritter family ranch.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Rescue
programme.desc: Kris Furillo is released from the juvenile detention center and begins working at the Ritter family ranch.

programme.title: Wildfire: Trust
programme.desc: Kris returns to Raintree Ranch after ninety days at Camp Lagrange and begins the healing process.

programme.title: Wildfire: Mothers
programme.desc: Kris' mother Barb pays an unexpected visit to Raintree.

programme.title: Wildfire: Guilty
programme.desc: Kris feels responsible when Oklahoma Crude is injured during a work out race with Wildfire so she gets a job at a local diner to help out, although it might not be enough.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Claiming Race
programme.desc: Against the backdrop of a high stakes horse race, Kris falls for Junior.

programme.title: Wildfire: Lost & Found
programme.desc: Kris and her companions track lost horses in the woods while the Ritter family grows emotionally.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Track
programme.desc: Kris investigates the seamy underworld of the race track after Wildfire comes down with colic.

programme.title: Wildfire: The Party
programme.desc: Kris makes an unexpected but crucial discovery about her past when an old friend arrives.

programme.title: Wildfire: Identity
programme.desc: When she gets thrown off a horse and injured, Kris herself realizes that a career as a jockey might come at a high price.

programme.title: Wildfire: Tina Sharp
programme.desc: Kris turns to painkillers to cope with her injury when the possibility of riding in an upcoming race is contingent upon her getting better.

programme.title: Wildfire: Impressions
programme.desc: Kris and Junior are getting more serious as Junior invites Kris to have dinner with the Davis'.

programme.title: Wildfire: Loyalty
programme.desc: Kris is hired to ride Wildfire although she struggles to remain focused because of her relationship with Junior.

programme.title: Wildfire: Try It Without The Porsche
programme.desc: Kris meets Kerry Connelly, a sports agent who takes interest in Kris after the results of the Sandpiper Race.

programme.title: Wildfire: Opportunity Knocks
programme.desc: On the heels of her dramatic second place finish in the Sandpiper Race, Kris is offered an opportunity to star in a commercial with Wildfire, which unexpectedly thrusts Kris and Junior together.

programme.title: Wildfire: A Good Convict Is Hard To Find
programme.desc: Kris reluctantly returns to Camp LaGrange for an event at the Equestrian Center where she first met Wildfire.
programme.sub-title: A Good Convict Is Hard To Find

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer in Disguise
programme.desc: Police race to track down the unlikely killer responsible for three terrifying murders.

programme.title: On the Case: Left in the Dark
programme.desc: When a beautiful young graduate student is found stabbed to death, detectives must determine if the murder was a crime of passion or a brutal attack by a violent intruder.

programme.title: On the Case: Path of Tears
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl is killed while walking her dog on a popular community bike trail.

programme.title: On the Case: Signed In Blood
programme.desc: In order to solve the vicious double murder of a beloved couple, police must uncover a cold blooded killer's carefully calculated plot.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder At Sunset- Part 1
programme.desc: A mother and two daughters are discovered floating in Tampa Bay after a brutal triple homicide. Police must rely on a victim who survived a similar attack to bring the killer to justice in this special two-hour On The Case.

programme.title: On the Case: Over The Edge
programme.desc: Police are called to the scene of what appears to be a tragic car wreck in the Blue Ridge Mountains... But as Investigators examine the crash site they realize Wendy Kratzert's death was no accident.

programme.title: On the Case: A Fateful Decision
programme.desc: A Young mother is kidnapped out of her driveway after a birthday celebration... Did a string of good luck, lead to her disappearance.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder at Bird Key
programme.desc: A successful business man is found brutally murdered in his palatial Southern Florida home. A mysterious backpack found at the crime scene is the key to the case.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Warning
programme.desc: When a 15-year-old girl vanishes in the middle of the night, a friend's terrifying secret may be the key to solving the case.

programme.title: On the Case: In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in broad daylight with her toddler just a few feet away. Police have little to go on except the bizarre description eyewitnesses have given them of the brazen killer.

programme.title: On the Case: A Mystery on Cherry Hill
programme.desc: When a beautiful young woman vanishes without a trace, it may take another tragedy before police will be able to solve the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer in Town
programme.desc: Paula Zahn examines how police raced to track down a vicious killer on his deadly cross-country journey.

programme.title: On the Case: Greed, Lies and Murder
programme.desc: Fifty-year-old mother of three Marilou Johnson disappears from the home of her boyfriend, Roger Blanchard, a wealthy retired businessman, then it becomes clear Johnson has met with foul play.

programme.title: On the Case: Vanished in the Night
programme.desc: When 20 year old Lynsie Ekelund suddenly goes missing in the dead of night, it leaves her mother scrambling for answers.

programme.title: On the Case: Courage and Conviction
programme.desc: A college student's battle for survival may be the key to solving a double homicide from years earlier.

programme.title: On the Case: Darkness in The Desert
programme.desc: Paula Zahn investigates the story of a Las Vegas starlet who mysteriously vanished during a visit to a local spy store.

programme.title: On the Case: River of Tears
programme.desc: Paula examines the discovery of a young woman's lifeless body on the bank of a shallow river. A note in her pocket may point to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Painful Memories
programme.desc: A young marine comes home and finds his nine month pregnant wife savagely beaten in their bedroom. Was he an innocent victim or could he have been responsible for the terrible crime.

programme.title: On the Case: Last Dance
programme.desc: A woman's walk home from a night out at a dance club ends in a brutal murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Screams for Justice
programme.desc: The eyewitness accounts of neighbors may help or hinder investigators as they seek to solve the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Target Practice
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey head to England to bring home a new plane. Devan does target-practice in the DC-4.James builds a Buffalo-style soapbox racer.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Air Show
programme.desc: Joe flies with the Snowbirds during the Hamilton air show and later teaches Mikey to fly. A surprise departure shakes up Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Five Seasons
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWT celebrates a milestone with a look back at the last five years, a peek behind the camera and reflections from the Buffalo crew.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: A Ball O'Snags
programme.desc: An engine fire and series of mechanical gremlins has Buffalo scrambling to make its Christmas deliveries. Newest rampie Prefkar Mony struggles with life in the North.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ice Storm
programme.desc: Buffalo's Electra aircraft is hammered by rough winds up the Mackenzie Valley. In Hay River, a rookie crew faces the worst ice storm in years and one rampie has a tough go trying to fit in at Buffalo.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Old Dogs
programme.desc: Engine trouble plagues Buffalo's newest Electra, ZFE, and a standoff between Joe and Transport Canada threatens to close the airline. At the same time, Joe faces a tough decision about his old dog Sophie.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Checkflight
programme.desc: Joe leaves to undergo medical tests at the Mayo Clinic in Phoenix, Arizona. Jeff and Sam stress over their DC-3 checkflights and Joe celebrates turning 70-his way.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Second Chances
programme.desc: Rookie pilot Jeff nearly runs off the runway. Prefkar learns to play hockey but drops the ball at Buffalo and Joe goes on a date with a real dog.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Big Plans, Bad Luck
programme.desc: Mikey decides to get Buffalo involved in a D-Day paratrooper jump to commemorate the 70th anniversary of D-Day. Prefkar escapes Hay River courier duty. Cory finds an original bracket for the DC3 static line for Mikey's D-Day jump.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Dogfight
programme.desc: Buffalo's top guns, rookies and vets, go to California for aerial dogfights in real fighter planes. Cory and Mikey race to get ready for the D-Day jump.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: D-Day
programme.desc: Mikey's much-planned D-Day tribute parachute jump with 20 paratroopers hits a wall when Joe refuses to fly his DC-3 to the drop zone.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: 40/40/40
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot Scott faces his worst nightmare when a faltering Curtiss C-46 Commando engine and low fog force a scary landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Pre-Christmas Rush
programme.desc: Christmas is just around the corner, but Buffalo's crucial food and mail runs come to a halt. An engine seizure strands Scott, AJ and the C-46 plane, creating a chaotic chain reaction.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Birthday from Hell
programme.desc: A string of bad luck turns chief pilot Arnie's 66th birthday run into the flight from hell - and threatens to spoil his naughty birthday surprise.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Frozen Four
programme.desc: As Joe fights a Transport Canada claim against the airline, star pilot Justin is tasked with shipping an 8,000lb generator to a remote town. But a controversial decision results in the DC-4 becoming stranded and frozen solid on a High Arctic airstrip.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: When a deadly fire destroys a northern outpost a week before Christmas, Buffalo puts everything aside to come to the rescue. Cargo Manager Kelly receives a shocking diagnosis that renews her fight to quit smoking.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Under Pressure
programme.desc: The curse of -40 hits Buffalo pilots Devan and Scott on a food mail flight up the Mackenzie Valley when a mysterious rise in oil pressure threatens to destroy one of the C-46's engines.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Right Stuff
programme.desc: Mikey goes on a treasure hunt to Venezuela for a rare CL-215 waterbomber. Cargo Manager Kelly's stress levels hit a new high when she returns from her Mexican vacation in even worse health than when she left.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The River Lift
programme.desc: A vital ferry link is down, so Buffalo mounts an all-out campaign to airlift 100,000lbs of essential goods across the Mackenzie River.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Don't Muck with Chuck
programme.desc: Crusty mechanic Chuck leads the scramble to ready the Electra for a disaster relief mission in Haiti, but fate's curveball sends them to the High Arctic instead.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: 1905 Hand-crank Thomas Edison gramophone with cylindrical records; a discontinued Addictor 190 Mini Boat; a rare 1897 Regina music box.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Skyddsjakt På Vildsvin & Vårbocksjakt
programme.desc: Jompen ger sig ut på jakt efter vildsvin tillsammans med Johan från Hunteq. Helt klart en vildsvinsjakt som bjuder på det mesta.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Klövvilt
programme.desc: Lubbe och Jompen är på Wikhus utanför Västerås där dom jagar vildsvin, kronhjort och dovhjort.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Sju Vildsvin På Två Såter!
programme.desc: Jompen & Danne drar på drevjakt i Johannishus. Massa vilt och spännande situationer utlovas!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jakt På Vildren Del 1 & Del 2
programme.desc: Följ med på vildrensrenjakt i Snöhetta, Norge!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Vårbocksjakt
programme.desc: Pluto-tävlingen är avgjord! Vi tar med oss Anton som är vinnare av tävlingen och återvänder till Harbonäs för en makalös vårbocksjakt.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Djursnäs
programme.desc: Ännu en dag, ännu en vildsvinsjakt. Jompen beger sig till Nynäshamn för att återigen skrämma bort vildsvinen som terroriserar en stackars hästgård.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Viltsamverkan I Brandens Spår
programme.desc: Stora skogsbränder spred sig genom Sverige 2018. Hur reagerar naturen och viltet i brandens spår?

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drevjakt I Tyskland & Rough Shooting
programme.desc: Jompen är nerbjuden av Steiner till Tyskland på drevjakt. På menyn står vildsvin, rådjur och annat.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jompen Tar Jägarexamen 1
programme.desc: Lubbe tröttnar på sin kameraman och sätter honom hos Jägareförbundet för att ta Jägarexamen. Själv ger han sig ut på jakt efter hjort

programme.title: Vilterian: Carpaccio
programme.desc: Jompen, jägare från Jakt är Jakt lagar sin bästa carpaccio, på hjort! Fräscha smaker med olika texturer bildar tillsammans en förrätt i världsklass som kommer imponera på de flesta - och det bästa är att den är superenkel att göra!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Spannmålsjakt på vildsvin
programme.desc: Vildsvin deluxe! Ska det bli någon film då får man kriga! Det gör Jompen med råge denna vecka. Det blir hela tre olika jakter på vildsvin i samma film!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Andsjön & Bock Och Kronpyrsch
programme.desc: Jompen, Stoffe och Mackan fixar med änder på Jompens jaktmark.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Hela Jompen Och Pierres Jaktgarderob
programme.desc: Jompen och Pierre går igenom alla sina jaktprylar, vapen, kläder, utrustning, you name it!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Sturefors pyrschjakt
programme.desc: Skovlar överallt i veckans jaktfilm. Danne och Jompen trotsar väder och vind för en riktigt fin smygjakt!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Andjakt
programme.desc: Jompen, Pierre, Christoffer och Salong Betong Danne möts upp för magisk andjakt. Nu kan ni köpa våra produkter och mycket mer påI www.widforss.se/jakt-är-jakt gå in och titta :)

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Rough Shooting
programme.desc: Jompen och Calle vaknar upp till dag två. Morgonen börjar med andpytt för att övergå i duv och harjakt. Middagen lagas av vad som fällts och hittats under dagen. Hääng med........

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Julspecial - Jakt Och Mat!
programme.desc: Sista avsnittet innan julen! Jompen och Calle Dreyer firar högtiden genom att jaga och laga i Blommeröd.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Wallenbergare, Besök I Benellifabriken & Älgbiff
programme.desc: Jompen besöker Benellis högteknologiska fabrik i Italien. Häng med och se hur deras bössor tillverkas.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Hundträning
programme.desc: Jompen tar sig till Roslagens Jakt och Vilt i Almunge för att lära sig lite om jakthundar. Vi kollar hur hundarna jobbar mot olika vilt; vildsvin, älg samt björn.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drevjakt I Vinterkyla
programme.desc: Jompen har påpassligt "försvunnit", så Lubbe ger sig ut på drevjakt i -20° och bländande solsken med ett par nya förmågor. Mufflon, kronhjort och vildsvin står på agendan, men det blir svårare än Lubbe trott...

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Jompens Första Kronhjort
programme.desc: Jompen är i Sörmland på drevjakt. Vi får skjuta mufflon, kronhjort, vildsvin, och rådjur. Efter lunch får Jompen syn på den magiska kronhjorten.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Ett år av drevjakt
programme.desc: Säsongens sista drevjakt med Danne. Vildsvin, älg, kronhjortar, rådjur, dovhjortar och räv - ja helt enkelt galet mycket under samma jakt!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Pierre Och Kattis Pyrschar Dov
programme.desc: Pierre och Kattis ger sig ut på pyrsch med sikte på dov.

programme.title: Vilterian: Råbiff
programme.desc: Alexander Lundin är tillbaks i rutan med ännu ett härligt recept! Denna gång blir det en råbiff på älg som passar perfekt både som huvudrätt och förrätt. Luta dig tillbaka och bli inspirerad!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Vi Besöker Swedish Game Fair
programme.desc: Missade du årets grymmaste jaktmässa Game fair? Inga problem! Hela jakt är jakt är på plats på årets game fair och du får hänga med Jompen när han letar efter mässans höjdpunkter.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drevjakt I Södermanland
programme.desc: Vi är på årets sista drevjakt.

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Vildsvinsjakt På Ridön
programme.desc: Jompen är bjuden till vildsvinsjakt på Ridön och tar med sig sin goda vän Anders på en upplevelse dom sent kommer glömma!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Drevjakt Ems Herrgård & Aska The Dog - Del 4
programme.desc: Jompen, Danne Beijner och Calle Dreyer är på drevjakt på Ems Herrgård i Småland.
programme.sub-title: Drevjakt Ems Herrgård & Aska The Dog - Del 4

programme.title: Vilterian: Hjortlägg
programme.desc: I detta avsnitt lagar vi rimmat, grillat & confiterat hjortlägg med Tottie ute på Hammartorp. Han bjuder även på en Dovhjorts-ceviche som vanligtvis görs på fisk. Häng med och bli inspirerad!

programme.title: Jakt är Jakt: Två Dagars Drevjakt
programme.desc: Jompen är ute på jaktturne. Drevjakt på vildsvin o dovhjort står på menyn.

programme.desc: Iconic duo and longtime best friends Jane Fonda and Lily Tomlin are chatting with Drew all about meeting her as a kid, their new film, "Moving On," their secrets to a lasting friendship and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Ike Barinholtz, Drew's News with Ally Love
programme.desc: "History of the World Part Two" StarIke Barinholtz is joins Drew and talks about how he met his wife in Las Vegas, his new show and more. Peloton Instructor Ally Love joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to serve the news sunny-side up.
programme.sub-title: Ike Barinholtz, Drew's News with Ally Love

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Kiera Knightley, Carrie Coon, Drew's News
programme.desc: Kiera Knightley and Carrie Coon join Drew to talk about their upcoming film, "Boston Strangler."Drew and her co-pilotRoss Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.
programme.sub-title: Kiera Knightley, Carrie Coon, Drew's News

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Justice Smith, Drew's News with Ali Landry
programme.desc: Actor Justice Smith joins Drew and he's dishing about his latest film, "Dungeons and Dragons." Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by Ali Landry at the Drew's News desk as they serve the news sunny-side up.
programme.sub-title: Justice Smith, Drew's News with Ali Landry

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Lucy Liu, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew is joined by her friend "Shazam! Fury of the Gods" star Lucy Liu and she's dishing on some of her iconic roles like "Charlie's Angels" and "Kill Bill."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Rob Riggle
programme.desc: Rob Riggle joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to cover topics like the news of a potential "Dumb and Dumber 3" and the couple that opted for mashed potato powder instead of rice at their wedding.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Jennette McCurdy
programme.desc: Jennette McCurdy, author of the best-selling memoir, "I'm Glad My Mom Died," has a very honest and revealing conversation with Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Phoebe Robinson, Design Under $30, National Teacher’s Day
programme.desc: Podcast host Phoebe Robinson joins Drew to help solve some dilemmas in “Drew’s and Don’ts.” Comedian Michelle Collins and Drew play “Change My Mind: Reality TV Edition.” Drew celebrates Nat'l Teacher’s Day with Bronx middle school teacher Jamel Holmes.
programme.sub-title: Phoebe Robinson, Design Under $30, National Teacher’s Day

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: James Corden, “Drew’s Love Bug” Dating Apps, The Weekender
programme.desc: James Corden gets candid on hosting a daily show. Drew dives into the world of dating apps enlisting a dating expert to share tips in the latest installment of “Drew’s Love Bug.” Drew gives a curated list of her favorite picks in “The Weekender.”
programme.sub-title: James Corden, “Drew’s Love Bug” Dating Apps, The Weekender

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Joe Manganiello, Adam Sandler, Money Talk with Carmen Rita Wong
programme.desc: "Archenemy" star Joe Manganiello chats with Drew. Drew shares some never before seen moments from her chat with Adam Sandler. Personal finance expert Carmen Rita Wong shares tips. Drew tries out some weird food combos with TikTok star Eitan Bernath.
programme.sub-title: Joe Manganiello, Adam Sandler, Money Talk with Carmen Rita Wong

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Nikki Glaser, Retro Cooking, Shirley Temples With 7-Year-Old Shirley Temple King
programme.desc: Comedian Nikki Glaser and her mom Julie Glaser stop by to chat. Then, in Retro Cooking, Drew brings the 1950s tuna noodle casserole back to life. Seven-year-old Leo Kelly, aka The Shirley Temple King, stops by to whip up some Shirley Temples with Drew.
programme.sub-title: Nikki Glaser, Retro Cooking, Shirley Temples With 7-Year-Old Shirley Temple King

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: "The Drew Barrymore Show" kicks-off its premiere episode with a "Charlie’s Angels" reunion with Cameron Diaz and Lucy Liu. Drew also reunites with longtime friend / co-star Adam Sandler. Drew has a big surprise for a deserving family of essential workers.
programme.sub-title: "Charlie’s Angels" Reunion With Cameron Diaz & Lucy Liu, Adam Sandler

programme.title: A Unicorn for Christmas
programme.desc: Når en ung jente oppdager en ekte enhjørning på et julekarneval, må hun beskytte den mot den grådige tivolieieren.

programme.title: The Jingle Bell Jubilee
programme.desc: En ordfører får hjelp av en barndomsvenn til å arrangere byens juleinnsamling, mens hun setter i gang med å spleise ham med sin nære venninne.

programme.title: A Christmas Blessing
programme.desc: Mandy selger sin avdøde tantes matsentral, Angel's Fare, til den lokale bedriftseieren Adam, men en frivillig som jobber der ønsker å arrangere en siste julemiddag.

programme.title: A Christmas Stray
programme.desc: Når en løshund tvinger bilen av veien, sitter arbeidsnarkoman Ethan fast i en landsby. Ethan blir rasende når han oppdager at han har blitt innesnødd til jul - helt til han møter den lokale veterinæren.

programme.title: A Dash of Christmas
programme.desc: Megan har funnet drømmejobben i en nystartet matbedrift, men først må hun lære seg å bake. Når hun rekrutterer en kjekk baker til å hjelpe seg, ender hun uforvarende opp med å delta i en julebakstkonkurranse.

programme.title: Married by Christmas
programme.desc: Carrie har viet hele livet til farens virksomhet og har ikke mye tid til overs for et sosialt liv. Men så bestemmer bestemorens testamente at virksomheten går til søsteren som gifter seg først.

programme.title: A Sisterly Christmas
programme.desc: To søstre må legge forskjellene sine til side for å vinne et lokalt feriesteds årlige feriekonkurranse innen juledag.

programme.title: A Godwink Christmas: Miracle of Love
programme.desc: Joy og Eric leter begge etter en følelse av mening i livet, og møtes under en frivillig jobb der Joy bruker ferdighetene sine som sykepleier og Eric setter skriveferdighetene sine på prøve.

programme.title: Candy Cane Candidate
programme.desc: En kvinne vender tilbake til hjembyen til jul etter en mislykket kampanje og møter sin gamle rival.

programme.title: The Christmas Spirit
programme.desc: En ulykke fører til at Charlotte havner i koma, men ånden hennes er våken. I forkant av en avstemning om et eiendomsprosjekt må hun få byen og utbyggeren til å ombestemme seg uten at noen kan se eller høre henne.

programme.title: A Puppy for Christmas
programme.desc: Noelle har det perfekte oppsettet: en bra jobb, en fin kjæreste og et drømmeliv. Men etter å ha adoptert en liten valp, snus livet hennes på hodet og bare litt julemagi kan fikse det.

programme.title: Made: Ladies Man
programme.desc: A dorky, desperate, hygienically challenged senior wants to land his very first date and kiss by being MADE into an irresistible chick magnet. The catch? He has to get a girl to ask HIM out to the school dance.

programme.title: Made: Prom Queen - Kristy
programme.desc: Kristy McCallan wants to break out of her shy shell and dazzle her doubters by being MADE into a cool and confident Prom Queen.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Missed your Sweet 16? Throw a Sweet 18! That's what these triplets did when planning their Vegas themed birthday. Dealing with these three sisters means triple the drama!

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: A private jet to Vegas for dress shopping, 100% pure silver invitations and a hot VIP list is Lila's dream come true. So why did her mom go and hire those Latin dancers?

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Years ago Jazmin lived in foster care. Now she's living large thanks to having been adopted by rich parents, and she's anxious to have a Sweet 16 to make up for all of the birthdays she's missed.

programme.title: My Super Sweet 16
programme.desc: Bjorn is a divo who wants to have a hot fashion party at his local mall. But will nerves and being seriously late ruin his party?

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Weeman, Jack Osbourne, Pink, Stephan Dorf
programme.desc: "Wee Man" Acuna and Jack Osbourne are given a hard time by MTV security, Pink thinks she is being framed by her boyfriend, Carey Hart, for running a motorcycle "chop shop" and Stephen Dorff (Blade) is set up to get stuck with an $8,000 bar tab.
programme.sub-title: Weeman, Jack Osbourne, Pink, Stephan Dorf

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Missy Elliot, Hilary Duff, Usher
programme.desc: Missy Elliott gets caught up in a bling sting when her jewel-encrusted dog tags are given to the wrong messenger, Hilary Duff gets a driver's education when her car gets jacked by the Punk'd crew. Also, Usher's brother is picked up for shoplifting...

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Nick Carter, Tommy Lee, Lil' Bow Wow
programme.desc: Nick Carter thinks he's punking his friend Tommy Lee, only to find out tables have been turned on him, Tommy Lee thinks he and his friend Nick Carter are going for a test drive only to find that they've been involved in a hit and run Punk'd Style...
programme.sub-title: Nick Carter, Tommy Lee, Lil' Bow Wow

programme.title: Punk'd (MTV): Mya, Katie Holmes, Tracy Morgan
programme.desc: Mya gets up close and personal with her biggest fan, Katie Holmes (Dawson's Creek) gets involved in a torrid love triangle and Tracy Morgan (The Tracy Morgan Show) gets his car towed when the Punk'd valet crew parks his ride in the red zone.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Dingo
programme.desc: Snowboarderen The Dingo hjelper Rob med å presentere Pain Angels, Worst Case Scenarios og That'll Cost You. Og du gjetter aldri hva som skjer når en vektløfter mister kontrollen.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matthew Mounce
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo og Chanel ler seg i hjel av Unnecessary Combos, Stay Out Of The Water og Who Put That There, og karateeksperten Matthew Mounce presenterer Bad Karate.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jeff Tremaine
programme.desc: Produsenten Jeff Tremaine hjelper Rob med å presentere episodens klipp. Noen barn begynner tidlig i Ridiculousness in Training, og to elefanter hjelper hverandre med en vanskelig matbit.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Schlager
programme.desc: Skjønnhetsdronningen Caite Upton er med i panelet, Matt Schlager viser hvordan man faller med ansiktet først, og du får se klippene Inappropriate Animals, Misfires And False Starts og Yoga Fart.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Tenåringsmoren Maci vurderer å slå opp med forloveden Ryan. Farrah dater en ny gutt, selv om familien misliker det. Amber strever med utdanningen, og Catelynn føler at forholdet til datteren er blitt svekket etter adopsjonen.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynns familie liker ikke adopsjonsvalget. Amber og forloveden Gary krangler konstant. Farrah oppdager at dating ikke vanskelig for en ung mor, og Maci sliter med å balansere morsrollen og studiene når vennene begynner på college.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Konflikten mellom Amber og Gary når kokepunktet, og Catelynn leter etter et nytt sted å bo når moren hennes flytter. Nysingle Maci skifter mening, og guttegale Farrah ønsker beskyttelse.

programme.title: Teen Mom
programme.desc: Catelynn takler valget om adopsjon på en utflukt med andre mødre, og Maci og Ryan besøker en rådgiver. Amber vurderer å takke ja til hjelp fra eksen, og Farrah lurer på om hun burde være mer hjemme med barnet sitt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: What Happens in the AC
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Atlantic City, der moro blir til alvor idet Mike støter fra seg både Snooki og Jwoww. En av deltakerne avslører at hun har hatt spiseforstyrrelser.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Shot
programme.desc: Sommeren går mot slutten, men dramaet er ikke over. Pauly får en stalker, og en deltaker havner i fengsel etter en slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: That's How The Shore Goes
programme.desc: Ronnie slipper ut, og Snooki får trøst etter et møte med eksen. Gjengen tar farvel med The Shore, men ikke uten en siste tur i boblebadet.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Nelly, Russel Simmons, O-Town
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Nelly, Russel Simmons, O-Town.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Laura Prepon, James King, Devon Sawa
programme.desc: Tour the homes of the hottest new stars from the movie Slackers. Features tours of the homes of James King, Laura Prepon and Devon Sawa.
programme.sub-title: Laura Prepon, James King, Devon Sawa

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Jason Kidd, Damon Soudamire, Jerry Stackhouse
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Jason Kidd, Damon Soudamire, Jerry Stackhouse.
programme.sub-title: Jason Kidd, Damon Soudamire, Jerry Stackhouse

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Cash Money Millionaires, Ali Landry, Ricky Williams
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Cash Money Millionaires, Ali Landry, Ricky Williams.
programme.sub-title: Cash Money Millionaires, Ali Landry, Ricky Williams

programme.title: Made: Moto-X
programme.desc: Kaitlin Smith wants to shed her girly girl reputation and find her inner strength by being MADE into a rough and tough motocross racer!

programme.title: Made: Basketball Player
programme.desc: Kenneth is a dancing diva who's determined to gain the acceptance of his military father by being Made into a basketball player.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Dark Side of the Mesa
programme.desc: A report about the 2004 conviction of Michael Blagg for the murder of his wife and daughter. Blagg has steadfastly maintained his innocence and in 2014, in a bombshell decision, the conviction was overturned and a new trial began in 2018.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened in Apartment 4C?
programme.desc: A report on the 2016 disappearance and murder of Joey Comunale after a night of partying in New York City. While out clubbing, Comunale accepted an invitation to a party at a Sutton Place apartment with people he had just met.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Remembering the Chowchilla Kidnapping
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lina's Heart
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Death of an Officer's Wife
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
programme.sub-title: The Death of an Officer's Wife

programme.title: 48 Hours: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Toxic
programme.desc: On December 2, 2000, 30-year-old Eric Miller died in a Raleigh, North Carolina hospital. Blood tests had revealed that he had been poisoned with arsenic.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Lorenzen Wright: No Defense
programme.desc: An investigation into the life of NBA superstar Lorenzen Wright, a hometown hero to many in Memphis, Tennessee and the circumstances of his 2010 murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Pact
programme.desc: A report on the murder of 15-year-old John McCabe of Tewksbury, Massachusetts, who was murdered after a dance in 1969, and his family's decades-long quest to find out what really happened to him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Ghost of David Coffin
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Krystal's Courage
programme.desc: 10-year-old Krystal Surles and her friend Kaylene Harris were attacked in Kaylene’s home by an intruder who slashed both girls’ throats. Kaylene died. Krystal not only survived but was able to help police, leading to the arrest of her attacker.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hit
programme.desc: A report on the death of colorful entrepreneur and Las Vegas gambler Gary Triano, who was blown up in his car after finishing a round of golf at the exclusive La Paloma Country Club in Tucson, Arizona in 1996.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Defending DJ
programme.desc: A report about Danroy "DJ" Henry and the dedication and struggles his family endured while trying to restore their son's reputation after he was shot dead in Pleasantville, New York, by police officer Aaron Hess in 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: In September 2005, 17-year-old Taylor Behl, a Virginia Commonwealth University freshman, disappeared from campus. A police investigation eventually uncovered her association with Ben Fawley, a 38-year-old man who confessed to having sex with Taylor.

programme.title: 48 Hours: West Memphis 3: Free
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Joanne Witt was stabbed to death while she was sleeping on Thursday, June 11, 2009. One month prior to her death Joanne found her 14-year-old daughter Tylar Witt in a compromising situation with 19-year-old Stephen Colver.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mystery on Twin Peaks Drive
programme.desc: A report on the December 16, 1998 death of Ronda Reynolds, whose husband found her lifeless body with a gunshot wound to the head in her home on Twin Peaks Drive in Toledo, Washington.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Ride Home
programme.desc: An examination of the 2016 case of wealthy lawyer Tex McIver, who shot his wife Diane McIver from the backseat of a car while their friend drove them home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: In 2003, Jeanne Callahan waited for her husband, Stephen Trantel, to return home from a day of fishing. Hours later, she received a call telling her that Stephen was under arrest -- police told Jeanne that Stephen had committed ten bank robberies.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Love and Death in Alaska - Part 1
programme.desc: On May 2, 1996, the body of Kent Leppink was found off a deserted road in Alaska. He had been shot three times. Police discovered that he had been involved with Mechele Hughes, a young woman who worked as a stripper in a club.
programme.sub-title: Love and Death in Alaska - Part 1

programme.title: World Chase Tag USA 2020
programme.desc: Segui gli emozionanti match di World Chase Tag, il campionato internazionale di parkour competitivo che prevede il gioco dell'acchiapparella.

programme.title: Thaiboksning: Muay Thai Grand Prix - Brøndby 2023
programme.desc: Brøndby Hallen dannede lørdag d. 18. november rammen om det store internationale Muay Thai Grand Prix-stævne med bl.a. Joakim Jankovic, Oliver Simonsen og Yara Saleh på plakaten. Kommentatorer: Peter Jørgensen og Kim Marconi.

programme.title: Danish Fight Night: København - Maj 2024
programme.desc: Se bl.a. Dina Thorslunds titelforsvar med en dobbelt VM-kamp ved Danish Fight Night i Royal Arena fra d. 25. maj 2024.
