programme.desc: Judge Judy Sheindlin, a former judge from New York, tackles actual, small claims cases with her no-nonsense attitude.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 92
programme.desc: Judge Judy Sheindlin, a former judge from New York, tackles actual, small claims cases with her no-nonsense attitude.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 138
programme.desc: Judge Judy Sheindlin, a former judge from New York, tackles actual, small claims cases with her no-nonsense attitude.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Robot
programme.desc: Lee Meriwether and Malachi Throne are guest stars in an IMF plot involving doubles and double-dealing, with Paris playing five different roles and Jim Phelps turning magician on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Fool's Gold
programme.desc: Musical comedy star Sally Ann Howes plays a dramatic role as a guest member of the IMF when it sets out to foil a plot to ruin a friendly country with counterfeit money on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Double Circle
programme.desc: Guest star Anne Francis joins the IMF when it sets out to prevent destruction of a secret formula vital to America's missile defense system on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Submarine
programme.desc: To locate a hoard of stolen money, the IMF takes the one man who knows its hiding place (guest star Stephen McNally) on a bizarre submarine voyage on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Brothers
programme.desc: The IMF turns itself into a surgical team to operate on a tyrannical ruler who has imprisoned the rightful king, his twin brother, on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Falcon (Part 1)
programme.desc: Guest stars Noel Harrison and Diane Baker are drawn into a daring IMF charade that uses a trained falcon to help in a crown jewel theft in the first of a three-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Falcon (Part 2)
programme.desc: Barney is blinded in an accident, a bride-to-be is buried alive and Paris poses as a man he is unaware is marked for death in the second of a three-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Falcon (Part 3)
programme.desc: A trained falcon is summoned in a last-ditch rescue attempt when Jim Phelps finds his IMF endangered by a traitor's assassination plot in the last of a three-part episode on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Time Bomb
programme.desc: To head off a threatened atomic blast, Jim Phelps gains entry to a top secret nuclear plant by posing as a temperamental artist with guest star Barbara Luna as his model on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Amnesiac
programme.desc: As a doctor with a startling new treatment for amnesia, Jim Phelps forces Paris to relive another man's past when the IMF pushes a search for stolen nuclear material on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Chico
programme.desc: A dog that collects rare stamps -- on command from the IMF -- figures in a perilous journey to the stronghold of a narcotics kingpin (guest star Fernando Lamas) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Terror
programme.desc: To calm a Middle East trouble spot, the IMF tries to keep a man in prison long enough to make it look as though he is trying to break out on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Gitano
programme.desc: The IMF hides a young prince from assassins by disguising him as a gypsy girl, then Paris sets out to betray the boy to his pursuers on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Phantoms
programme.desc: To fight an aging dictator's purge of young artists, an IMF member (guest star Antoinette Bower) becomes a ghost and Paris assumes the guise of a man long dead on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Lover's Knot
programme.desc: In the midst of delicate operations to identify the chief of an espionage ring, Jim Phelps realizes that Paris has fallen in love with an enemy agent on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Orpheus
programme.desc: Jim Phelps assumes a risky pose as a drug addict with information to sell to get behind the Iron Curtain where he seeks to stop an unknown assassin from killing an unknown victim on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Choice
programme.desc: Paris is marked for execution when he impersonates a power-mad mystic trying to win control of a friendly country by hypnotizing its woman ruler on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Elizabethtown
programme.desc: Den fremadstormende designeren Drew Baylor får livet snudd på hodet en skjebnesvanger dag. På vei til Elizabethtown møter Drew Claire, som har bestemt seg for at hun er den rette jenta for å vise Drew veien hjem igjen.

programme.title: Modern Persuasion
programme.desc: En singel kvinne med fokus på karrieren i New York blir tvunget til å forholde seg til følgene av et mislykket forhold når ekskjæresten hennes hyrer inn hennes reklamebyrå.

programme.title: Delirious
programme.desc: Les er kjendisfotograf og er avhengig av blinkskudd for å overleve. Toby Grace (Michael Pitt) er uteligger og avhengig av veldedighet for å overleve. En dag møtes disse to tilfeldig og et slags vennskap på godt og vondt utvikler seg dem imellom.

programme.title: A Midsummer's Hawaiian Dream
programme.desc: I denne parafrasen av Shakespeares "A Midsummer Night's Dream" to gifte antropologiprofessorer og studentene deres prøver å finne en hellig tiki for å stoppe ødeleggelsene av Hawaii-jungelen.

programme.title: Upside of Anger
programme.desc: Da Terry Wolfmeyers (Joan Allen) mann plutselig en dag forlater henne og deres fire døtre uten så mye som et ord til farvel, snus tilværelsen for den vellykkede forstadsfamilien fullstendig på hodet!

programme.title: Tilfellet Henry
programme.desc: Henry er en vellykket advokat som må vinne for enhver pris, selv på familiens bekostning. Men et pistolskudd setter en stopper for Henrys karriere, lammer ham og fjerner alle minner om livet han hadde før.

programme.title: Wings Of The Dove
programme.desc: When a beautiful young society woman must choose between a life of privilege and poverty, she befriends an heiress whose own tragic secret offers an irrestible, but dangerous, solution to her dilemma in this intriguing story of forbidden love.

programme.title: What If
programme.desc: Den håpløst romantiske Wallace har droppet ut av medisinstudiet og har brent seg på kjærligheten. Når han møter Chantry, som dessverre er i et forpliktende forhold til kjæresten Ben, oppstår en umiddelbar gnist mellom dem.

programme.title: The Kids Are All Right
programme.desc: the kids are all right Mødrene Nic & Jules hadde den perfekte familien... helt til de møtte mannen som gjorde det hele mulig.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Independence Day
programme.desc: A lighthearted Fourth of July road trip turns into a nightmare after Johnny is hit with a vision of Bruce dying in a car crash.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Mighty Casey
programme.desc: A scientist arranges to have his human-looking robot pitch for the struggling local baseball team.

programme.title: Shivers NO
programme.desc: A cult favorite, Shivers is David Cronenberg's feature-length debut about parasites invading a luxury apartment complex and turning its residents into violent, sex-crazed maniacs.

programme.title: See No Evil 2
programme.desc: Amys venner overrasker henne på bursdagen hennes, men de blir selv overrasket når liket av Jacob Goodnight vender tilbake for å fortsette sitt morderiske tokt.

programme.title: The Gate
programme.desc: Fjerningen av et gammelt tre i Glens hage avslører et stort og mystisk hull som fører til Porten – et underjordisk kammer fullt av skremmende, demonisk ondskap.

programme.title: Hellraiser: Hellworld
programme.desc: Når fem beinharde online gamere blir invitert til en spesiell fest, arrangert av en mystisk destinasjon, kjent som Hellworld, går de gjennom en natt med usigelig terror som når lengre enn internett.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Destiny
programme.desc: When Johnny Smith's prediction of a tragic fire comes true, the incident brings him unwanted media coverage, as well as the attention of Greg Stillson, a very ambitious young candidate for congress.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Time Enough at Last
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Sounds and Silences
programme.desc: A man's wish to listen to loud noise backfires.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Encounter
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Stopover in a Quiet Town (aka Strangers in Town)
programme.desc: Bob and Millie wake up to find they are in a strange town. Everything appears to be props - trees, animals even cars.
programme.sub-title: Stopover in a Quiet Town (aka Strangers in Town)

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Where is Everybody?
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Judgment Night
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Come Wander with Me
programme.desc: A singer's song becomes tragically real.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: No Questions Asked
programme.desc: Walt (Chris Bruno) reluctantly accepts Johnny's help when a crime from the past comes back to haunt him.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Transgressions
programme.desc: Faith and truth collide as Johnny is thrust into a murder investigation of a young missing woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Spur of the Moment
programme.desc: After being chased on horseback by a terrifying, unidentified figure in black, Anne Henderson faces the biggest decision of her life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Walking Distance
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Prime Mover
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Zion
programme.desc: The death of Bruce's (John L. Adams) father, Pastor David Lewis (Louis Gosset Jr.), leads Bruce on an amazing journey down the road not taken.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: More Civil War
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må legge problemene til side når anonyme hackere med ukjente motiver tar kontroll over amerikanske militærfly og krigsskip og retter våpen mot amerikanske byer.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You
programme.desc: Akkurat i det teamet gjør fremskritt mot hackerne som kontrollerer amerikanske krigsskip, får de vite at en amerikansk atomubåt også er blitt hacket.
programme.sub-title: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Når Walter ved et uhell blir skutt ut i verdensrommet i en rakett, hallusinerer han om Paige mens oksygenet hans går tom, og Team Scorpion jobber febrilsk for å finne en måte å få ham hjem før han blir kvalt.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Teamet må finne en gutt fra Ralphs klasse som forsvinner på en ekskursjon etter å ha støtt på en dødelig forbryter.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Bat Poop Crazy
programme.desc: Team Scorpions enkle jobb ved Natural History Museum i Los Angeles blir dødelig når de oppdager tyver som raner en utstilling med sjeldne edelstener for å berike en atombombe.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
programme.desc: Før Halloween må teamet infiltrere et dypt, enormt hulesystem for å hindre en flaggermusbestand i å ødelegge det nordamerikanske økosystemet.
programme.sub-title: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sly and the Family Stone
programme.desc: På valgdagen, når demokratiet står på spill, blir Team Scorpion kalt inn når noen prøver å skape kaos i det amerikanske presidentvalget.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Mother Load
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion reiser til Irland for Megans ettårsjubileum, oppdager Walter at en naturkatastrofe i en innsjø i nærheten har skapt en giftig sky som kan drepe alle i landsbyen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: This Is the Pits
programme.desc: Paiges mor verver Team Scorpion når hun ved et uhell oppdager en glemt atomreaktor i ferd med å eksplodere.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Walter må svømme gjennom de dødelige La Brea-tjæregropene mens teamet hjelper en kvinne som sitter fast i tjæren før hun går tom for oksygen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Det er julaften og Team Scorpions elektronikkfrie ferie på fjellet blir dødelig når de støter på våpensmuglere og Ralph blir kidnappet mens de prøver å rømme.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Ice Ca-Cabes
programme.desc: Når et oppdrag i ørkenen resulterer i eksploderende splinter som skader Cabe alvorlig, må Team Scorpion fryse kroppen for å redde livet hans.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion blir lurt til å produsere falske penger for en utenlandsk enhet som ønsker å ødelegge den amerikanske økonomien, må Paige stole på moren Veronicas ferdigheter som svindler for å redde dem.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Teamet må redde en mann på kanten av et enormt synkehull som truer med å ødelegge Los Angeles vannforsyning for alltid.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sharknerdo
programme.desc: Team Scorpions jobb med å finne sunkne skatter går galt når Walter og Paiges båt eksploderer, og etterlater dem fortapt midt i Stillehavet omgitt av haier.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Dam Breakthrough
programme.desc: På julaften må Team Scorpion forhindre en katastrofe når styrtregn skaper en stor sprekk i en demning, som truer med å utslette en hel by i dens kjølvann.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: White Out
programme.desc: For å redde en amerikansk spesialstyrkeenhet fra en sikker død, må Team Scorpion trosse bitende minusgrader i Antarktis.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sun of a Gun
programme.desc: Sylvester står ansikt til ansikt med sin fraværende far, en pensjonert general, som ber Team Scorpion om hjelp, overbevist om at en diktator i Afrika har funnet et masseødeleggelsesvåpen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Da Bomb
programme.desc: Team Scorpion har i oppgave å hjelpe NASAs topphemmelige rakettoppskyting, men de må sabotere sitt eget oppdrag når Walters date fra forrige kveld har en bombe festet til brystet hennes.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Fractured
programme.desc: Etter at et kraftig jordskjelv rammer Los Angeles, må Team Scorpion fikse en fastklemt gassledning for å forhindre en massiv eksplosjon.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Adaptation
programme.desc: Mens Team Scorpion jobber for å stoppe en tilstrømning av narkotika som blir smuglet inn i landet via droner, gir Walter Happy og Toby et ultimatum for deres nye forhold.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Fast and the Nerdiest
programme.desc: Teamet må infiltrere en eksklusiv bilsmuglingsoperasjon som er i ferd med å sende biovåpen til Sør-Amerika.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 501
programme.desc: Louise og Jonas fra Viborg drømmer stort, men drømmen faller i bakken med et brak. Ekspertene må jobbe hardt før den lille familien - forhåpentligvis - kan flytte inn i drømmehuset.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 502
programme.desc: Anita og Martins to barn har tatt over hjemmet, og det er leker overalt. Løsningen er et større hjem, men paret har ikke klart å finne det rette huset enda. Nå får de hjelp av ekspertene, men det blir ikke lett.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 503
programme.desc: Tina og Danni solgte rekkehuset sitt i den tro at de snart skulle finne det rette huset. Men sånn gikk det ikke. Paret er utrolig kresne, og har høye krav. Kan ekspertene skape hjemmet som Tina og Danni drømmer om?

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 504
programme.desc: Laura og Jesper og Jespers to barn leier i Humlebæk, og de er mildt sagt lei av det. De mangler plass, hage - og de vil også ha barn sammen snart. Men to års husjakt har ikke gitt resultat.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO
programme.desc: Kristian drømmer om en diger garasje, og Nathja vil heller bli i Køge – kan Tobias oppfylle drømmene sine?

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO
programme.desc: Maja og Kenneth bor på Vestjylland og drømmer om å komme nærmere familien til Maja i Silkeborg. Men budsjettet deres krever at de går på akkord med beliggenheten og ser i de nærliggende små byene.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 604
programme.desc: Stine og Daniel lengter etter mer plass før de snart utvider familien fra tre til fire. Derfor er det ikke optimalt når Mads ringer og forteller at avtalen med det nye huset deres i Langå ikke gjelder.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 301
programme.desc: Astrid og Steffen skal kjøpe sitt første hus, men de kan ikke gå på kompromiss med ønskene sine. De møter programmets eksperter som skal kjøpe et hus på deres vegne.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Buying Blind Denmark NO: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: North Denmark
programme.desc: North Jutland has a rich culinary history. The unique conditions have created equally unique products. Tareq meets local food entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever changing environment and putting this region on the culinary map.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Uppsala
programme.desc: Uppsala is the city of knowledge: home to the oldest university in Scandinavia. It’s a wonderful agricultural area surrounded by fertile flatlands. Tareq discovers the historical treasures of Uppsala and its thriving culinary life.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: North Sealand
programme.desc: North Zealand has been a playground of the rich and famous since the fifteenth century. Tareq learns how this beautiful north eastern part of Denmark is the perfect place to go foraging for wild berries and herbs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Åre
programme.desc: Sweden’s largest ski resort Åre is well known for its local ingredients, boasting the highest number of organic food producers per capita in Sweden. The fresh water and clean air create unique conditions for growing excellent food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: The Danish Lakelands
programme.desc: The Danish Lakelands produce some of the finest ingredients that you can find. Tareq has a go at an old cooking technique from New Zealand called Hangi - using heated rocks buried in a pit oven.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: West Sweden
programme.desc: Gothenburg on the west coast of Sweden has recently been discovered as an exciting destination by both international travel journalists and food bloggers. Tareq tracks down an old army barracks which has been converted into a world class cheese factory.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Luleå
programme.desc: Tareq visits Luleå, home to the beautiful Tree Hotel: a collection of treehouses built by an award winning architect. Following the river further up into the mountains he reaches the land where, for centuries, the Sami people kept their reindeer herds.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Halmstad
programme.desc: In Halmstad Tareq explores the contrast between the busy summer scene at the beach and the quiet rural country life, meeting Jörgen Persson: award winning table tennis player and visiting a village famous for its cheese.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Kemi
programme.desc: Kemi is situated in northern Finland by the Bothnian Bay and it is part of Lapland region. Tareq tries his luck at a spot of burbot fishing on the frozen sea and visits the snow castle hotel.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: West Sweden
programme.desc: Situated on the west coast of Sweden, Bohuslän is a place where you can really feel the history of fishing all around a tradition that is still active. Tareq will be harvesting supreme quality oysters and lobsters and cook some wonderful seafood dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Florø
programme.desc: Tareq visits Norway and Florø to celebrate their national day -17th of May. Surrounded by breathtaking archipelagos and stunning fjords he dives for scallops in the north sea, cooking at mountain peaks and exploring the history of norwegian salmon

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Estonia
programme.desc: Tareq makes his way across the baltic sea to Estonia and the capital Tallinn. He discovers the historical treasures of the city and its thriving culinary life before he heads out into the vast and beautiful countryside and the national park of Soomaa.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Ringkøbing
programme.desc: Ringkøbing, a lovely old market town located at the west coast of Denmark. Here, Tareq visit a traditional Herring Festival and meets up with local entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever-changing environment.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Falkenberg
programme.desc: Something is definitely happening in Falkenberg on the west coast of Sweden. Over the last couple of years it have become somewhat of a haven for foodies. Tareq is on a mission; taking him through a fertile landscape with vineyards and salmon fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Öland
programme.desc: Tareq bikes through the unique landscape of Öland, Sweden's second largest island located in the Baltic Sea. It is a place where the interaction between man and nature have created a diverse and rich farmland with an amazing amount of small producers.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Bornholm
programme.desc: Bornholm, the sunny bright green island with it’s own gastronomic tone is a true pioneer when it comes to local food at it’s finest quality. Tareq visit Denmark's first regional food culture house where they develop this unique flourishing cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Laponia
programme.desc: In the northern part of Sweden, you’ll find the stunning world heritage Laponia. Almost 10.000 square kilometres of nature reserves and national parks. Tareq visit the rich, unique culture of the sami in the vast impressive wilderness.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Malmö & Copenhagen
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor returns to his home turf to see what has happened and what the future might bring to the new nordic cuisine. He visits a local goat farmer and meets up with young enthusiastic chefs who takes this nordic legacy further.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Zealand
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor visits the South Coast of Denmark to make his own versions of open-faced sandwiches and smoked fish dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Dalsland
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor puts on his hiking boots and explores the pilgrim trail of Dalsland in West Sweden. This episode will include outdoor cooking, foraging and beaver safari.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Lolland
programme.desc: When Michelin star chefs move from Copenhagen to the countryside, they often end up in Lolland/Falster. Here Tareq will meet Claus Meyer the father of new nordic cuisine and other entrepreneurs that opened interesting restaurants here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Skåne
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor explores his own backyard of Skåne and hometown of Malmö, a multi cultural food mix. Here you can find food and culture from all over the world that makes it a unique culinary destination.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Best Of
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor looks back on some of the food adventures he has been part of in the program series Nordic Cookery. Tareq promises delicacies from all over the Nordics and meetings with fantastic people along the way.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Läckö & Kinnekulle
programme.desc: By Lake Vänern you find Läckö and Kinnekulle, an area rich in history, culture and traditions. Tareq cooks exciting dishes on vendice roe, fish and local cheeses - all served on porcelain from the world-famous Rörstrand.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Sjuhärad
programme.desc: Sjuhärad is nature and culture in perfect symbiosis. Tareq takes the bike to meet some of the food entrepreneurs in the area who have started exciting new businesses. Here you live close to nature, forest and lakes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Greater Copenhagen
programme.desc: Copenhagen and Skåne are a hot food destinations. Tareq visits Østergro, Denmark's first "rooftop farm" in the middle of Copenhagen, Eden in the new district Hyllie, Malmö and Häckeberga Castle where there will be wild boar for dinner.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery: Höganäs
programme.desc: The wild coast at Kullaberg in Skåne has a lot of culture and gastronomy to offer. Fantastic ceramics, vineyards and world-class ice cream. Tareq visits VikenTomater and cooks vegetarian ragù

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a rap star, the team uncovers a conspiracy of embezzlement and bribery which may be connected to his death. Meanwhile, Charlie prepares to meet Amita's parents for the first time.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and Charlie find themselves in conflict over their differing beliefs as they investigate a case involving national security. Meanwhile, Megan faces a crisis of conscience and leaves the team, on the fourth season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team hunt down the killers of two rock climbers in possession of a stolen diamond, while Charlie decides if he should get his FBI clearance reinstated and a new agent joins the team, on the fifth season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team investigates a pattern of increased ATM kidnappings when a woman who was abducted and forced to withdraw random amounts of money from her ATM is murdered. Also, Charlie meets the man who will decide the fate of his FBI security clearance.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When eight people, including two police officers, are executed in a coffee shop, an LAPD detective gets the team on the case, and they uncover a trail of blackmail, romance and corruption. Also, McGowan's investigation of Charlie and Don deepens.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a passenger train collides with a freight train carrying toxic chemicals, Don, Charlie and the team begin to investigate if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team are called in to help a veteran FBI agent track down a con man who has eluded him for years. Also, Agent McGowan hands down his decision on Charlie's security clearance and Don's future with the FBI.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team hunts a crew stealing high-end goods from a shipping service and looks to an employee with savant-like abilities to lead them to those behind the scheme. Also, when one of Don's men is killed on duty, he questions his faith in the FBI.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While on a date, David catches a disappearing act at a magic show but quickly becomes involved in the performance when the magician really vanishes.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When the death of a family friend is ruled an accident, Don and Charlie investigate, only to make a startling discovery.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The bombing of an influential charity's headquarters forces the team to sift through various rumors about the true reach of the organization's power.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a vigilante group goes after a known criminal mastermind, Charlie is forced to turn to his rival for help. Also, Don wrestles with his emotions towards embracing religion.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don looks toward his newly found religious beliefs to help him contend with an escaped criminal bent on revenge.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team has only four hours to stop a group of hijackers who take a bus full of Hollywood tourists hostage.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A feud between rival Chinese gangs leads to the kidnapping of an undercover agent and the re-appearance of the enigmatic Samuel Kraft.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A stolen pair of "kicks" leads the team into the world of sneaker collecting after a foreign Ambassador finds his prized pair missing.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When Robin's seemingly strong case against a weapons smuggler falls apart, the team decides to look into the jury who heard the case.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: To stop a new drug from hitting the streets, Charlie devises a plan that could put Liz in harm's way.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When a super computer is the prime suspect in the death of cutting-edge scientist, the team must use new means to crack the case. Meanwhile, Charlie weighs a compelling job offer.

programme.title: Blue Hawaii
programme.desc: Moren hans (Angela Lansbury) forventer at han skal stige på firmastigen. Men Elvis vil heller kle seg i Hawaii-skjorte enn dress, så han reiser for å jobbe som turistguide. Elvis er heldig: de første kundene hans er en bil full av søtinger.

programme.title: Brazil
programme.desc: En dagdrømmende byråkrat roter seg borti en superhelt og envakker, mystisk kvinne, og blir offer for sine egne romantiskeillusjoner. Med Jonathan Pryce, Robert DeNiro, Michael Palinog Bob Hoskins.

programme.title: Tokyo Fist
programme.desc: Forretningsmannen Tsuda møter barndomsvennen Tajuki, som er blitt semiprofesjonell bokser. Tsuda mistenker snart at hans forlovede er utro med Tajuki, og etter en krangel trener han hardt til en voldsom og blodig konfrontasjon.

programme.title: Tetsuo II: Body Hammer
programme.desc: Tre år etter Metal Fetisjistens forvandling ser kontorarbeideren Taniguchi Tomoo verden falle sammen når skinheads kidnapper sønnen hans. Tvunget til å frigjøre sin destruktive kraft, forvandles han til en grusom symbiose av metall og vev.

programme.title: Meatballs
programme.desc: Bill Murray spiller Tripper Harrison, sjefsveileder på Camp North Star. Det blir underholdende når han, og den skandaløse gjengen hans av leirveiledere, har det for seg å bryte alle regler i boka.

programme.title: Welcome to Collinwood
programme.desc: Cosimo får en plan for en kjempejobb av sin cellekamerat. Han ber kvinnen sin om å finne en patsy for tyveriet av bilen hans, og tilbyr 15 000 dollar. Plutselig er 7 involvert.

programme.title: A Breath Of Scandal
programme.desc: Beautiful Sophia Loren is the Austrian princess who, despite her exile from the familial estate scorns her mother's wish to marry a prince.

programme.title: Murder!
programme.desc: En jurymedlem i en mordrettssak stemmer for å dømme, mens de andre jurymedlemmene har andre tanker og begynner å etterforske på egenhånd før henrettelsen.

programme.title: Hercules in New York
programme.desc: Bannlyst fra Olympus, blir Hercules (Arnold Schwarzenegger) sendt til Jorden, hvor han finner ekte kjærlighet og starter en lysende karriere som kroppsbygger.

programme.title: Wim Wenders Collection: Wings of Desire aka Der Himmel über Berlin
programme.desc: En høyt lovprist og prisbelønnet film, som blant annet fikk prisen for beste regi i Cannes i 1987. Damiel er en ensom engel som streifer omkring i Berlins krigsmerkede gater og trøster dødelige i nød.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Homicidal Ham
programme.desc: Sams nyskilte venn prøver å komme mellom ham og Diane.

programme.title: Cheers NO: How Do I Love Thee?...Let Me Call You Back
programme.desc: "Coach" viser temperament når han trener et juniorlag.
programme.sub-title: How Do I Love Thee?...Let Me Call You Back

programme.title: Cheers NO: I'll Be Seeing You, Part 1
programme.desc: Dick Cavett besøker Cheers og foreslår at Sam publiserer sine egne skriverier.

programme.title: Cheers NO: I'll Be Seeing You, Part 2
programme.desc: Sam forteller til slutt Diane at han elsker henne, men det blir ikke som han hadde tenkt.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Just Three Friends
programme.desc: Dianes gode venn flytter til byen og legger an på Sam.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Little Sister, Don't Cha
programme.desc: Kramer inkluderer Cheers i testamentet når han får en dyster prognose.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Manager Coach
programme.desc: Carla dukker opp i ektemannens bryllup med Sam som date.

programme.title: Cheers NO: No Help Wanted
programme.desc: Sam angrer på å ha ansatt Norm til fikse skatt og selvangivelse.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Norman's Conquest
programme.desc: Diane og Sam prøver å få Coach vekk fra ryggen ved å arrangere en dobbeldate.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Old Flames
programme.desc: Cliff stikker når en kunde vil begynne å slåss.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Personal Business
programme.desc: Coach bringer lykke til Cheers når han kjøper en antikk vekt.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Power Play
programme.desc: Diane forbyr Sam å gå på en årlig skitur med kompisene.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Snow Job
programme.desc: Coach blir såret når han får vite at hans avdøde venn en gang forsøkte seg på kona hans.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Sumner's Return
programme.desc: Norm prøver å bevise sin mannlighet når hans nye klient gjør fremskritt.

programme.title: Cheers NO: They Called Me Mayday
programme.desc: Sam ønsker fred, og ansetter en strålende kunstner til å male Diane.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Where There's a Will
programme.desc: Diane forsvarer forholdet til Sam til en baktalende kunstner.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Rebound: Part 1
programme.desc: I kjølvannet av den eksplosive separasjonen, har Sam falt av vognen og gått tilbake til playboy-livet, mens Diane nettopp har kommet tilbake fra en selvpålagt hvile på Golden Brook Sanitarium.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Rebound: Part 2
programme.desc: Etter flere økter med Dr. Frasier Crane, får Sam livet i orden igjen. Diane føler at det er på tide å fortelle ham sannheten om forholdet med psykiateren.

programme.title: Cheers NO: I Call Your Name
programme.desc: Sam fryder seg når han får grunn til å tro at Diane fremdeles er forelsket i ham.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Fairy Tales Can Come True
programme.desc: Frasier ber Sam om å ta med Diane til et arrangement mens han er borte fra byen.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Sam Turns the Other Cheek
programme.desc: Sam høster konsekvensene av å bli involvert med en gift kvinne.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Coach in Love: Part 1
programme.desc: Coach foreslår ekteskap når han forelsker seg ved første blikk.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Coach in Love: Part 2
programme.desc: Sam og Diane prøver å få Coach til legge vekk gifteplanene.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Diane Meets Mom
programme.desc: Moren til Frasier truer Diane på livet når de møtes for første gang.

programme.title: Cheers NO: An American Family
programme.desc: Carlas eksmann kommer tilbake med sin nye brud og krever omsorgen for deres eldste sønn. Den normalt sprø Carla sjokkerer alle i baren når hun godtar forespørselen.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Diane's Allergy
programme.desc: Etter å ha flyttet inn hos Frasier, utvikler Diane en kronisk allergi og tror at hans elskede hund, Pavlov, er årsaken.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Peterson Crusoe
programme.desc: Norm bestemmer seg for å leve livet fullt ut når han får de medisinske prøveresultatene.

programme.title: Cheers NO: A Ditch in Time
programme.desc: I baren får Sams uskyldige flørt med en attraktiv kunde, Amanda, ham i trøbbel når han ikke skjønner at hun er medlem av Dianes terapigruppe.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Whodunit?
programme.desc: Carla vinner favør og beundring fra Frasiers anerkjente mentor.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Heart Is a Lonely Snipehunter
programme.desc: Gutta gjennomfører en grusom spøk på Frasier mens de er på fisketur.
programme.sub-title: The Heart Is a Lonely Snipehunter

programme.title: Cheers NO: King of the Hill
programme.desc: Sam melder seg frivillig til å spille en veldedighetskamp mot Playboy Playmates.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Sam kommer tilbake til skolen for å få vitnemålet sitt.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Mail Goes to Jail
programme.desc: Norm setter Cliffs jobb i fare når han tar over jobben for én dag.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Bar Bet
programme.desc: Et gammelt veddemål tvinger Sam til å velge mellom å gifte seg eller miste Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Behind Every Great Man
programme.desc: En skarp journalist besøker Cheers, men mister interessen pga. Sams arroganse.

programme.title: COPS: An Innocent Gardener
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle that struck a police car. Two men deny the lawnmower in their truck was stolen. Deputies are called when a mother attempts to run her daughter over.

programme.title: COPS: Penalty Box
programme.desc: A man sneaking away from a bar fight clams he was chased by a truck. Deputies are called when a woman assaults people at a skating rink. A drunk man abandons his truck on train tracks.

programme.title: COPS: Pup and Rescue
programme.desc: A driver denies ownership of what police find in his car. Police conduct a narcotics sting that nets several arrests. A deputy removes a pooch from the scene of an accident.

programme.title: COPS: Undercover Blues
programme.desc: Police work a sting that targets drug dealers. An undercover sting uncovers narcotics trafficking. Police respond to a burglary in progress and discover a flop house.

programme.title: COPS: Multiple Identities
programme.desc: Officers recover a baggie of drugs from a crying suspect. A drunk woman hides a second ID in her back pocket. Police stop a vehicle that hit a patrol car.

programme.title: COPS: Donut Pursuit
programme.desc: Officers pursue a truck after a donut shop robbery. Deputies are dispatched when a wife attacks her husband with an unknown object. Deputies respond to a mother and son knife fight.

programme.title: COPS: Kick the Car
programme.desc: Officers intervene when an estranged husband kicks his ex-wife's boyfriend's car. A man claims someone gave him the car he is driving. A woman claims the pills in her purse are not hers.

programme.title: COPS: Maybe it's Sugar
programme.desc: Police conduct a sting operation. A woman is covered in white powder during a traffic stop. Officers spot a young boy on a bike who wandered away from home.

programme.title: COPS: Not a Momma's Boy
programme.desc: Officers are called to fight between a mother and her son. Officers respond to a man on a trolley hurling racial slurs at a passenger. A traffic stop uncovers narcotics in a young man's trunk.

programme.title: COPS: All Aboard!
programme.desc: Officers pursue a truck driving backwards on a freeway. A suspect jumps a train to evade police. A woman claims to be disabled when a pill falls from her pocket.

programme.title: COPS: To the Lighthouse
programme.desc: Officers are called to a restaurant after the owner was held at gunpoint. Police respond to a woman being sexually harassed in a park. A drunk man tells police he is going to buy a lighthouse.

programme.title: COPS: Get a Room
programme.desc: A man claims to be protecting the car he broke into. Officers are called to when a couple gets too friendly while out in public. Police are dispatched when a drunk woman pounds on her neighbor's door.

programme.title: COPS: Connect Four
programme.desc: Deputies assist border patrol in pursuit of a vehicle that has blown both a checkpoint and its tires. A drunk woman is pulled over not knowing she is missing a tire.

programme.title: COPS: When Ya Gotta Go
programme.desc: A man urinating in public flees from police on foot. A handgun is found in the vehicle of a driver who claims to be a student leaving class. Deputies find drugs in a man's car.

programme.title: COPS: I Always pay my Debts
programme.desc: A man tries to bite an officer after he was spotted with narcotics. Officers respond to a family fighting in their front yard. A man claims he was just paying someone back when he tried to buy drugs.

programme.title: COPS: Skipping Rocks
programme.desc: A man who ran from police complains that he was not read his rights. Officers detain kids who threw rocks at windowfronts. A paranoid man claims he is being chased by drug dealers.

programme.title: COPS: Tow Time
programme.desc: Police conduct a high-speed chase on a car with a missing tire. Police respond to a tow truck driver being assaulted. Police are called when a relative attacks a woman's husband.

programme.title: COPS: Borderlands
programme.desc: Officers attempt to detain undocumented border crossers. Border patrol discovers a driver with a load of drugs in his car. Officers check passports and a suspicious-looking laptop.

programme.title: COPS: Visiting Hours Twofer
programme.desc: Police respond to a report of prostitution in a hospital parking lot. A man and woman engaged in solicitation are pulled over. A woman in an area known for prostitution tries to evade police.

programme.title: COPS: Ignorance is an Excuse
programme.desc: Two men engage in a fist fight on the street over an alleged robbery. A couple claim that they didn't know the car they are driving was stolen.

programme.title: COPS: Checked Luggage
programme.desc: Agents of the US Customs and Border Protection pursue a vehicle. Border agents spot two undocumented people. Airport Customs detains a man when agents suspect he might be carrying more than luggage.

programme.title: COPS: Uncomfortable Shoes
programme.desc: A driver takes police on a neighborhood chase. Officers are called to capture a 12-foot python hiding outside a home. Officers suspect a motorist with a funny walk is hiding something up his shoe.

programme.title: COPS: In-Law Problems
programme.desc: US Marshals are tasked with finding a young boy that has been kidnapped for ransom. A man suspected of dealing contraband is turned in by his ex-girlfriends mother.

programme.title: COPS: Set Some Boundaries
programme.desc: A couple gets into a fight with their in-laws when they attempt to take their baby on a 3am drive. A man is attacked by his roommate after he gets 'too friendly' with a woman in the home.

programme.title: COPS: Invisible Intruders
programme.desc: A homeowner shoots at intruders only he can see. The driver of a stolen truck claims he's just trying to return the vehicle.. A argument about parenting styles turns ugly when a gun is pulled.

programme.title: COPS: Dance Fighting
programme.desc: A dispute inside a nightclub turns into a street fight. A man patrols his neighborhood 'Old West' style. A K-9 unit is called in to track a burglar on the run.

programme.title: COPS: Do Not Disturb
programme.desc: A prostitute tries to outrun the police during a foot chase. A man claims he can only meet women at motels since he lives with his mom.

programme.title: COPS: Tree Hugging
programme.desc: An ex-felon threatens to kill his spouse after she announces she want to divorce him. A driver has suspicious plants in her car. A woman crashes her friends truck into a pedestrian and a tree.

programme.title: COPS: Crawling to Vegas
programme.desc: A driver leads police on a slow speed chase towards Las Vegas. Three people are suspected of using contraband. A multi-neighbor dispute devolves into a fight involving guns and bats.

programme.title: COPS: First Do No Harm
programme.desc: A suicidal man tries to taunt police into shooting him. Undercover officers bust up an illegal operation at a pain management clinic. A woman claims she's just a bystander to a motorcycle hit and run.

programme.title: COPS: Safe Cracking
programme.desc: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he's selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home.

programme.title: COPS: High Jump Fail
programme.desc: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. An intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he's not trying to run away.

programme.title: COPS: Bumming a Smoke
programme.desc: A runaway motorcycle tries to elude officers by driving on a rough road. An argument over a cigarette turns ugly. Kids throw rocks from an overpass at the wrong car.

programme.title: COPS: Neighborhood Rage
programme.desc: A suspect ditches his bike when stopped and tries to outrun the police. Neighbors fight out a road rage incident with rocks and a baseball bat.

programme.title: COPS: My Bills Won't Wait
programme.desc: A suspect calls the police and states that he wants to kill himself and any officer who tries to help him. None of the three occupants of a stopped car will admit to ownership of a bag of drugs.

programme.title: COPS: Family Therapy
programme.desc: Officers are flagged down and alerted to a group of armed men assaulting people at a nearby home. A fight between a father and his adult son takes a dark turn.

programme.title: COPS: Spiked but Still Moving
programme.desc: A suspect refuses to stop his vehicle even after the officers spike his tires. A dispute over money results in a pregnant woman being attacked.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: Etter en episk kamp mot borgene (cybernetisk forsterkede livsformer), følger kaptein Picard og hans besetning borgene tilbake til 2000-tallet for å hindre at de endrer jordens tidslinje og den første utenomjordiske kontakten.

programme.title: Star Trek IX: Insurrection
programme.desc: Når mannskapet på Enterprise får vite om føderasjonens plott mot innbyggerne av en unik planet, starter kaptein Picard et åpent opprør.

programme.title: Star Trek: Nemesis
programme.desc: Sett kursen mot en galakse med enestående action og eventyr når kaptein Jean-Luc Picard (Patrick Stewart) og hans Starship-mannskap kjempet mot en farlig motstander... Som har en overraskende kobling til Picard!

programme.title: Star Trek I: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: Når et uidentifisert romvesen ødelegger tre kraftfulle Klingon-kryssere, vender kaptein James T. Kirk (William Shatner) tilbake til det nylig ombyggede U.S.S. Enterprise(tm) for å ta kommandoen.

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: Det er 2200-tallet. Føderasjonens U.S.S. Enterprise er på et treningsoppdrag og det virker som om admiral James T. Kirk (William Shatner) er resignert på at inspeksjonen kan bli den siste romferden i sin karriere. Men Khan er tilbake.

programme.title: Star Trek 3 - Jakten På Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirks seier over Khan og dannelsen av Genesis-planeten er tomme seiere. Spock er død og McCoy drives uforklarlig mot galskap. Så gir et overraskelsesbesøk fra Sarek, Spocks far, en forbløffende avsløring.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Mannskapet på Federation-skipet Enterprise tilkalles til Nimbus III, Planeten for intergalaktisk fred. De skal forhandle over en bortføring, men får vite at kidnapperen er en slektning av Spock.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: Etter årevis med krig, nærmer Federation og Klingon-imperiet seg en fredssamling når et Klingon-skip nesten blir ødelagt i et tilsynelatende angrep fra Enterprise. Begge verdener forbereder seg på det som kan bli deres dødeligste møte så langt.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Four Lovers For One Crime: The Joël Deprez Affair
programme.desc: On February 5, 2000, two hunters discover a charred body on the banks of the Oise.
programme.sub-title: Four Lovers For One Crime: The Joël Deprez Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Émilie Godest Case
programme.desc: On November 9th 2007, around 11:30PM, aid arrives on the scene of an accident at the exit of Chateney-en-France.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Ordeal of Schoolgirl (Perrais case)
programme.desc: Laetitia Perrais, 18, a trainee hotel waitress, vanishes after evening service.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Ordeal of Schoolgirl (Perrais case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deadly Trap in the Forest - Christophe Belle
programme.desc: On March 19th 1998, Akira Ojima, a 57 years old japanese architect, is found dead in the fridge of a villa in Nanterre.
programme.sub-title: Deadly Trap in the Forest - Christophe Belle

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Priscillia Ciatti Case
programme.desc: The corpse of Priscillia Ciatti, 14, is discovered by the side of a field, a few hundred metres from her family home. The teenager has been stabbed sixty times with a knife and –an extra sordid detail – a devil mask is found next to her body.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murdered For a Fake Treasure - Troadec Case
programme.desc: On March 28th 2013, the burnt body of Anne Barbot, 38 years old, is discovered in a forest of Maine-et-Loire.
programme.sub-title: Murdered For a Fake Treasure - Troadec Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake
programme.desc: On January 4, 2006, Ruth Légeret was found dead in the middle of a pool of blood at her luxurious property in Vevey, Switzerland. Next to her was the lifeless body of her friend, Marina Studer. Who could have killed these two simple and wealthy widows?
programme.sub-title: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Willy Pomonti Case
programme.desc: Willy Pomonti, a retired architect, is found savagely murdered in his opulent villa in La Celle-Saint-Cloud, near Paris. It soon becomes clear that the man has been tortured prior to death.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)
programme.desc: On June 18, 2011, Marie-Jeanne Meyer, 17-years old, waved goodbye to her sister before leaving for her daily jog on the heights of Tournon in Ardèche. Three days later, her mutilated body was found in a freshly dug pit, near an area known to be cursed.
programme.sub-title: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Adeline Piet Case
programme.desc: A man walks into a gendarmerie near Saint-Malo to report that his wife has been missing since the previous day. The couple are going through a divorce, but this mother would never have left her seven children alone! What has happened to Adeline Piet?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)
programme.desc: On March 31, 2003, firefighters were called to a fire in a housing estate of Meyrargues, near Aix-en-Provence. On site, they discovered a horrific scene: the tortured and charred bodies of a mother and her daughter, Chantal and Audrey D'Amato.
programme.sub-title: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Dire Deception (Laurence Maille Case)
programme.desc: On November 28, 2007, Laurence Maille disappeared. It was her partner, John Zablevski, who alerted the Vimy police in Pas-de-Calais. He explained that the young woman had left in the morning for a walk with their dog and never returned.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Stabed In Her Bed: The Maureen Jaquier Case
programme.desc: On February 27, 2015, in Toulouse, the parents of 19-year-old Maureen Jacquier discover their daughter stabbed several times in her bed.
programme.sub-title: Stabed In Her Bed: The Maureen Jaquier Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot At Point-Blank: The Aurelie Barbot Affair
programme.desc: On December 20, 2012, in Val d'Izé (Ille-et-Vilaine), Aurélie Barbot, 29, was killed on her doorstep with a bullet to the head.
programme.sub-title: Shot At Point-Blank: The Aurelie Barbot Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)
programme.desc: Marc Van Beers, a 36-year old Brussels tax lawyer, dies in a road accident while on honeymoon. His wife Aurore is unharmed by the accident.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Laurence Dromard Case
programme.desc: Sylvain Dromard finds the body of his wife Laurence lying in a pool of blood in the kitchen. The crime was particularly violent and the theory of a burglary that went wrong is soon excluded. But investigators don't understand who could want her dead.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Jane, som ikke lenger har lyst på sex på grunn av de stygge brystene sine, og Julie, som misliker seg selv på grunn av de store arrene hun fikk etter en brystreduksjon.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 904
programme.desc: Jeannes bryster hindrer henne i å leve et normalt liv. Gitte skammer seg over beina og bruker enormt mye tid og energi på å skjule dem.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 308
programme.desc: Lizette sitter igjen med et knallhardt bryst etter en forstørrende operasjon, mens Diana går med voldsomme smerter etter en brystreduksjon. Begge håper de å få hjelp av de erfarne kirurgene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 503
programme.desc: Under sin siste fødsel gjennomgikk Sonja et akutt keisersnitt som, noe utradisjonelt, ble kuttet vertikalt på Sonjas mage. Sonjas navle ble kuttet opp, og resultatet er til en stor ulempe for henne.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 309
programme.desc: Ditte har brukt 120 000 kroner på å få større bryster - som er asymmetriske. Eva har fått utført en brystreduksjon, men føler seg nå mer maskulin enn feminin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 802
programme.desc: For første gang i programmets historie har både mor og datter havnet i et plastisk mareritt, og begge trenger hjelp.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Isabella, som fikk utført brystforstørring som 18-åring for å ligne Pamela Anderson, men som i dag sitter igjen med to steinharde kuler på brystkassen.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 104
programme.desc: Pernille får kick av å få utført plastisk kirurgi, men armene hennes er vansiret av store arr. Mille drømmer om at de feilopererte brystene hennes blir fiksa før bryllupet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 205
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi bl.a. Dianne, som fikk fjernet brystene grunnet mistanke om kreft, men som nå lever alene fordi hun føler seg utilpass, og Anette, som fikk foretatt en hudoperasjon i utlandet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Doris var med i en alvorlig bussulykke og i dag sliter hun med ekstreme bivirkninger av en operasjon som egentlig skulle ha reddet utseendet hennes etter ulykken.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 601
programme.desc: Charlotte fikk fjernet brystimplantatene sine på grunn av komplikasjoner. Etter det fikk hun en protese for å kompensere for størrelsen på brystene, men protesen er både ubehagelig og upraktisk.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 106
programme.desc: Vi møter fire personer som har gjort plastikkirugi som har fått ødeleggende konsekvenser: blant annet Lone som lever i frykt for at implantatene hennes er kreftfremkallende.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Jonna, som føler at magen hennes ligner et bombekrater etter en operasjon, og Christina, som har tre mislykkede operasjoner bak seg.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 703
programme.desc: Den tidligere burlesk-danseren Grethe måtte i 2011 fjerne begge brystene som en del av hennes behandling av brystkreft.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 101
programme.desc: I kveldens episode møter vi fire ofre for plastiskkirurgiske feiloperasjoner.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Siden puberteten, har Tascha vært lei av sine asymmetriske bryster og har hatt en brystoperasjon. Men Tascha fikk ikke symmetrien hun drømte om, og i dag skammer hun seg over brystene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 805
programme.desc: Som tenåring har Linette en skjev skillevegg i nesen som gir henne pustevansker. Som 21-åring får hun derfor tilbud om en neseoperasjon for å fikse problemet, men ender opp med en skjev nese.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 105
programme.desc: Sabine fant et tilbud på nettet, men måtte betale dyrt for å spare 50 prosent.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 608
programme.desc: I 2011 velger Sabina å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon. Men allerede et par dager etter operasjonen oppdager hun at brystene hennes henger.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 202
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Pernille, som føler seg fanget i sitt eget hjem, og Linda, som er så hemmet av et arr på magen at hun møter opp tidlig på jobb for å unngå å skifte med andre.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.
