programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Geordies React: S02E01
programme.desc: Geordie Shore-gjengen er tilbake for tre helt nye episoder av Geordies React! Guttene og jentene setter seg ned sammen med Charlotte, Holly og James for å se seg selv i serien og finne ut hva som skjedde på de uklare nettene!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Geordies React: Episode 202
programme.desc: Gjengen setter seg ned med hverandre for å se seg selv i serien for å huske de uklare nettene. I denne episoden blir Sams trekantsdrama alvor, Nathan viser sine ballferdigheter, og Chloe står igjen med regning for en veldig rotete natt!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Geordies React: Episode 203
programme.desc: Geordie Shore-gjengen er sammen med James, Holly og Abbies bestemor for en ny episode av The Geordies React! Finn ut hva de syns når de ser seg selv i serien. I denne episoden feirer Marnie bursdagen sin med karnivalfest.

programme.title: Geordie OGs: Their Story: Geordie OGs: Marnie's Story
programme.desc: Marnie Simpson ser tilbake på sitt liv og reisen fra Geordie Shores villbasse til heltidsmamma.

programme.title: Geordie OGs: Their Story: Geordie OGs: Holly's Story
programme.desc: Holly Hagan ser tilbake på sitt uvanlige liv. Fra å bli berømt på Geordie Shore til å drive kampanjer mot nettroll, og forlove seg med drømmemannen.

programme.title: Geordie OGs: Their Story: Geordie OGs: Aaron & Sophie's Story
programme.desc: Fra å jobbe på oljerigger til å feste verden rundt. Aaron forteller livshistorien sin. Mens Sophie forteller hvordan berømmelse endret livet hennes permanent og hvordan hun forlot festingen...nesten.

programme.title: Geordie OGs: Their Story: Geordie OGs: Gary's Story
programme.desc: Gary forteller historien om hans tidlige liv og overgangen fra maksimal gutt til heltidspappa.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Warm Welcome Home
programme.desc: Bli med en gjeng med gutter og jenter helt gira og klare for 6 ukers full fest i Newcastle. Det dreier seg om veltrente kropper og ville netter på jakt etter mulige klinemål. Har du først blitt Geordie, er det ingen vei tilbake.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: A Romantic Meal
programme.desc: Jay er klar over at han har tatt seg vann over hodet med Vicky, Charlotte står i mot framstøt fra Gaz, mens Sophie får sitt livs sjokk når foreldrene hennes dukker opp uanmeldt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Hello Holly's Boyfriend
programme.desc: Det er Jays bursdag og Vicky spiller pliktoppfyllende 'kjæreste', Hollys type kommer på besøk og Charlotte makter ikke å stå i mot Gaz lenger. 8 blir 7 når huset rystes av en sjokkerende avreise!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Where Is Holly?
programme.desc: Med Holly borte, blir atmosfæren i huset dårligere. Vicky & Jay går på dunken når 'ingen tafsing på andre'-regelen brytes. Gaz spiller på bortebane og en ny person forsøker å dra.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Vicky's Not Happy
programme.desc: Det er et sjokk for hele gjengen når Holly overraskende kommer tilbake til Geordie Shore-huset, men ikke før Jay og Gaz får sin tøffeste arbeidsoppgave i en 'Working Man's'- klubb og Anna driver Vicky for langt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: It's Getting Complicated Vicky
programme.desc: Det er ingen eventyrlig slutt på finalen i Geordie Shore. Charlotte får alvorlige nyheter fra Gaz, forholdet til Jay og Vicky gjennomgår et sjokkerende utbrudd og Holly havner i en parkeringsplasskrangel.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Season 1 Reunion
programme.desc: Russel Kane er vert og gjengen fra Geordie Shore møtes igjen sammen med venner, familie og et par overraskelser for å avsløre et par sannheter - og vi får samtaler med dem som elsket og hatet showet.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Magaluf Madness Part 1
programme.desc: Geordie Shore-gjengen drar til Magaluf for sommerferie. Gutta gjør raskt opp for tapt tid med damene, og spenningen eksploderer mellom Char og Gaz, noe som gir den største Geordie-skjæringen noensinne!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Magaluf Madness Part 2
programme.desc: Det er snarere Magaluf-galskap når Geordie Shore-gjengen kjemper med å komme overens. Charlotte og Vicky ser vaktsomt på mens Gary fortsetter å sjarmere damene. Holly knuser ved nok en våt t-skjorte konkurranse.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Geordie Shore's Best Bits
programme.desc: Vi har satt sammen ti av de råeste og mest minneverdige øyeblikkene fra serien, og har også med input fra kjendisfans som Tim Westwood og Harry fra TOWIE!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: New Additions
programme.desc: Endelig! Gaz, Vicki, Jay, James, Holly, Charlotte og Sophie er tilbake, sammen med noen nye ansikter, når vi nå drar tilbake til Geordie Shore for en ny, sjokkspekket serierunde.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: You Can't Help Your Feelings
programme.desc: Charlotte drives til bristepunktet når kvinnebedåreren Gaz fortsetter å forføre alt som går i skjørt. Rebeccas temperament øker når hun får konkurranse i å vinne en av guttas gunst.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: James Needs To Score
programme.desc: Huset har ikke tid til å sørge over Charlottes avreise da Vicky og Ricci sin nattlige spooning blir avbrutt av et uventet besøk. Samtidig er Gary og James raske til å få av seg utstyret!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Letter
programme.desc: Sammi finner det 'anonyme' brevet fra Snooki og Jenni, og nå er det virkelig slutt - i hvert fall en stund. Mike, Vinny og Pauly har hendene fulle med fire jenter på én kveld.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Not So Shore
programme.desc: Det anonyme brevet skaper spenning mellom jentene, og det ender i slåsskamp. Etter enda en natt med Vinny avslører Snooki en ikke så lite kjent 'hemmelighet'.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Sleeping with the Enemy
programme.desc: Gjengen må takle konsekvensene av jentenes krangel. Angelina dater Jose fra klubben, og Jenni og Snooki kler seg i hjemmelagde beskyttelsesdrakter for å rydde opp før Snookis date.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike truer med å fortelle Jose om Angelina og Vinny. Vinnys familie kommer på besøk. Og Vinny og Pauly finner drømmejentene, men en vil få knust hjertet sitt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Dirty Pad
programme.desc: Angelina er i trøbbel når gjengen får vite at hun lå med Jose etter en natt med Vin. Men den siste dråpen kommer når Mike oppdager flere ubehageligheter på badet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Gone, Baby, Gone
programme.desc: Mike gjenforens med sin kanadiske skjønnhet, til stor underholdning for hele huset. Angelina forteller gjengen hva hun syns om dem, noe som gjør Snooki rasende og får begeret til å flyte over.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Girls Like That
programme.desc: Vinny velger mellom to grupper jenter. Siden Angelina er borte vil Snooki at hun og Jenni skal skvære opp med Sam. Gleden blir kortvarig for Snooki, når Mike blir stadig mer fiendtlig.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Deja Vu All Over Again
programme.desc: Alle er frustrerte over Mike - han får gjengen sparket ut av en klubben, får bilen tauet vekk, brenner nesten ned huset og svikter Pauly. To ganger.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back into the Fold
programme.desc: Pauly og Vin har sine siste dater med Miami-jentene, mens Sam og Ron raskt havner i krangel. Jenni lager bråk mellom Pauly og Mike, og det blir en siste kveld full av drama i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back to the Shore
programme.desc: Gjengen er tilbake for enda en vill sommer på Jersey-kysten! Angelina er borte, og Snooki har med seg vennen Deena. Spenningen mellom jentene etter Miami eksploderer den første kvelden.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: It's Gonna Be an Interesting Summer
programme.desc: Konflikten mellom Sammi og JWoww skaper spenning i huset. Ronnie og Sammi isolerer seg og går glipp av første familiemiddag. Men når Ronnie bestemmer seg for å henge med resten av gjengen, føler Sammi seg helt alene.
programme.sub-title: It's Gonna Be an Interesting Summer

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Where's the Beach
programme.desc: Sammi vil slutte fred med Snooki og Deena. JWoww møter eksen Roger. Snooki blir arrestert for drikking på offentlig sted.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Snooki
programme.desc: Snooki er deprimert etter å ha blitt arrestert, helt til hun treffer en ny gutt. Deena treffer Ronnies stuntmann. JWoww og Tom slår opp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Drunk Punch Love
programme.desc: Ronnie og JWoww slutter fred, og Sammi slår til Ronnie. Vinny møter en jente med overlegen familie. Og Mike avslører Deenas lille hemmelighet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Should We Just Break Up?
programme.desc: Ronnies drikking gir smertefulle bivirkninger. Snooki treffer en gutt som kanskje eller kanskje ikke er forlovet. Pauly slutter fred med en gammel fiende.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Cabs Are Here!
programme.desc: Ronnie og Sammis stormfulle forhold er over. Ronnie ødelegger alt Sammi eier, og hun må bestemme seg for om hun skal forlate gjengen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 405
programme.desc: Følg Mike, Ronnie, Sammi, Vinny og Deena når de diskuterer starten på sesong fire - med all sin dramatikk og løsslupne humor. Få innsideinformasjon om Deenas ville sjekkinger og se gjengen gjenoppta krangelen som møtte veggen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 407
programme.desc: Det spisser seg til når Snooki, Jenni, Deena og Mike treffes for å diskutere Mikes påståtte beleiring av Snooki, for ikke å snakke om hva som skjedde mellom lakenene med Kjøttbollelaget.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 409
programme.desc: Bli med Snooki, Jenni, Pauly og Vinni når de snakker om de overraskende ettervirkningene av Jionnis store krangel med Snooki. Og du får en smugkikk på det som kommer resten av sesongen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 4 Reunion
programme.desc: Etter en sommer full av åpning og knusing av flasker, hjertesorg, 'lesbiotiske' kollisjoner og bilkollisjoner og drama som møter i veggen - gjenforenes gjengen for å åpne gamle sår og ta farvel med Firenze i dette eksplosive gjensynet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Hurricane Situation
programme.desc: Medboerne kommer hjem fra Italia, og gleder seg over å være tilbake. Men et drama er i emning idet Mike truer med å ødelegge Snookis forhold til Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Man Down
programme.desc: Vinny vurderer om han skal bli eller reise hjem til Staten Island. Snooki krangler med Jionni, og alle er tilbake til gamle takter: festing og sol.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Dropping Like Flies
programme.desc: Deltakerne sliter med å venne seg til livet uten Vinny, mens Mike konfronterer sine indre demoner. Men det er også Paulys bursdag, og han får sitt livs beste gave!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Vinny
programme.desc: Mike kommer tilbake, bare for å finne ut at Danny har truet med å finne nye medboere! Jentene leier strippere til Pauly og Mikes ville bursdagsfest, og deltakerne reiser til Staten Island for å kidnappe Vinny. Men vil han bli med dem?

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 502
programme.desc: Pappa Roine og Mattias laster høyballer – men plutselig stopper hjullasteren. Linda leverer drinker rundt i Stockholm – og benytter anledningen til å besøke forloveden Magnus. Piraten legger asfalt.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 503
programme.desc: Biltransportøren Robin må være ekstra forsiktig når han skal frakte en dyr Lincoln på lasteplanet! Det samme gjelder Micke som skal kjøre et dyrt spabad til Uddevalla.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 504
programme.desc: Tove kjører tømmer i Småland – og møter fans midt i skogen. Slamsugeren Magnus skal tømme et basseng på et renseanlegg. Kranfører Amanda er på et vindkraftverk på Gotland – men risikerer å miste båten.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 505
programme.desc: Elin sparker dagen i gang i Stockholm med komplisert lossing og tidspress. Tim kjører etsende last – og han må derfor være ekstra forsiktig på veiene. Peo sliter med containerne sine i Åre.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 506
programme.desc: Vi følger yrkessjåførene som jobber døgnet rundt for å levere forskjellige typer av varer over hele landet - og for å utføre viktige samfunnstiltak som holder Sverige i gang, fra nord til sør.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 507
programme.desc: Vi følger yrkessjåførene som jobber døgnet rundt for å levere forskjellige typer av varer over hele landet - og for å utføre viktige samfunnstiltak som holder Sverige i gang, fra nord til sør.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 508
programme.desc: Johannes skal levere brakker – men kaster ved et uhell nøklene på taket. Spesialtransportørene og ekteparet Anton og Angelica har en kjøretur sammen - til Norge. Emina kjører kjøtt i Skåne.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 701
programme.desc: I det nordlige vinterlandskapet må Anton stoppe transporten av et tungt toglokomotiv når tilhengeren går i stykker. Elin, en melkebilsjåfør, starter dagen rolig, helt til en melkeslange ryker og kaos oppstår.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 703
programme.desc: Kellys stressende dag blir verre når det viser seg at flere bedrifter holder stengt på grunn av ferien. Emina må rekke en fotballkamp, men det blir full stopp hos den første kunden da hun ikke kommer seg inn på lageret.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 705
programme.desc: Tove dekker opp for vikarer som har sommerferie og jobber derfor på dagtid. De nye arbeidstidene i det sommerlige Småland byr på andre problemer enn vanlig.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 706
programme.desc: Kranfører Carl har blitt bedt om å flytte en havnekran som veier nesten 200 tonn og er 33 meter høy. Men arbeidet må brått avbrytes fordi det er fare for at kranen kan velte når en del mangler.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 707
programme.desc: Mattias må hente kviger i Enköping og deretter hente en okse på Ljusterö, noe som ikke viser seg å være lett.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 708
programme.desc: I Stockholm har Max en tøff dag og sliter med å få med seg alle søppeldunkene som skal tømmes. Han gleder seg til den siste tømmingen for dagen.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 201
programme.desc: Simon fra Piteå har tatt over som administrerende direktør i transportfirmaet etter sin far Erik. Jörgen fra Höganäs må kjøre et 58 meter langt blad til en vindturbin og støter på utfordringer i svingene.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 202
programme.desc: Erik Lundman i Lundmans transportfirma sliter med en kloakktank, postbud Stephanie gjør en feil og taper tid under en hastetur, og spesialtransportør Jari får utrolig nok tre punkteringer.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 203
programme.desc: Jesper er bekymret for å komme for sent til avlastningen i Danmark. Tove får en dårlig start på dagen og krasjer med tømmerbilen sin. Og Jari havner i feil havn under lossing.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 204
programme.desc: Louise har en uvanlig tung forsendelse med to ismaskiner som skal fraktes til en ishockeybane utenfor Stockholm. Robin, som kjører biler verdt millioner, har en kjøretur med en veldig fin Cobra fra 1965.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 205
programme.desc: Familiebedriften Tösse wedins har en ny kunde som trenger den erfarne tømmerbilsjåføren og administrerende direktøren i selskapet, "Höna", til å kjøre en lastebil.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 301
programme.desc: Anton og broren transporterer en gravemaskin på den lokale "Dødens vei". Sam, en miljøarbeider, er opprørt over det moderne menneskets livsstil. Og Tove drar til en skog for å samle tømmer.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 302
programme.desc: I Hässleholm skal Jörgen kjøre en bro med en uvanlig form, der du virkelig må tenke på å løfte hvis du ikke vil at sikkerhetsanordningene skal svikte.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: On the way to their Palm Springs destination, the models make three pit stops where they will be challenged to take photos of themselves doing "random acts of modeling."
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Licks the Floor

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls race against the clock as they meet with various fashion designers for a chance to book actual modeling jobs.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models pack their bags and jet off to their new home in Jamaica, The Half Moon Resort, where they are greeted by Tyra and an entire ensemble of Jamaican performers.
programme.sub-title: The Girls Who Go To Jamaica

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: During their stay in Jamaica, the girls meet Bob Marley's daughter, Cedella Marley, who has designed a fashionable new line of bikinis.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Becomes Art For Tyra

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls are challenged to shoot a trial television commercial for the Jamaica Tourist Board, including writing their own script and starring in their own television spot while horse-back-riding in the ocean.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Freaks Out On Horseback

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The previously eliminated contestants return to join the finalists and their families for an unprecedented runway show that embraces all the beauty, culture, history and music of the island as the winner of America's Next Top Model: Cycle 19 is revealed.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Becomes America’s Next Top Model

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Freakout Behind-the-scenes confessions and catfights among the co-eds are revealed in the never-before-seen footage.
programme.sub-title: The Girl With The Best Top Model Freakout

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The competition heats up as "America's Next Top Model" returns, featuring male and female aspiring models competing for a career-launching prize package. The contestants participate in their first runway show and, during a photo shoot on the…
programme.sub-title: Meet The Guys & Girls of Cycle 20, Part 1

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The competition heats up as "America's Next Top Model" returns, featuring male and female aspiring models competing for a career-launching prize package. The contestants participate in their first runway show.
programme.sub-title: Meet The Guys & Girls of Cycle 20, Part 2

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models have to compete in a vertical runway down the side of a building in the pouring rain.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Gets Married Again

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models get a lesson in chemistry as they pose alongside sexy supermodels Alessandra Ambrossio and Rob Evans in a risque photo shoot.
programme.sub-title: The Guy Who Gets A Weave

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models have their balance tested when they have to walk on a spinning runway during a turntable challenge judged by the editor-in-chief of Nylon Magazine, Marvin Scott Jarrett.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Went Around In Circles

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tensions run high when some of the models accuse another of abusing her power in the house. The guys and girls act as fashion correspondents in a challenge led by celebrity blogger Perez Hilton.
programme.sub-title: The Guy Who Gets To Kiss The Girl

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The guys play a prank on one of the girls, which throws off her game. At a photoshoot where the models take on the nail art craze, things start to go badly when a few of the models who have become close get distracted after arguing.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who’s Scared Of Clowns

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: After a challenge has the models exploring the streets of Los Angeles in their underwear, one of the guys can't take the pressure and breaks down.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Two of the models get overly confident, but end up booking no runway shows, which shatters their self-confidence.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Whose Walk Is Too Good

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models get tested at a commercial shoot to do ridiculous requests with a fake director played by comedian Reggie Watts.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The guys and girls go to Bali, where they have to model swimwear while trying to walk under water and one of the guys suffers a panic attack.
programme.sub-title: The Guy Who Has A Panic Attack

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: While in Bali, the models embrace the culture during an outdoor photo shoot, where one model in particular has a bad attitude that affects his performance.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Who Gets Kissed On An Elephant

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: A workout challenge brings out the competitive side of the guys.
programme.sub-title: The Guy Who Becomes A Bat

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Radio Sweethearts / The Great Cornholio
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day. / During a sugar rush, Beavis' alter ego appears. He reeks havoc at Highland High looking for "teepee for his bunghole."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Murder Site / Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Beavis can't take Butt-head's verbal abuse anymore, and snaps while they're checking out the site of a local murder. / Beavis and Butt-head sue Kimberly for sexual harassment, since she's giving them wood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Ding-Dong-Ditch / Head lice / Nothing happening
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head have trouble with a prank / The duo try to cure their scratchy heads / A quiet day in Highland, Texas

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Cyber-Butt / Citizens arrest / Pierced
programme.desc: The school PC gets internet and Stewart helps out friends surf the net / An armed robbery has hilarious consequence / Beavis and Butt-Head get beaten up and inspired to get their ears pierced

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bus trip / Green thumbs
programme.desc: The class goes on a roadtrip / Beavis and Butt dabble into counterfeit money using a photocopier

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Meet God
programme.desc: Innocent, naive yougsters Beavis & Butt-head are drawn into an insidious religious cult.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: 1-900-BEAVIS / Water Safety
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to start their own phone service / Beavis and Butt-head learn CPR from Mr. Buzzcut

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Take a number / Stewart moves away / Premature evacuation
programme.desc: The duo goes to rock concert / Beavis and Butt-Head breaks into Stewarts house to watch TV / A bomb threat is called into their high school
programme.sub-title: Take a number / Stewart moves away / Premature evacuation

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Friday Night / Tornado
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head spend Friday night at the local convenience store. / Beavis & Butt-head in their own mini-disaster movie with new friends Lolita and Tanqueray.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head pass all their Rorscach tests. / Beavis and Butt-head inadvertently stop a suicide.
programme.sub-title: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den nye fienden / Dobbelgjengeren
programme.desc: Vaskebjørner stjeler Beavis og Butt-Heads nachos, og guttene slår tilbake./ Beavis forveksler en fremmed med Butthead, og kan ikke bli kvitt ham.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Bokset inne / Birøktere
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head fanges i en pappeske mens de prøver å gjemme seg på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å sanke honning fra et vepsebol.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday
programme.desc: The show parodies Leave It to Beaver / The duo needs to go to a hospital / Beavis cries and is mocked unrelentlessly / Highland experiences a toxic gas leak
programme.sub-title: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bathroom Break / The Rat
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head decide to devote as much of their time at work as possible to bathroom breaks. / A fool and his nachos are soon parted... by a rat? A rat takes up residence and they stop at nothing.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head take woodworking class / Stevensons get a sattelite dish / An unopened can puts our duo to new adventures / Beavis and Butt-Head form a band called Metallica
programme.sub-title: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Buy Beer / Just For Girls
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get drunk off non-alcoholic beer and fail a sobriety test. / Beavis and Butt-head are allowed to watch a film for girls about teen pregnancy. The titillation ends abruptly during the birthing sequence.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head crash a wedding in hopes of making out with the bride. / Beavis and Butt-head find a dead animal and try to sell its fur. But Beavis soon becomes attached to the lifeless creature.
programme.sub-title: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Det farligste spillet / Beinjegerne
programme.desc: For å hindre den andre i å legge hånden i en bolle varmtvann så man tisser i buksa, holder guttene seg våkne i flere dager./ Beavis og Butt-Head bygger et dinosaurskjelett av bein fra en BBQ.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head become ace bounty hunters after a chance meeting with a reality TV. / With a big test looming, our favorite idiots receive an education in cheating. / Beavis and Butt-Head find themselves trapped in an elevator with a smokin hot chick
programme.sub-title: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Oil Change / Whiplash
programme.desc: After being instructed to change the oil in the fryer at Burger World, Beavis and Butt-head get the oil from a local gas station. / In an attempt to collect some big insurance money, Butt-head tries to give Beavis a whiplash injury while riding the school

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Candy Sale / To the Rescue
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head sell chocalate bars for their school. Well, the chocolate bars practically sell themselves. / Beavis and Butt-head witness a plane crash and appear in a cheesy reenactment on "Rescue 911."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery
programme.desc: The school closes and makes the best day / Butt-Head phones in a mail-order bride / Burger World launches a home delivery service
programme.sub-title: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Stewart is Missing / Yard Sale
programme.desc: Mrs. Stevenson shows up at Butt-head's house, desperate to enlist their help in finding Stewart. / Tom Anderson get Beavis and Butt-head to watch his yard sale, and the boys manage to sell everything when they take the sale inside.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Tainted Meat / Bad Dog
programme.desc: Beavis and his bacteria ridden "thingy" contaminate the food at Burger World. / Beavis and Butt-head adopt a vicious dog at a shelter and it trains them.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Crisis line / Career day
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head set out to support callers on a crisis line / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head come to the aid of a wounded baby bird...almost. / Beavis and Butt-head show up at an AA meeting hoping to score some booze.
programme.sub-title: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nektet service / Balleskvis
programme.desc: Beavis prøver yogabukser og får dem ikke av. / Guttene oppdager at de har rett til å nekte service til kunder på Burger World.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to stay awake all night, in an attempt to discover the secret behind morning wood. / For his oral report on an historical figure, Beavis recounts the valuable lessons he learned one night while eating at Burger World.
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: En spirituell reise
programme.desc: Beavis ser ansiktet til Jesus i en nacho-chips. Det sender ham på en episk reise for å finne svar på det store spørsmålet - "Hvorfor får jeg aldri pult?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Nose Bleed / Vaya Con Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head tries some sadistic home remedies in an attempt to stop Beavis's nosebleed. / When Beavis turns into Cornholio in Burger World, Immigration Officials take him in as a possible illegal alien and try to make sense of his gibberish.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head explore the career possibilities in selling blood. / While causing mischief at a drive-in movie theatre, Beavis & Butt-head experience a new phase of the moon.
programme.sub-title: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)
programme.desc: Suffering from nasty colds, Beavis & Butt-head visit a doctor in hopes of glomming a prescription remedy. / Beavis & Butt-head's school assignment is to write a poem in the venerated Haiku format.
programme.sub-title: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Figure Drawing / Date Bait
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get to look at real nudes. / The return of Lolita and Tanqueray! Beavis and Butt-head go on their first date, well, almost.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: To teite menn / Fredagsgalskap
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head oppfyller sin samfunnsplikt som jurymedlemmer./ Beavis og Butt-Head tror feilaktig at de har byttet kropp.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Car Wash / Kidnapped
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head attempt to make some money washing cars. / Beavis & Butt-head decide that kidnapping Stewart would be a quick way to some cash.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Politically Correct / True Crime
programme.desc: To better understand their female classmates, Beavis & Butt-head must get in touch with their feelings. Huh huh, he said "touch." / Beavis & Butt-head unknowingly star in their favorite crime reenactment shows.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap
programme.desc: Beavis starts mimicing Butt-Head / A quiet day in Highland, Texas / Our duo enrolls in a fitness class
programme.sub-title: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Prøvedansingen begynner
programme.desc: Cowboys stadion i Arlington i Texas blir nok en gang stedet for prøvedansingen til Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders. 500 kandidater drømmer om å komme med i DCC-kvalifiseringen 2011-2012 DCC før soloppgang.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: På banen
programme.desc: Det storslagne Cowboys stadion er stedet for DCCs avsluttende prøvedansing. Presset blir høyt for 69 nye jenter når 18 DCC-veteraner deltar i den ettertraktede invitasjonen til treningsleiren.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Treningsleiren
programme.desc: DCCs treningsleir begynner på Valley Ranch i kveld! De nye kandidatene stresser påtagelig foran treningsleiren mens de kjemper for å endre planene og sikre nye boformer i Dallas.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Den brømte uniformen
programme.desc: To uker inn i treningsleiren, forbereder Kelli og Judy sin første opptreden. Ukens øvelser er viktige for alle jentene. De forventes å beherske de verdensberømte DCC-sparkene og splitthoppene.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Fornyelse
programme.desc: På treningsleirens tredje uke blir nybegynnerne DCC-fornyet. Hår og sminke blir piffet opp når de blir støpt i DCC-formen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Portrettfotografering
programme.desc: Kveldens øvelser begynner med et smell da teknisk sjef for DCC, Kitty Carter, kommer på overraskende besøk til Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Feltøvelse
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders er to uker unna første omgang, og DCC-sjefen Kelli McGonagill Finglass og koreografen Judy Trammel er presset for at de skal klare utvelgingen og offentliggjøre laget.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Finale
programme.desc: Alt fører frem til treningsleirens avsluttende finalekveld. I kveld fødes og knuses drømmer. Kelli overrasker jentene ved å ta dem til Cowboys' øvingsfelt for å se dem opptre.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Innledende prøvedansing
programme.desc: Under to timer vises sesongpremieren av Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: 600 håpefulle kandidater vil være med på laget, og ankommer Cowboys' stadion for Dallas Cowboys' heiagjengs innledende prøvedansing.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Treningsleir
programme.desc: Treningsleiren starter og mange nye kandidater må bli rotløse og flytte til Dallas. Imidlertid er det ingen garanti for å klare treningsleiren og bli med i Dallas Cowboys' heiagjeng.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Splitthopp
programme.desc: Det er bare andre uke med øvelser, og Kelli og Judy kjører raskt kandidatene gjennom signaturbevegelsene. Mange nye kandidater har aldri foretatt et splitthopp, og uerfarenheten gjør at visse blir skadet.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Fornyelse
programme.desc: Under treningsleirens fjerde uke blir nybegynnerne DCC-fornyet. Kelli Finglass sumfarer nye frisyrer og et sminkeprogram som skal gi jentene DCC-stilen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Femte uke
programme.desc: Under treningsleirens femte uke er Kelly uvel. Teknisk sjef Kitty Carter, stiller opp og kjører ukens første øvelser. Kitty praktiserer nulltoleranse og tilkaller de som har rotete numre.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Treningsleirens syvende uke begynner med en øvelse på Cowboys' stadion. Kelli og Judy er klare for den endelige prøven, og kveldens omgang kan bestemme hvem som når laget..

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Kunngjøring av laget
programme.desc: Det er på tide å kunngjøre DCC-laget, men først skal Kelli og Judy teste kandidatene i en endelig feltøvelse på Cowboys' stadion. Spenningen stiger blant jentene, og Kelli og Judy betrakter hvert eneste trinn.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: En stor prestasjon
programme.desc: Laget har sin første kampdagopptreden bakom seg, men etter en dårlig øvelse advarer Kelli sitt nye lag om at hun kommer til å droppe de som ikke gir hundre prosent.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Badedraktkalender
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders tar pause fra sidelinjen, og drar til Mexico for bilder til sin årlige badedraktkalender. Det er en utmattende uke for både jentene og armadaen av fotografer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Første hjemmekamp
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys' heiagjeng er i fullt dansemodus og forbereder seg for sesongens første ordinære hjemmekamp. Kelli og Judy vil ha koreografien perfekt og presse jentene med intense øveldser.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: I seriens siste episode, forbereder Dallas Cowboys' heiagjeng seg for entréopptredenen sin - Susan G. Komen Cancer Awareness Halftime Show - under en nasjonalt overført Cowboys' footballkamp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Journey Begins
programme.desc: Drømmer står på spill når uttaket til 2013-2014 Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders innledes. Når portene åpnes og 500 jenter stimer inn, er den spenningen til å ta og føle på. Konkurransen kommer til å være steinhard.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 205
programme.desc: Etter meldinger om et rykende bål i Hafjell går drapsalarmen hos politiet på Lillehammer. På bålet viser det seg å ligge rester av et partert menneske. Samtidig meldes to personer savnet fra en bolig i nærheten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 305
programme.desc: 19. desember 1994 setter Bjørn Thore Langemyhr seg på et tog fra Tønsberg til Oslo. Det er det siste familien ser til ham. Samtidig begynner ryktene å gå om at et belastet rusmiljø kan ha tatt livet av Langemyhr.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 508
programme.desc: Etter en fest i juli 2017 forsvinner Tom Rune Hagen. Han har vært en del av et belastet rusmiljø, men akkurat denne uka har han planlagt en tur på fjellet for å fiske. Hva skjedde med Tom Rune?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 701
programme.desc: I september 2020 blir Erik Fasth funnet livløs i en blodpøl utenfor rommet til den funksjonshemmede kvinnen han er assistent for. Politiet begynner umiddelbart å undersøke hva som har skjedd.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 502
programme.desc: I 2016 går politiet til aksjon i en privatbolig på Romerike. På eierens datamaskin finner de harddisker fulle av bilder og videosnutter med seksuelle handlinger fra unge gutter ned i 9-årsalderen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 507
programme.desc: 13. desember 2008 skjer det som omtales som den verste brannen i Oslo siden krigen, i Urtegata på Grønland. Det ble fort mistenkt at brannen var påsatt.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 505
programme.desc: I 1999 brenner huset til Knut Øyvind Moe ned til grunnen i Valdres. To dager senere blir levningene hans hentet ut av brannruinene, og det viser seg at han ble skutt og drept i forkant av brannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 103
programme.desc: To turgåere finner et utbrent lik på et bål langs en øde skogsbilvei på Veståsen i Søndre Land. I flere uker står politiet helt uten svar på hvem som kan stå bak den groteske handlingen.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En tidlig februarmorgen i Stockholm melder en mann sin kone, Sacha, savnet. Etter hvert som politiet graver i parets fortid, oppdager de et turbulent forhold under den tilsynelatende ryddige overflaten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 204
programme.desc: På kvelden 1. nyttårsdag i 2012 utløses trygghetsalarmen hjemme hos 98 år gamle Hilda Feste. Da hjemmetjenesten rykker ut blir de vitne til en grufull hendelse. Politiet starter umiddelbart opp jakten på gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 403
programme.desc: Marit Ødegaard jobber på en veikro ikke langt fra svenskegrensen. En oktoberdag i 2000 dukker hun ikke opp på jobb. Kort tid etter blir Marit funnet drept i hjemmet sitt

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En ung mann blir funnet død på et jorde utenfor Enköping. Ved første øyekast ser det ut som om han har lagt seg ned for å hvile - men når politiet undersøker liket, oppdager de noe som antas å være et skuddsår.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 506
programme.desc: 26. januar 2001 ble Benjamin Hermansen knivstukket til døde som følge av sin hudfarge. Drapet fikk hele landet til å delta i antirasistiske markeringer og protester.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En familie som rammes av en husbrann klarer å unnslippe flammene, men alt de eier har blitt til aske. Det som først ser ut til å være en ulykke, viser seg å være mye mer komplisert.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 105
programme.desc: Tina Jørgensen forsvant etter en kveld på byen i Stavanger. En måned senere finner politiet liket av en 20 år gammel kvinne. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av Tina og deretter dumpet henne langs en øde veistrekning?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 301
programme.desc: Justisminister Tor Mikkel Wara blir i 2018 utsatt for en rekke alvorlige angrep på sitt private hjem. I flere måneder står politiet uten spor, helt til det kommer et sjokkerende gjennombrudd i saken.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 404
programme.desc: I desember 2015 gjør gallerist Reidar Osen et ærend med varebilen sin da han blir kapret av ukjente gjerningsmenn, som truer ham på livet og krever to millioner kroner. Hvem står bak kidnappingen?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 102
programme.desc: Åtte år gamle Monika Sviglinskaja blir funnet død i sitt hjem på Sotra. Politiet mener det dreier seg om et selvmord og henlegger saken. Men moren hennes er fortsatt overbevist om at noe kriminelt har skjedd.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En politietterforskning settes i gang etter at Maud Johansson meldes savnet den 18. oktober 2005. Etter flere år med iherdig leting ser det ut til at etterforskningen stopper opp, men politiet gir ikke opp.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 704
programme.desc: En sommernatt i Värmland bryter det ut slagsmål, hvoretter 21 år gamle Harout mottar et dødelig knivstikk. Politiet får mistanker om at et sjalusidrama kan være nøkkelen til å finne den skyldige.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Boyfriend & Alfie
programme.desc: “Boyfriend” is a Shephard mix that has repeatedly bitten his owner’s boyfriend. Alfie is the aggressive English Bulldog of popular actress/television host Daisy Fuentes.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Brady, Bandit, and Hootie
programme.desc: Water-obsessed Labrador; a pooch with performance anxiety; a leg chomping Chihuahua.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sonny, Cinnamon & Chocolate, and Boo
programme.desc: Pug and pet pig get rowdy; emotionally scarred Shepherd; two Dachshunds make an unsavory mix.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy, Teddy, and Matilda
programme.desc: Lab/Staffordshire mix unfriendly to small animals; a poodle that can't stop running in circles; bulldog obsessed with attaching skateboard wheels.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Jonbee, Hudson & Violet, and Buford
programme.desc: A ferocious stray Jindo in desperate need of rescue, a Great Dane wreaks havoc on house and home, a boxer mourns the death of a beloved mate.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Isis & Tina, Nugget, and the Katrina Dogs
programme.desc: Traumatized canine victims of Hurricane Katrina are rehabilitated; a couple's dogs finally meet; a big dog's dangerous appetite for toys, towels and trampolines.
programme.sub-title: Isis & Tina, Nugget, and the Katrina Dogs

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy, Tiger & Roxy, and Booker
programme.desc: Cesar tries to rehabilitate two Rottie pups before they grow into dangerous attack dogs. Buddy, has a bad habit of biting. A Visla cowers and cringes at the sights and sounds of the city.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Duke & Lulu, and Sparky
programme.desc: Cesar heads to the dog park to help some frustrated dog lovers. A therapeutic terrier helps AJ control her panic attacks but tends to attack other dogs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren
programme.desc: A Min Pin turns ferocious. Actress Denise Richards' pug gets overprotective and aggressive towards visitors. A stubborn Bassett Hound has to literally be dragged places he doesn't want to go.
programme.sub-title: Chip, Leo, Hank, Lucy and Betty

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Spike, Jake & Nugget, and Wendel
programme.desc: A wedding date is cancelled because the dogs can't get along; a German Shepherd that's so aggressive, even the German Shepherd rescue center won't take him; Sheltie barks at everything.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Pasha, Cosmo, and Contessa
programme.desc: Pasha lashes out at people, especially children. Cosmo’s bitten several people including the postman. Contessa is highly aggressive towards TV shows, especially Dog Whisperer.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Eppie, Lady, and Snoopy
programme.desc: A Beagle with a passion for boogie boarding, a Dalmatian/German shepherd dangerously protective of her owner; Lab/Beagle mix that became aggressive after moving to a new area.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Major Jones, Josie, and Scrappy
programme.desc: Catchup with the hurricane Katrina rescue dogs. Is a reunion with their owners in store for any of them? A German Shephard learns to walk on a leash. A lab won’t walk on hardwood floors.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Princess Cujo, Prada, and Bearz
programme.desc: Los Angeles Lakers executive Jeanie Buss asks Cesar to take the "Cujo" out of Princess. Prada, a pampered Pomeranian throws vicious temper tantrums, and Bearz, a Rottweiler attacks shopping carts.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Greta & Hoss, Storm, and Chula
programme.desc: Cesar helps a young Akita control his aggression; Newfoundland is the world's pickiest eater; two-year old Shiba Inu has a knack for bolting out open doors.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Eton & Dolly, and the Pups on Parole
programme.desc: Cesar goes to jail to help wayward humans rehabilitate wayward pups through a program called "Pups on Parole."; Bulldogs learn to play fair.
programme.sub-title: Eton & Dolly, and the Pups on Parole

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Vicky & Taz, Punkin, and Maddy
programme.desc: Vicious Min Pins endanger a couple's home-based business; Pit Bull mix develops an unhealthy obsession with rocks; Cesar helps an adopted Terrier mix overcome her fear of men.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bikini, Fella, Winston and Oliver
programme.desc: Bull terrier won't behave at home and has irrational fear of grooming; Jack Russell / Italian Greyhound mix cries and barks whenever left alone; a police officer's Yorkies are disturbing the peace.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Happy Life
programme.desc: Catherine and Vincent are forced to question if they could ever be truly happy together.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Chamber Music
programme.desc: While walking in the world Above, Vincent recognizes Rolly,a teenage musical prodigy and ex-tunnel dweller who is now a junkie.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Remember Love
programme.desc: In a moment of profound despair, Vincent undergoes his own It's a Wonderful Life (1946) experience and sees what would have happened if he had died as a baby.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ashes, Ashes
programme.desc: A Russian sailor escapes to the tunnels only to bring a plague upon the people in the Underworld. It is up to Catherine, Vincent, Father, and everybody to help save their world.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: When the tunnel world is having an annual event, Paracelcus makes plans to crash the event and do something.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: God Bless the Child
programme.desc: With Catherine's help, a pregnant teenage hooker is welcomed into the tunnels. Complications arise when she falls in love with Vincent.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: A deaf girl, who used to live below, falls in with a street gang that threatens to put an end to her first serious love affair.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Fair and Perfect Knight
programme.desc: Catherine befriends a boy from the world below who leaves the tunnels to go college.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Labyrinths
programme.desc: A young man gets lost in the tunnel world and he is found by the inhabitants. They're uncertain if they should let him go because they're not sure if he can be trusted to keep their secret.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Brothers
programme.desc: Vincent's "brother" Devin returns with Charles, a hideously deformed man seeking sanctuary.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Gentle Rain
programme.desc: Kanin, a resident of the Underworld, goes into a store on the surface and is recognized by a woman as the man who killed her son, years ago.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Outsiders"
programme.desc: When intruders penetrates their tunnel world, father decides to welcome them with gifts, but instead of gratitude, they are met with greed and violence. Things escalate to the point that tunnel dwellers have no other choice but to leave.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Orphans
programme.desc: After her father dies, Catherine thinks about living the rest of her life in the world below.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Arabesque
programme.desc: Vincent's childhood sweetheart returns to the tunnels, and Vincent reveals a painful memory of her to Catherine.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: When the Blue Bird Sings
programme.desc: Catherine meets a persistent artist, who follows and spies on her. But this artist isn't all what he seems to be.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Watcher
programme.desc: On Vincent and Catherine's two year anniversary, Catherine receives a phone message indicating that someone is watching them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Distant Shore
programme.desc: Catherine heads out to L.A California, to find a witness for an investigation.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Four O'Clock
programme.desc: Oliver Crangle is a bitter, prejudiced man. Through unknown means, he intends to shrink every evil person in the world at four o'clock.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Hocus-Pocus and Frisby
programme.desc: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of some aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trade-Ins
programme.desc: An elderly couple visit the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Wunderkind
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck campaign manager (John Cho) is determined to get a kid (Jacob Tremblay) elected as the President of the United States. Allison Tolman and John Larroquette guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Six Degrees of Freedom
programme.desc: A space crew preparing for the first human flight to Mars is faced with a life-altering decision...and its consequences. DeWanda Wise, Jessica Williams, Jefferson White, Lucinda Dryzek and Jonathan Whitesell guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Gift
programme.desc: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Dummy
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Young Man's Fancy
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple briefly returns to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Sing the Body Electric
programme.desc: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Not All Men
programme.desc: A meteor shower spreads infection across an entire town... affecting some of the inhabitants more than others. Taissa Farmiga, Rhea Seehorn, Luke Kirby and Ike Barinholtz guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Point of Origin
programme.desc: A suburban housewife (Ginnifer Goodwin) wants to go home. But where - and what - is home, really? Zabryna Guevara and James Frain guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Cavender is Coming
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Changing of the Guard
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: In Praise Of Pip
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Steel
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Blue Scorpion
programme.desc: The emergence of the elusive Blue Scorpion leads anthropology professor Jeff Storck (Chris O'Dowd) to his most personal research project yet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Blurryman
programme.desc: Writer Sophie Gelson (Zazie Beetz) is haunted by a mysterious figure. Seth Rogen and Betty Gabriel guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nightmare at 20,000 Feet
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Kind of a Stopwatch
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Night of a Jockey
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.
programme.sub-title: The Last Night of a Jockey

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Living Doll
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Meet in the Middle
programme.desc: Lonely bachelor Phil (Jimmi Simpson) finds meaningful human connection when he discovers a telepathic link to a stranger named Annie (Gillian Jacobs). Their connection quickly sparks a romance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Downtime
programme.desc: After a recent promotion to hotel manager, Michelle (Morena Baccarin) feels like she's on top of the world, but any cause for celebration is short lived when the nature of her reality is called into question. Colman Domingo and Tony Hale also guest star.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Old Man in the Cave
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.
programme.sub-title: The Old Man in the Cave

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Uncle Simon
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Probe 7, Over and Out
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The 7th is Made Up of Phantoms
programme.desc: Three National Guardsmen explore the site of Custer's Last Stand and encounter mysterious phenomenon that hint at the original battle occurring just out of sight.
programme.sub-title: The 7th is Made Up of Phantoms

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Who of You
programme.desc: Struggling actor Harry (Ethan Embry) risks everything to catch his big break, but an impulsive scheme takes a few turns no one saw coming. Daniel Sunjata and Billy Porter also guest star.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Do You See What I See?
programme.desc: Sabrina feels responsible when Miles considers giving up his paranormal research to settle in his father’s accounting business after no one believes the otherworldly phenomena he sees at the Spellman home.
programme.sub-title: Do You See What I See?

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Got Spirit
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to throw off Miles and the specialist he has hired to uncover paranormal activity in the house, but Sabrina herself discovers a ghost in the ceiling.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Finally!
programme.desc: Romance brews between Sabrina and Josh when they turn the coffeehouse into a single's night featuring entertainment by the band Eden's Crush.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Really Big Season Opener
programme.desc: Miles decides to make a student film in his favorite genre, horror, and enlists Sabrina as the producer of his film.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Date with Destiny
programme.desc: Sabrina and her friends return to school and a lot of excitement after summer break.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: What’s News?
programme.desc: Josh lands a job as a photojournalist for the Boston Citizen, and is surprised to learn that Sabrina is a fan of his new boss, Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Murder on the Halloween Express
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda are invited to attend a murder mystery party on the Halloween Mystery Train, which makes a stop in Boston.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Gift of Gab
programme.desc: Sabrina and Roxie are thrilled to get their own show on the campus radio station, a two hour talk show they call "Chick Chat."

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Thin Ice
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a jam when ex-boyfriend Harvey requests that she use her magical powers to help him.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Hex, Lies, and No Videotape
programme.desc: Josh gets Sabrina an internship at the Boston Citizen where he works.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Humble Pie
programme.desc: Sabrina and her roommates discover that Morgan didn't pay her portion of the rent when the housing office sends a student to replace her in the house.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Birthday Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina receives an unexpected surprise on her birthday, a visit from her evil Aunt Irms, the matriarch of the Spellman family.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Deliver Us from Email
programme.desc: Intern Sabrina wants to propose writing her own column about the college experience to Boston Citizen editor Mike Shelby.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Cloud Ten

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and the Candidate
programme.desc: Sabrina is assigned to research the local city councilman election for an article, which will run in the Boston Citizen.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I Think I Love You
programme.desc: Sabrina's relationship with Josh couldn't be going better until Josh tells her that he loves her.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Arrangement
programme.desc: Sabrina's devilish Aunt Irma returns for yet another unexpected visit.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Time After Time

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina and the Kiss

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Competition
programme.desc: A friendly game of tennis turns into a battle of the sexes when Josh tells Sabrina that women are not as competitive as men.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I, Busybody

programme.desc: When Sabrina uses a little magic to get Zelda nominated for an award, she has no idea what she's started.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Whole Ball of Wax
programme.desc: When Sabrina gets an eerie feeling that she is being followed, she decides to take matters into her own hands but ends up face-to-face with her mother Diana.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Driving Mr. Goodman
programme.desc: Sabrina persuades Miles Goodman to get his driver's license and finds herself in the middle of a nasty lawsuit.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: I Fall to Pieces
programme.desc: When Hilda's boyfriend breaks up with her, she is devastated and claims that she is through with men.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Total Sabrina Live
programme.desc: Sabrina’s search for a job takes her to NYC and the Mtelevision studios.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Big Head
programme.desc: Sabrina has to write about an obnoxious pop star, who threatens to sue the magazine unless she apologises! Plus, Roxie and Morgan try to train Salem.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Call Me Crazy
programme.desc: Sabrina tries to impress her colleagues but accidentally says far too much about her magical life, making everyone think that she's totally crazy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Shift Happens
programme.desc: Sabrina is worried about having to interview a hip-hop star, but a spell to make them nicer backfires, and causes the pair to switch personalities.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Free Sabrina
programme.desc: Reporter Sabrina follows a story and almost lands herself in jail.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Unplugged

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Witch Way Out

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Bada-Ping

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: It's a Hot, Hot, Hot, Hot Christmas

programme.sub-title: It's a Hot, Hot, Hot, Hot Christmas

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Ping, Ping a Song

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Lyin, the Witch, and the Wardrobe

programme.sub-title: The Lyin, the Witch, and the Wardrobe

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: In Sabrina We Trust
programme.desc: The only way Sabrina can reverse a spell is to tell Roxie the truth about being a witch, and Salem induces Morgan to pamper him.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina In Wonderland
programme.desc: Sabrina accidentally tumbles into Wonderland, where she meets the White Rabbit and the Queen of Hearts.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Present Perfect
programme.desc: The harder Sabrina tries to be perfect, the more mistakes she makes.

programme.title: JAG: Pulse Rate

programme.title: JAG: Good Intentions
programme.desc: Mac defends a petty officer and former alcoholic accused of a brutal murder after a drinking binge which renders him useless in remembering details that could help him. Roberts is entangled in the case of a Navy Commander accused of embezzling funds.

programme.title: JAG: People vs SECNAV
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: JAG: Hard Time
programme.desc: Mac must accompany a prisoner who once assaulted her across the country while Harm and Bud delve into the case of an HIV-infected fleet officer who, after having his condition revealed and relegated to inactive duty, wants his old job back.

programme.title: JAG: Coming Home
programme.desc: A marine’s killing in Iraq has ramifications for JAG stateside as Harm helps the soldier’s family with a media onslaught, and Bud and Mac investigate the failure of his flack vest.

programme.title: JAG: Fighting Words
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: JAG: Retrial
programme.desc: At the request of Seaman Saul Wainright (guest star William Sadler), who is serving a life sentence in a federal prison for stabbing a transsexual prostitute 20 years ago, Harm convinces Naval authorities to re-open the case.

programme.title: JAG: One Big Boat
programme.desc: When a Naval Academy sailing team gets caught in a squall and a team member drowns, Mac and Turner must determine if their driven commander willingly put his crew at risk.

programme.title: JAG: Fit For Duty
programme.desc: Harm and Mac find themselves on opposing sides when a Navy psychiatrist is charged with allegedly sending a marine diagnosed with combat stress back to battle too soon.

programme.title: JAG: Death At The Mosque
programme.desc: Vukovic is sent to Iraq to defend a Marine who was caught on tape killing a seemingly innocent Iraqi civilian.

programme.title: JAG: Dream Team
programme.desc: A sailor dies during a fight aboard a ship at sea; Bud discovers the explanation. Mattie wakes up and talks. The general announces a reorganization, orders, and a promotion.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot, Part 1 & 2
programme.desc: A woman radar-intercept officer (RIO) disappears at night from an aircraft carrier in the Adriatic Sea. Two JAG lawyers, Lt. Harm Rabb and Lt. Caitlin Pike, investigate and solve. Harm, a former Naval aviator, unexpectedly becomes a hero.

programme.title: JAG: Shadow
programme.desc: A civilian tech rep aboard a submarine seizes control of an experimental torpedo after its launch during an exercise

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Three Navy lieutenants die by homicide in 11 months around Washington. Harm and Meg investigate

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Due to a human error in an exercise, artillery fire injures seven Marines, one of whom later dies.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A sailor has stolen two Stinger missiles from a base. Harm and Meg investigate.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot Error
programme.desc: Two Naval aviators die in a crash of an F-14 while using a new fly-by-wire navigation system.

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Captain & The Lady / One If By Land... / Centerfold
programme.desc: Bonnie Franklin appears as Capt. Stubing's infuriatingly sarcastic ex-wife with her present spouse, the captain's boss.
programme.sub-title: The Captain & The Lady / One If By Land... / Centerfold

programme.title: The Love Boat: Oh, Dale! / The Main Event / A Tasteful Affair

programme.sub-title: Oh, Dale! / The Main Event / A Tasteful Affair

programme.title: The Love Boat: Ex Plus Y / Graham And Kelly / Golden Agers

programme.sub-title: Ex Plus Y / Graham And Kelly / Golden Agers

programme.title: The Love Boat: Message For Maureen / Acapulco Connection / Gotcha

programme.sub-title: Message For Maureen / Acapulco Connection / Gotcha

programme.title: The Love Boat: Help! Murder! / Isaac The Groupie / Mr. Popularity

programme.sub-title: Help! Murder! / Isaac The Groupie / Mr. Popularity

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Joker Is Mild / First Time Out / Take My Granddaughter, Please

programme.sub-title: The Joker Is Mild / First Time Out / Take My Granddaughter, Please

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Identical Problem / Julie's Old Flame / The Jinx
programme.desc: In "The Identical Problem," twins Helen and Ellen (both played by Diana "Soap" Canova) pretend to be one person, which nearly drives Doc crazy because Helen is warm, Ellen is cold and Doc is feeling amorous.
programme.sub-title: The Identical Problem / Julie's Old Flame / The Jinx

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Understudy / Married Singles / Lost & Found

programme.sub-title: The Understudy / Married Singles / Lost & Found

programme.title: The Love Boat: Romance Roulette / The Captain's Captain / Dog's Life
programme.desc: The presence of the captain's demanding father leaves the entire crew on edge. A dog traps a passenger in his cabin. Three friends reunite on board the ship and try to meet men through an unusual game. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: Romance Roulette / The Captain's Captain / Dog's Life

programme.title: The Love Boat: Dear Beverly / The Strike / Special Delivery

programme.sub-title: Dear Beverly / The Strike / Special Delivery

programme.title: The Love Boat: Lonely At The Top / Silent Night / Divorce Me, Please

programme.sub-title: Lonely At The Top / Silent Night / Divorce Me, Please

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Old Man And The Runaway / A Fine Romance / The Painters
programme.desc: A crotchety old man and a teenage runaway form an unlikely friendship. Julie grows frustrated when an old friend of her brother's repeatedly rejects her advances without explanation.
programme.sub-title: The Old Man And The Runaway / A Fine Romance / The Painters

programme.title: The Love Boat: Family Reunion / Cinderella Story / Too Hot To Handle

programme.sub-title: Family Reunion / Cinderella Story / Too Hot To Handle

programme.title: The Love Boat: Isaac's Double Standard / Chimpanzeeshines / One More Time

programme.sub-title: The Caper / Eyes Of Love / Hollywood Royalty / Masquerade - Parts 1 & 2

programme.title: The Love Boat: Winner Take Love / The Congressman Was Indiscreet / Isaac's History Lesson

programme.sub-title: Winner Take Love / The Congressman Was Indiscreet / Isaac's History Lesson

programme.title: Happy Days: Do You Want to Dance
programme.desc: Fonzie's latest romantic interest, a ballet teacher, is secretly yearning to turn professional and dance with the greats in New York. Fonzie, however, has trouble accepting that she may forgo their relationship to pursue her dreams of fame.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Malph
programme.desc: When Ralph Malph is hypnotized to cure his fright after a tornado warning is posted, Ralph's loss of fear causes him to tempt fate by suggesting that the Fonz needs training wheels for his stupid motorcycle

programme.title: Happy Days: Smokin' Ain'T Cool
programme.desc: Joanie believes she has to smoke to fit in with the cool girls. She ignores the pleas from her family to stop, until the Fonz defines what cool really means

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie's Blindness
programme.desc: In a poignant, change-of-pace episode titled Fonzie's Blindness, Al barges through the kitchen door at the drive-in and hits Fonzie in the head with a tray of food.

programme.title: Happy Days: Casanova Cunningham
programme.desc: When Richie is caught two-timing Lori Beth for a pretty baton twirler, the Fonz has to step in and give Richie a few lessons in love.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Gets Framed
programme.desc: Richie and the Fonz visit a massage parlor to escape the pressures of a heated class presidency race, and Richie's opposition photographs the sheet-clad candidate with a pretty masseuse.

programme.title: Happy Days: Potsie Quits School
programme.desc: When troubles with his studies and an insulting professor cause Potsie to quit school, the Fonz comes up with an ingenious but offbeat plan to help his friend.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 1)
programme.desc: In Part I, Fonzie is called to make emergency mechanical repairs on a stalled hearse and inadvertently discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money hidden in the coffin.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie'S Funeral (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Part II, after Fonzie discovers thousands of dollars in counterfeit money in a hearse, the counterfeiters attempt to silence him.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Duel
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Gets Shot
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Happy Days: American Musical
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: Happy Days: Grandma Nussbaum
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: Happy Days: A Night at the Circus
programme.desc: Howard's teen-aged niece, K.C., comes to stay with the Cunninghams after a scandal closes her Houston boarding school while Fonzie hopes a night at the circus will help him win little Heather's heart when nothing else seems to work.

programme.title: Happy Days: Where the Guys Are
programme.desc: After tricking Fonzie into going to a single's camp to help him get over losing steady girlfriend Ashley, Potsie, Chachi and Roger get suckered into a sauna by three con-girls.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Get What You Pay For
programme.desc: Howard decides the house needs a second bathroom. Fonzie offers a way to have it installed and save Howard money as well.
programme.sub-title: You Get What You Pay For

programme.title: Happy Days: Kiss Me Teach
programme.desc: Joanie encounters trouble when she accepts a student teaching job at Patton High.

programme.title: Happy Days: The People vs. The Fonz
programme.desc: His friends are baffled when Fonzie refuses to speak in his own defense after he is accused of manhandling a student and brought before the school board's disciplinary court.

programme.title: Happy Days: School Dazed
programme.desc: Joanie tries to help an angry fifteen year old girl kick a drug habit that threatens to get her kicked out of school.

programme.title: Happy Days: Open House
programme.desc: Over the protests of Richie, whose parents are out of town, Potsie invites three-stranded beauty pageant contestants to spend the night.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Car
programme.desc: Richie persuades his father to let him have his own car and Fonzie comes up with just the car for him, a hot rod named "Love Bandit," which turns out to be hot in more ways than one.

programme.title: Happy Days: Not With My Sister You Don't
programme.desc: Richie's surprise over little sister Joanie's first real date turns to shock when he learns it's with Spike, a pint-sized replica of his Uncle Fonzie.
programme.sub-title: Not With My Sister You Don't

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie Moves Out
programme.desc: Hoping for more privacy, Richie moves out of the Cunningham home to share an apartment with his brother and soon discovers it's not the paradise he expected.

programme.title: Happy Days: You Go To My Head
programme.desc: Richie's fears get the best of him while he's reading a book on abnormal psychology and it drives him to secretly see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Happy Days: Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Hollywood comes to Jefferson High when Richie wins a dance date with a beautiful movie star in a school raffle.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Flip Side
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: Happy Days: Goin' to Chicago
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days: Get A Job
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman."

programme.title: Happy Days: Cruisin'
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Fonzarelli Part I
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Happy Days: Football Frolics
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days: Two Angry Men
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: MacGyver: Gold Rush
programme.desc: MacGyver s quest to find buried Russian gold leads him through a maze of harrowing traps.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Invisible Killer
programme.desc: MacGyver's mountain retreat group is infiltrated by a couple of murderous escaped convicts.

programme.title: MacGyver: Brainwashed
programme.desc: MacGyver unravels an assassination plot against an East African leader after discovering that Jack Dalton has been brainwashed.

programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton are taken hostage by a group of terrorists threatening to take over a nearby city.

programme.title: MacGyver: Renegade

programme.title: MacGyver: Unfinished Business
