programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Justin gjør et krav etter et omfattende jadefunn, men andre gruvearbeidere nærmer seg stadig.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudias nye partnerskap lider når Justin og mannskapet distraheres med å forsøke transportere en gigantisk stein som kan være verdt en formue.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Etter å kommet på kant med forretningspartnerne kjemper Claudia og Robin for å restarte gruvedriften ved Wolverine, men blir stengt ned som følge av en overraskende hindring.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Mannskapet kjemper for å få Dynasty driften i gang til tross for sviktende utstyr.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Justin og Mike sliter med sprekker og med hverandre mens de prøver å bevise effektiviteten i metodene sine for utålmodige investorer.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Alan kommer tilbake fra Kina og gir Justin og Mike en realitetssjekk om jaden de graver ut.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Justin og Mike kjemper mot snø og frosset vann for å grave ut den ene potensielt verdigfulle jadeplaten - Big Fin.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Vinteren ankommer Dynasty. Mannskapet sliter og graver helt til siste slutt.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia finansierer gruvesesongen alene og er bestemt på å starte jakten på jade en måned tidligere. Claudia blir tvunget til å revurdere strategien sin når snø og høyvann hindrer mannskapet på veien.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Robin følger magefølelsen tilbake til et tidligere sted, mens Josh' høye forventninger og korte lunte tester Garys tålmodighet.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Guy strever med gravemaskinen for å avdekke et massivt funn, mens Joshs misnøye med egen rolle i teamet bringer familiekonflikter til overflaten.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Mannskapet står ovenfor en farlig redningsaksjon på bredden ved Turnagain-elven.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Et potensielt millionfunn blir satt på vent når gammelt utstyr svikter.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Oppkuttingen starter endelig med den gigantiske jadelinsen på Dynasty, men store sprekker skader linsen.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Nedbør truer mannskapets sikkerhet og stopper gruvedriften på Pit 3. Josh får en sjanse til å vise seg fram i gravemaskinen, men et sammenbrudd tester tålmodigheten hans.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Når en viktig jade kjøper ikke er imponert over Pit 3 linsen, blir Claudia tvunget til å ta en vanskelig avgjørelse som skuffer mannskapet hennes.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Kappløpet om å pakke ned leiren på Wolverine blir et mareritt når varme, sykdom og en skogbrann treffer mannskapet.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: En brutal tur til et nytt gruveområde skiller familien og presser Josh til bristepunktet.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia gleder seg til å begynne driften i det nye området, men fremgangen stoppes etter en rekke uheldige hendelser på deres gamle gruveleir i Wolverine.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Små oppturer i leiren gleder et misfornøyd mannskap, og et overraskelsesbesøk bringer håp til Claudias fremtid på Two Mile.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Gary og Josh kommer ikke tilbake fra en rutinemessig drivstoffylling. Borere sår tvil om kvaliteten på jadelinsene på Two Mile.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Mannskapet treffer jackpot, men vinteren nærmer seg, og Claudia bekymrer seg for at det store funnet kan ha kommet for sent.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia er desperat etter å starte gruvedriften, men brutale veiforhold får henne til å tvile på om mannskapet i det hele tatt vil ankomme stedet.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Mens Guy og Gary desperat forsøker å fikse den ødelagte veien til stedet, håper Claudia at en ny medarbeider vil bringe den flaksen hun sårt trenger.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Robins overraskende handletur stresser Claudia når innkjøpsfeil setter gruvedriften på vent.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia prøver å bevare freden når Robin og hennes far krangler, mens mannskapet sliter med å fikse det ene problemet etter det andre på gruvebilen deres.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Gary og Josh frustreres av flere sammenbrudd, mens Claudia kommer med en sjokkerende kunngjøring som spolerer Robins planer og forårsaker konflikt mellom paret.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Spenningsnivået øker over mellom Robin, Josh og Steve om hvordan de skal grave. Når Claudia trer inn blir stemningen enda mer opphetet.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Med store lastebilproblemer kjemper Robin og mannskapet hans for å få unnagjort et skift før drivstoffet går tomt.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Robin krangler med Claudia og Josh om kvaliteten på jaden i gropen deres, mens Larrys forsøk på å frakte mannskapets sovebrakke til leiren går skeis.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Dårlige bremser, slitte nerver og vanskelige kjøreforhold får Claudia til å tvile på om mannskapet klarer å frakte den store sovebrakken til leiren i ett sett.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia og teamet er fast bestemt på å fortsette gruvedriften til tross for skogbranner som herjer rundt området deres, inntil situasjonen forverres og de må evakuere.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Etter å ha mistet to ukers gruvedrift til skogbrannene tar Claudia og Robin risikoen med å returnere til Two Mile for å åpne en ny gruve.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia stresser med å få klargjøre den beste jaden klar for kjøpere, mens mannskapets moral blir testet når de kjemper mot kulden og endelig begynner å skjære opp 90 tonns steinen.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia gjør alt i sin makt for å selge til potensielle kjøpere, mens oppe i gruven sliter Guy og Gary med sesongens første snøstorm.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia presser mannskapet til å fortsette gruvedriften til tross for frysetemperaturer og stadig vanskeligere veiforhold.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 1)
programme.desc: A rare-coin dealer invests his trust in Matlock when he’s accused of murdering an employee who was caught stealing valuable coins. Meanwhile, Tyler becomes disgruntled when Matlock hires another private investigator, Linda Hansfield, to work on the case.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thief (Part 2)
programme.desc: While defending a coin dealer accused of murdering an employee, Matlock and Tyler suspect the new investigator Ben hired, Linda Hansfield, is being blackmailed by the real kIller.

programme.title: Matlock: The Thoroughbred
programme.desc: A picturesque thoroughbred horse farm provides an unusual setting for murder when Ben Matlock defends a slow-witted stable hand, Tommy Jenks, accused of killing the stable owner’s daughter.

programme.title: Matlock: The Model
programme.desc: Ben Matlock defends a renowned journalist accused of murdering a beautiful international model. Matlock’s investigation is stalled when he is struck by a car and lands in the hospital with a slight case of amnesia.

programme.title: Matlock: The Cult
programme.desc: Matlock believes in the innocence of a man whose brainwashed son insists he saw his father kill the leader of his cult. Ben is the only hope left for a concerned father whose son, David, has been swept into a religious cult.

programme.title: Matlock: The Priest
programme.desc: A lawyer friend of Matlock’s puts his faith in the crafty attorney when his client is accused of killing a feisty priest, Father Fitzgerald.

programme.title: Matlock: The Witness
programme.desc: Ben Matlock gives his assistant, Michelle Thomas, her toughest courtroom assignment... breaking down the eyewitness testimony of a former law classmate in a brutal murder case.

programme.title: Matlock: The Best Seller
programme.desc: District Attorney Julie March matches wits with tempestuous author Cynthia Slayton, whose torrid novels are suddenly eclipsed by facts surrounding the death of her best friend.

programme.title: Matlock: The Hunting Party (Part 1)
programme.desc: The serenity of historic Roanoke Island is shattered when a retired career soldier attempts to prove his late brother’s death was not a hunting accident, but murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Good Boy
programme.desc: When Tony Morgan, a smooth-talking, seemingly perfect son, frames his mother for murder, no one even suspects his involvement. No one except Ben Matlock, who tries to prove the good boy isn’t so good after all.

programme.title: Matlock: The Ex
programme.desc: Ben Matlock finds himself in an awkward situation when he joins Julie March in Baltimore to help her defend an old friend accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Clown
programme.desc: Matlock holds the last ray of hope for a veteran circus clown, Homer Fleming, accused of murdering his partner during a performance.

programme.title: Matlock: The Star
programme.desc: Ben Matlock uncovers plots within a plot when Noel Bishop, the wunderkind director of horror films, is accused of murdering motion picture star Catherine McKay as the cameras roll.

programme.title: Matlock: The Con Man
programme.desc: Ben Matlock has serious doubts about a code of ethics among con artists which is never supposed to include murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Prisoner (Part 1)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock accepts the most dangerous case of his career when he agrees to defend an inmate accused of murder – before a kangaroo court in a riot-torn prison.

programme.title: Matlock: The Prisoner (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock must protect his own life while he’s in prison trying to defend his client. Meanwhile, Conrad tries to unravel the prison murder plot from outside the walls.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Ben Matlock is left with a lot of questions and no answers when his client, Drew Carey, bolts from the courtroom during a preliminary hearing for murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Buddies
programme.desc: A deathbed letter from an old friend puts the life of Ben Matlock in peril when he feels morally obligated to reopen a murder case more than three decades old.

programme.desc: Reis verden rundt med Jeremy Wade, kjent forfatter, sportsfisker og biolog, mens han leter etter de mest skremmende ferskvanns skapninger i River Monsters. Bli hekta på de største fiskehistoriene døgnet rundt på River Monsters på Pluto TV!

programme.title: South Park: Mer drittproblemer
programme.desc: Randy slår verdensrekorden 'største bæsj', og den tidligere rekordinnehaveren Bono vil ha tilbake tronen. Men han har en mørk hemmelighet som kanskje kan hindre ham.

programme.title: South Park: Britneys nye stil
programme.desc: Mediesirkuset kommer til South Park når Britney gjemmer seg i den avsidesliggende fjellbyen. Guttene prøver å hjelpe den plagede popstjernen.

programme.title: South Park: Kina-problemet
programme.desc: Cartman blir forskrekket over den storslåtte OL-seremonien og ber Butters om hjelp til å konfrontere kineserne. Samtidig blir Stan og Kyle vitne til 'voldtekten' av Indiana Jones.

programme.title: South Park: Ringen
programme.desc: Kenny tar med den nye kjæresten sin til en Jonas Brothers-konsert der de får kyskhetsringer.

programme.title: South Park: Fiskepikker
programme.desc: Jimmi er rasende for at Cartmann prøver å ta æren for en vits som han fant på og som nå er blitt populær i hele landet. Men en sint Kanye West klarer ikke å forstå poenget.

programme.title: South Park: Døde kjendiser
programme.desc: Michael Jacksons spøkelse nekter å akseptere å måtte vandre heden og etterlater resten av de nylig avdøde berømtheter frustrert i Skjærsilden.

programme.title: South Park: Sexhjelpen
programme.desc: Kyle og Butters befinner seg midt blant Amerikas superkjendiser når de gjennomgår en behandling for sexavhengighet. Cartman og Stan er limt til Tiger Woods-kampen.

programme.title: South Park: Lattermaskinen
programme.desc: Etter å ha blitt gjort narr av på The South Park Elementary Comedy Awards, bygger Germany en uovervinnerlig lattermaskin: Funnybot. Men dens planer for menneskeheten går likevel ikke altfor bra.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman finner kjærligheten
programme.desc: Cartman spiller matchmaker når en ny jente flytter til South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Kravene heves
programme.desc: Cartman innrømmer endelig at han er feit og får umiddelbart en permobil.

programme.title: South Park: Hobbiten
programme.desc: Wendy prøver å pare en av sine venninner med Butters, men hun ender opp på kontoret til skolekuratoren.

programme.title: South Park: #Oppkok
programme.desc: Kyle vil bare spille tv-spill med lillebroren sin. Men da Ike vil ikke spille med ham mer, blir Kyle redd for at neste generasjon vil forbigå ham.

programme.title: South Park: Glade hologram
programme.desc: Cartman trender, mens resten av USA forbereder seg til det største juleprogrammet på tv noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Fabuløs og modig
programme.desc: Gutta viser Caitlyn Jenner sin enormt store respekt i det mest fabuløse og modige 'South Park'-avsnittet noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Trygt sted
programme.desc: Cartman er siste offer innen kroppsskam.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Cartmans mor er en hore
programme.desc: Dr. Mephisto hjelper Cartman med å avsløre farens identitet, og alle mannlige innbyggere i South Park er aktuelle kandidater.

programme.title: South Park: Byen ved avgrunnens rand (tilbakeblikk)
programme.desc: Skolebussen krasjer i en snøstorm og blir stående på kanten av et stup.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Aid
programme.desc: Chef prøver å kreve royalties da et plateselskap slipper en låt han hevder han skrev for over 20 år siden.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Tamponger av cherokeehår
programme.desc: Kyle trenger nyretransplantasjon og Cartman er den perfekte donor, men setter en høy pris for nyren: 10 millioner dollar.

programme.title: South Park: Her kommer nabolaget
programme.desc: Token føler seg ensom fordi han er eneste rike barn i byen, og lokker andre velstående mennesker til South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Den nye Terrance og Phillip-filmtraileren
programme.desc: Alle barna i South Park er superspente på å se den første traileren for den nye Terrance og Phillip-filmen.

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Jimmy og Timmy blir medlemmer av gjengen The Crips, som de tror er en klubb for funksjonshemmede.

programme.title: South Park: Feitrumpe og pannekakehode
programme.desc: Cartman lager en J-Lo-fingerdukke til et arrangement som skal hylle latinamerikanere.

programme.title: South Park: Dum, bortskjemt hore-leketøy
programme.desc: Paris Hilton åpner butikk i South Park og forderver jentenes moral - bare Wendy holder fast på sine prinsipper.

programme.title: South Park: Agentbyrået
programme.desc: Som talentmanagere kan Cartman, Stan og Kenny innkassere 10 % av klientenes inntekter, men et annet byrå stjeler deres eneste klient.

programme.title: South Park: En million små fibre
programme.desc: Towelie skriver en bok som blir valgt ut til Oprahs bokklubb og blir en bestselger blant folk som vil overvinne avhengighet.

programme.title: South Park: Mysteriet med toeren på pissoaret
programme.desc: Cartman tror han vet hvem som står bak angrepene 11. september.

programme.title: South Park: Momben
programme.desc: Innbyggerne i South Park forbereder seg til et besøk av Hillary Clinton. Cartman mistenker at en muslimsk elev er involvert i et mulig terroristangrep.

programme.desc: Når Randy forstår hemmeligheten bak musikaler, kan han ikke slutte med å ta med seg Sharon for å se dem. Andrew Lloyd-Webber og Elton John advarer ham mot å avsløre deres hemmelighet.

programme.desc: South Park blir glutenfritt.

programme.desc: Ifølge Eric Cartman har Wendy Testaburger blitt lesbisk.

programme.desc: Cartman ser seg som den beste restaurantkritikeren på nettet i South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Legg den fra deg
programme.desc: Nord-Korea sikter mot South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Hummel-figurer og heroin
programme.desc: Feirede underholdere faller fra i sine beste år på grunn av massive overdoser av opiater. Stan er i ferd med å bli avslørt som kilden til de illegale stoffene.

programme.desc: Randy ser en mulighet for Tegridy i China.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Ratings seeking stunts by TV talk show hosts Darren & Mary have tragic results.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a rash of deaths at a high school revolves around one 'helpful' young girl, Dr. Sloan risks his own life to uncover the murderer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates to find out who's behind the death of a driver in a speedway crash.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a young girl is rushed into the hospital in need of immediate treatment but dies due to an HMO's negligence, Dr. Travis and Community General are sued for negligence. Dr. Sloan must choose between his ethical convictions and the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The Matthews family has reunited after years apart. Here, Ryan and Tess Matthews come to LA to help Kate when she's in trouble with a con man.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Travis gets involved in the treacherous and deadly trade of catering when he oversees the annual charity banquet.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan insists that a man he helped condemn to death for a series of bombings is guilty, even after a post-execution explosion.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Three months after the execution of Lewis Sweeney, explosions are still rocking the LA area every four days. The unpopular Dr. Sloan continues his efforts to nail Carter Sweeney for the bombings.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: An explosion at Community General leaves Agent Wagner with minor bruises, but he prepares himself for the grim task of searching for Amanda and her friends amidst the rubble.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While Dr. Sloan impatiently waits for Community General to reopen, Caitlin Sweeney resurfaces as a member of R.O.A.R. (Revolutionary Order for Armed Rebellion).

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's Cindy Garrett and Philip Kobler's wedding day and they're taking "til death do us part" literally, when they plan the murder of Cindy's father to take place right after their nuptials!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's day begins with a phone call from a kidnapper who happened to dial the wrong number - his! The kidnapper believes he's called the original victim and demands Dr. Sloan deliver money if he wants to see his son alive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A homicide investigation turns into a federal case when a "corpse" creates a reign of terror at Community General. Amanda prepares for her autopsy on blood-soaked John Doe when he springs to life, putting a stranglehold on Amanda!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: After heading out to a mountain cabin, Jesse goes missing, only to turn up five days later in Utah, claiming to have been abducted by aliens.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Novelist Kay Ludlow is dealing with writer's block while her literary agent Jim Rothman pressures her to turn out 350 pages by the following day to secure his two million dollar share.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Amanda cruises into cyberspace during a spell of boredom and randomly enters the website "Welcome to Joanne's living room" for mindless entertainment.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve joins his troubled partner, Reggie Ackroyd, in a rehab facility for stressed-out cops. Reggie seems delusional and keeps blaming a murderer he caught for abducting his wife and daughter, and Steve encourages him.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a busy day for the homicide unit and Community General when three murders take place. Further investigation reveals that none of the suspects knew their victims, and they are all terminal patients at Community General.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When gentile Del falls for Risa Glickman, who only dates Jewish men, he takes drastic measures to pretend that he is Jewish.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Nice Jewish Boy

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline discovers that Richard's father is a former vaudeville comic, Ben Karinsky and tries to reunite him with a reluctant Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline observes that her pet cat Salty is troubled, she consults her veterinarian boyfriend, Joe, who suggests taking Salty to an eccentric cat therapist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie's mother shows up on Annie's doorstep with suitcase in hand, Caroline finds herself caught in the middle.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Another side of Caroline's artistic expression -- her dream of being a ballerina -- is revealed when she is locked in a laundromat overnight with a homeless man.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Joe's romance takes a nosedive when his ex-girlfriend Lisa returns from her Greenpeace mission and seeks shelter at Joe's apartment.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie's sister Donna visits New York in hopes of resurrecting her career, she finds the love letter Richard hid from Caroline and decides that setting the lyrics to music could be her next big hit, forcing Richard to feel slightly off-key.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Del brings one of Richard's paintings to a posh country club to impress a girl, but the best impresssion is made on a wealthy socialite, much to Richard's delight.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline cheers Richard on when he gets the chance to win big money by making the half-court free-throw shot at a New York Knicks game.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard finds himself in a life-or-death predicament when Caroline aims to boost the value of his work by convincing an influential art columnist that Richard is a deceased artist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feels that Annie consistently chooses the men in her life over their friendship and challenges Annie to take a girls-only trip, but chaos ensues when they take a trip together and both girls find romance at a local ski resort.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline, who is trying to face single life bravely, tries her hand at an evening on the town alone, with a little coaching from Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline supports Del in his efforts to expand business for her "Caroline in the City" cartoon strip and merchandise.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline's naive, helpful nature comes out in full bloom when she starts catering to her new elderly neighbor, Miriam, but Annie thinks Caroline is being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that only one newspaper in the country has not renewed her cartoon strip, she obsesses on the matter until finally convincing herself to face the editors in person.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline has difficulty confronting her neglectful building superintendent, Mr. Tedescu about her faulty plumbing, so she hires a mediator to pressure Mr. Tedescu into taking care of her request.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard is stunned when his former love Julia informs him that she is about to be married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: In the ongoing charade of Caroline pretending that she and Richard are married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: A remorseful Caroline panics when she realizes that several hours have passed since she poured her heart out to Richard on his answering machine -- and she hasn't heard a response from him.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline realizes that the constant aching in her neck could be related to the stress she feels over her unresolved feelings toward Richard, but she doesn't let it get in the way of helping Richard navigate through troubled waters with Julia.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feigns having read a writer’s novel to impress him, but their first date is a disaster as Caroline’s charade crumbles. Meanwhile, Richard jumps to Julia’s rescue when her waitress job at Remo’s leaves her customers hungry for attention.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that she’s been receiving free cable, her honesty with the cable company gets her into deep trouble with her not-so-truthful neighbors.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie is visited by her old singing teacher, Miss McGowan, Caroline helps Annie pretend to still have her “Cats” role, an act that may have a surprise ending.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: It’s a game of messy politics when Caroline will not endorse a local councilman, who is inspired by her comic strip, while Del conjures up a promotional campaign.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Discreetly planning to ease Caroline’s homesick holiday blues, Richard (Malcolm Gets) goes to great lengths to get a gift for Caroline that inspires suspicion in Julia (Sofia Milos) and sleuthing from Caroline and Annie.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Used Car Salesman

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Informed by Annie (Amy Pietz) of Caroline’s (LeaThompson) unspoken love for him, Richard (Malcolm Gets) confronts Caroline, who tells him that it’s a thing of the past.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Love That Dare Not Speak Its Name

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) is tapped as a celebrity guest star for a quiz show, her jitters prompt Richard (Malcolm Gets) to help her study, much to Julia’s (Sofia Milos) chagrin.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) tries to convince an insecure Del(Eric Lutes) that he has the potential to be a great parent after Del is shocked to discover that he is the father of a 10-year old girl.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Julia (Sofia Milos) tells Caroline (Lea Thompson) that it’s not easy being on the outside of her close working relationship with Richard (Malcolm Gets), Caroline quickly, and mysteriously, learns what it’s like to walk a mile in Julia’s shoes.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: As Caroline (Lea Thompson) struggles with commitment issues over Trevor, Richard(Malcolm Gets) inadvertently causes a rift between Caroline and her new beau.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline (Lea Thompson) is insulted by a local cabbie, Adamo, she takes her case to higher powers at the travel commission. Meanwhile, Richard, frustrated by a “painter’s block,” becomes obsessed with computers when he joins a cyber cafe.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline’s (Lea Thompson)mother, Margaret Duffy (guest star Edie McClurg, “The Hogan Family”), visits Caroline for a mother-daughter People magazine shoot, tensions rise over unexpressed feelings.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Visit From The Mom

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline (Lea Thompson) must hire a new cartoon colorist when Richard (Malcolm Gets) finally quits after he and Julia (Sofia Milos) move into their glamorous new home.
programme.sub-title: Caroline and the Marriage Counselor, Pt. 1

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: The fourth-season opener finds Caroline (Lea Thompson) and Richard (Malcolm Gets) savoring their first passionate kiss and preparing for romance.
programme.sub-title: Caroline And The Guys In The Bathroom

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Vengeful father-in-law Mr. Mazzone strips Richard (Malcolm Gets) of all his worldly possessions, forcing Richard to take temporary refuge in Caroline's (Lea Thompson) new office, where he runs afoul of Plum, the no-nonsense office manager.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After Caroline (Lea Thompson) inadvertently offends office manager Plum (guest star Nancy Lenehan, "Grace Under Fire"), she and Richard (Malcolm Gets) are banished to a damp, dark basement office.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: After Annie (Amy Pietz) loses her boyfriend, her job and her agent, she impulsively accepts a date with her local drycleaner, Gil (guest star Ken Campbell),and spends an evening to remember.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a hilarious shock to the cabbies when Rev. Jim brings his new pet to the garage—an over-the-hill racehorse that he bought after cashing in on the 300-to-1 long shot. However, he soon finds that it’s impossible to housebreak a horse.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby faces a humorous predicament when it becomes obvious that one of the biggest talent managers in New York is representing him because of his prowess as a lover, and not for his ability as an actor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a protest against unsafe equipment, the cabbies go on strike, and Louie offers an unusual solution to the problem to shop steward Elaine.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: In a hilarious caper, Louie and the cabbies pool all their cash to buy a painting at an auction, planning to cash in big when the artist dies—but when the bidding gets too heavy, the gang turns a dignified auction into a frolicking free-for-all.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie, the dispatcher, becomes a lovesick pup after his girlfriend finds another guy. He will stop at nothing to get her back, including recruiting Alex for his hilarious scheme—and the riotous shenanigans at the Sunshine Cab Co. never stop.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: It’s a riotous family reunion when Jim returns home to face his millionaire dad for the first time since he dropped out of society in the ‘60s, and Alex has his hands full with Jim’s voluptuous, overly amorous sister,

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s vicious letter to a hated critic is salvaged from the wastebasket and sent to the newspaper by a gleeful Louie, setting the stage for a wild and comical night when the critic, and the cabbies, decide to take in Bobby’s one-man play.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Latka Gravas is rejected by a young beauty, he sets out on an uproarious crash course to learn to be a swinging American Bachelor, a turnabout that works fantastically with the girls but turns off all of his friends at the garage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Jim turns into a soothsayer when he warns of a bizarre catastrophe to befall Alex that also involves an affair with a beautiful blonde.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang hits the bricks in a hilarious hunt for new jobs when the Sunshine Cab. Co. goes out of business, with the promise that they will meet at Mario’s in one month to review their experiences.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies discover that life on the outside is not so rosy when the Sunshine Cab Co. shuts down. They all end up hilariously assuming new careers.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie turns into a jealous romantic when his overtures to accompany Elaine on her European vacation are rejected. Instead, Alex becomes the pretty cabbie's holiday companion on a tour of Europe's hot spots—culminating in a romantic rendezvous.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Riotous confusion prevails when Latka Gravas' split personalities prompt Elaine and Alex to take him to a psychiatrist's office, where the predicament takes on a wild new twist as Latka takes on Alex's personality.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Cabbie Jim Ignatowski's legendary psychic powers hilariously thrust him into the hectic world of television programming when he predicts that a TV show will be a hit.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie, at Zena's behest, comforts a girl with boyfriend woes, which leads to zany romantic tangles. Zena's rejected friend uses Louie's narrow shoulders to cry on, unleashing an unexpected comedy adventure that grants him some macho bragging rights.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie the dispatcher is gleeful, but Alex is aghast when the romantic affair between Alex and the new waitress at Mario's is complicated by another suitor.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Louie's mother announces her plans to remarry, the panicked dispatcher threatens to sever all ties with her unless she cancels the marriage.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A jubilant Tony returns to boxing as the manager of a young heavyweight, thrilling Louie, who anticipates recouping his wagering losses to Alex by betting against Banta's boxer.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie carries his actions and insults too far, prompting Elaine to enlist help from a women's organization. Soon, the dispatcher's lecherous laughter is transformed into comical pleading when he is booted out of his job.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Joy blossoms at the Sunshine Cab Co. when a triumphant Bobby Wheeler returns to proclaim that he's landed a TV series role. Louie, in his own charming way, puts a damper on the celebration.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The pretty new cabbie proves to be more than Alex can handle when she leaves the meter running, in an attempt to lure him into romance.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A young runaway wreaks havoc at the Sunshine Cab Co. when Alex and Elaine encourage the lad to return home. Jim wants to adopt him, and Louie wants the youngster jailed for not paying his fare.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Romance and merriment are on the menu for Tony and Alex when they double-date gorgeous twin models at a posh restaurant, only to have the intimate group grow to a crowd with the unwelcome additions of Jim and Alex's ex-wife.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Tony begins working with a new cabbie, Lucius, a former football player. Lucius inspires Tony to try to get his boxing license reinstated.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Ring the bells! Spread the word! Latka Gravas and Simka Dahblitz are getting married, and the dingy Sunshine Cab Co. garage is transformed into a chapel of beauty for the social event of the cabbies' season.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The unflappable Jim gets an unexpected jolt when a wrecking ball crashes through the wall of his condemned apartment. A disaster ensues when he is forced to move in with Louie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The drivers bare their souls, recalling those moments in their lives when fate caused them to detour from the street of dreams down the alley to becoming a cabbie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: As Elaine nears a decision on her future, the cabbies reminisce about those glorious things that "might have been" had fate not sent them down that treacherous road to the Sunshine Cab Co.

programme.title: PGA Tour Originals
programme.desc: In 2018, Bud Cauley was in a life-threatening car accident that derailed his career. This is his story.

programme.title: PGA Tour Originals
programme.desc: The Tito's Shorties Classic returns with Keith Mitchell, Charley Hull, Jake Knapp and Ben Griffin.

programme.title: 2008 AT&T Byron Nelson
programme.desc: Reliving the 2008 AT&T Byron Nelson, where Adam Scott prevailed over Ryan Moore in a playoff.

programme.title: PGA TOUR -- The Drop
programme.desc: Diving into the intensity of tournament play, previewing what's ahead and recapping storylines; giving fans a unique look at the players on and off the course.

programme.title: The CUT
programme.desc: Scottie Scheffler prepares to defend at THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson. Aaron Rai's win at the PGA Championship.

programme.title: Gary Woodland Wins the 2026 Texas Children's Houston Open
programme.desc: Gary Woodland wins for the first time in over 6 years and just 2 1/2 years removed from brain surgery.

programme.title: 2023 THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson - Final Round
programme.desc: Revisit final round action from THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson event.

programme.title: THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson 2025 ----- Sunday
programme.desc: Watch the final round of THE CJ CUP Byron Nelson 2025 at TPC Craig Ranch.

programme.title: PGA TOUR Backspin
programme.desc: Watch the latest highlights from the best players in the world from courses around the PGA TOUR.

programme.title: The Starter
programme.desc: Catch up on all the latest happenings on the PGA TOUR with feature content on the best players in the world.

programme.title: 2024 Kaulig Companies Championship
programme.desc: Relive the 2024 Kaulig Companies Championship, where Ernie Els won his third of three events that season.

programme.title: Brian Harman Wins the Valero Texas Open
programme.desc: Brian Harman persevered through a weather-dominated final round to win his 4th PGA TOUR event.

programme.title: Keegan Bradley Wins BMW Championship
programme.desc: Keegan Bradley captures his seventh PGA TOUR victory after winning the 2024 BMW Championship. Bradley was the last man in the field for the second leg of the FedExCup Playoffs.

programme.title: Adam Schenk Wins the 2025 Butterfield Bermuda Championship
programme.desc: Adam Schenk wins for the first time on the PGA TOUR in his 243rd start at Port Royal Golf Course in Bermuda.

programme.title: 2025 Trophy Hassan II
programme.desc: Watch PGA TOUR Champions action from Royal Golf Dar Es Salam in Rabat, Morocco.

programme.title: Escape to the Country

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Hangover
programme.desc: I kjølvannet av Angelinas overraskende forlovelse blir hun uenig med Jenni, og 'megleren' Mike hopper inn. Men det slår feil og turen holder på å ta slutt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Gjenforeningsspesialen, første del.
programme.desc: Kystkompisene gjenforenes for å gå gjennom nok en episk ferie. Justina Valentine er programleder. Gjengen vil unngå dyptgående spørsmål fra fansen og har drikkeleker. Angelinas forlovelse truer med å ødelegge familien.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Gjenforeningsspesialen, andre del
programme.desc: Kystkompisene gjenforenes for å gå gjennom nok en episk ferie. Justina Valentine er programleder. Gjengen vil unngå dyptgående spørsmål fra fansen og har drikkeleker. Angelinas forlovelse truer med å ødelegge familien.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Mothership
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til fjellet, men noe merkelig på himmelen avbryter moroa. Er dette nok en klassisk skøyerstrek, eller er festen endelig over?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Code Word: Lasagna
programme.desc: Etter 11 lange år får samboerne en sjokkerende overraskelse når Sammi 'Sweetheart' kommer tilbake. Kommer hun med gammel bagasje eller en ny start?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Code Word: Lasagna
programme.desc: Etter 11 lange år får samboerne en sjokkerende overraskelse når Sammi 'Sweetheart' kommer tilbake. Kommer hun med gammel bagasje eller en ny start?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Mothership
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til fjellet, men noe merkelig på himmelen avbryter moroa. Er dette nok en klassisk skøyerstrek, eller er festen endelig over?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Sweetest Birthday
programme.desc: Pauly D får smeltet kjøttbollene. Sammis fødselsdag får Vinny til å føle seg litt salt. Da det banker på døren, står alle på tærne.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Meatball Stakeout
programme.desc: En overraskende gjest dukker opp i Poconos. Kjøttbollene og Sammi rigger en plan. Samboerne drar til Atlantic City for å se Pauly snurre plater. Turen får en uventet vri da dna-resultater avsløres.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Charcuterie Party
programme.desc: Guido-ene overtar Atlantic City, og Pauly tar opp kontakten med en gammel venn. Men moroa tar slutt når Snookis småkjøttfest blir dramatisk.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Margarita Problems!
programme.desc: Mike starter en etterforskning rundt omstendighetene om Angelinas biologiske far, og fortsetter å røre i gryta da etterdønningene av kjøttfesten slår til.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Fasten Your Seatbelt
programme.desc: Deenas agenda for første dag med familiemoro inneholder familiebilder, margaritaer og en felles middag. Angelina og Mike setter seg ned for å snakke.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Sammi's New Man
programme.desc: Pauly knekker Guido-moten. Vinny får en uventet gjest. Deena og Angelina prøver å rense luften. Kjæresten til Sammi kommer til byen for å treffe gjengen for første gang.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Strip Steak
programme.desc: Sammis nye mann har kommet, og romkameratene setter ham på prøve. I tillegg drar gjengen på et eventyr til et av favorittstedene sine, strippeklubben.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Deena Makes a Friend
programme.desc: Dirty Stay Outs tar over strippeklubben, og Deena får en ny venn. Ronnie drar til Orlando for første gang på to år, for å gjøre opp for seg.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Frozen Pizza And Margaritas
programme.desc: Ronnie gjør opp for seg, og romkameratene slutter fred. Samtidig blir Snooki stresset av Angelina og Jennis drama.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Tequila and Theories
programme.desc: Mike fortsetter å lete etter faren til Angelina. Festløvene skaper kaos i Orlando. Gjengen har en masse teorier å forklare.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Dirty Try Out
programme.desc: MVP får lære sannheten om jorden. Sammi prøver å bli en partyfyr. Og Angelina ønsker svar av Mike.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Just Flip the Table
programme.desc: Turen er over. Kommer 'the Situation' seg ut av Orlando i live? Blir Sammi en snuskete festløve?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: Familien er tilbake for å godtgjøre sine største ferietabber og avsløre store kysthemmeligheter - hvilke samboere datet i sin tid?! Pluss en hemmelig gjest etterlater kjøttbollene sparkende og skrikende - Jersey Shores familieferies gjenforening!

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: A loss is mourned and a baby is born, as the Camdens recover from the death of Annie's mother.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: When a church in a Black neighborhood is burned to the ground, the Camdens feel the fire of racism licking at their door.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy enters a haunted house and leaves with a new friend...the town boogieman!

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary's so embarrassed by her family's overly enthusiastic support in the stands, that she doesn't want them attend her basketball games.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric has been spotted at a downtown hotel with a beautiful woman and the whole town is talking.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: When Annie and Matt are held up at gunpoint, they're robbed of their money and their sense of security.
programme.sub-title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil, Speak No Evil

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Aunt Julie comes to visit for Thanksgiving and brings her drinking problem with her.
programme.sub-title: The Last Call for Aunt Julie

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt's new girlfriend seeks refuge from the divorce wars amongst his warm and loving family.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Plans for Lucy’s surprise birthday party backfire and Happy has puppies.
programme.sub-title: With a Little Help from My Friends

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: When Mary steals a glass, Matt takes the rap and gets busted.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric's desire to adopt a young runaway may create a permanent rift with his own father.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: When mom and dad go camping, the kids throw a party and quickly lose control.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: The school bully experiences a severe lapse in judgment when he tries to bully Mary.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Camille, a beautiful girl with a wild reputation, befriends Mary, and starts to influence her behavior.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric puts his job on the line to help an ex-con with his problems.
programme.sub-title: Faith, Hope and the Bottom Line

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric's parents come to visit and almost lose their newly adopted son George.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy's best friend moves away, while Annie's best friend from high school returns and makes a pass at Matt.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Annie blows a fuse when her recently widowed father comes to town with his new girlfriend. Wait till she finds out that Mary’s new boyfriend has a son.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: Armor of God 2: Operation Condor
programme.desc: Eventyreren i Jackie Chans skikkelse er tilbake i en ny jakt etter en bortgjemt skatt, skjult i ørkenen av nazistene før andre verdenskrig. Men Jackie og kompanjongen hans Ada er ikke de eneste som leter etter skatten...

programme.title: The Shaolin Plot
programme.desc: En brutal prins er fast bestemt på å samle alle kampsportmanualer. Etter å ha fått tak i alle unntatt to, finner han på en dristig plan for å få tak i de strengt bevoktede som befinner seg i Shaolin-tempelet. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: The Killer Meteors
programme.desc: Hua Wu Bin blir kalt The Killer Meteor takket være hans unike hemmelige kampkunster, som har gjort ham til en helt i hjemtraktene. Når en adelsmann blir forgiftet av sin kone, blir Hua leid inn for å få tak i en kur og beseire henne.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Donatello, Rafael, Michelangelo og Leonardo er muterte, grønne ninja-skilpadder som elsker pizza og lever under New Yorks gateplan. Derifra tar de opp kampen mot den ondskapsfulle forbryteren Shredder og hans armé av svartkledde krigere.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
programme.desc: Det hele begynner med en at en magisk spire transporterer deres gode venn April gjennom tid og rom, helt til samuraienes Japan. Leonardo og gjengen drar med en gang etter henne, og må nå beseire den onde Lord Naringa for å redde April.

programme.title: Shaolin Wooden Men
programme.desc: Etter å ha vært vitne til drapet på sin far, trener «Little Mute» i Shaolin-tempelet for å ta hevn, der han blir undervist av ulike lærere. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Dragon Lord
programme.desc: Jakten på kjærligheten og rampestrekene til Dragon og barndomsvennen Buller blir avbrytt når de hører at en gjeng begynner å smugle kinesiske nasjonal skatter utenlands. Denne filmen vises uten undertekster.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets in hot water with parents when his nutrition lecture at an elementary school turns into a sex talk.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob uses a questionable friend to get Reggie a great deal on a new freezer. John acts as a sex therapist for the Bennetts, an 80-year-old couple having difficulties because of Mr. Bennett's newly revived libido.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie and Chris compete for John's affection. Linda takes Margaret out for a night on the town.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John sits on his fire escape, smoking a cigar, the smoke from which is wafting into Chris's open window directly above.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: As John and Jake chat about Chris at the diner, Bob rushes in and announces that he just saw Chris naked when he went to fix her faucet.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has a videotape of a French film that he plans to use to lure Chris into coming over to his place.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker tries to discourage a friend from expressing interest in Chris by telling him that she is gay.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris is in the kitchen when a robber enters.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the office, Margaret reveals to Linda that it's her ten-year anniversary of working for Dr. Becker.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, John expresses his repulsion for all the Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: One of John's patients, a high school student named Brad, comes in for a physical and John learns that the guy's sexually active, but isn't practicing safe sex. John performs an HIV test on Brad and tries to convince him to begin practicing safe sex.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.
programme.sub-title: I’ve Got Friends I Haven’t Used Yet

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: When a customer leaves the diner because of John's cigarette smoke, Chris puts her foot down and tells him that it is now a "smoke-free" restaurant.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John arrives at the diner and announces that he has quit smoking.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chris' ex-husband, Roger, is in town and comes to the diner to see her.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: The fire marshal threatens to fine Chris for a faulty sprinkler system at the diner, but Chris flirts her way out of it.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John has a dream that he and Chris kissed each other. At the office, Linda is late and tells Margaret it's because her cab got hit by a runaway hotdog cart.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Highlights from last season include Chris and John exchanging "I love yous" as Chris is wheeled into surgery for an appendectomy.
programme.sub-title: What’s Love Got To Do With It?

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake bemoans his poor financial status, and Hector proposes that he participates in a drug-testing program to earn money.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Chris and John have their first impromptu date, but Chris wants something more formal before taking the relationship any further, and tells John so.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Hitler Uncovering His Fatal Obsession: Time is Blood 1942-5
programme.desc: Episode 2 begins after the desperate German winter of 1941. Yet 1942 began badly for the Soviets, with more vicious Nazi campaigning seeing millions more Russians captured and starved.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: They are iconic weapons: the Tommy Gun, Uzi, and today’s MP5. Invented to break WWI stalemates, the submachine gun revolutionized warfare and culture. Host Wil Willis explores its evolution, firing the Thompson and BAR.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Liberation & Revenge
programme.desc: 1945 frigjør soldater fra den Røde Hæren Auschwitz-Birkenau. Når andre befrielsene finner sted i de påfølgende månedene, blir verden sjokkert.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Aftermath
programme.desc: In WWII's final months, Allies discover Nazi death camps, prompting a sweeping denazification of Germany post-war. Nuremberg trials convict top Nazis. Former Nazis are employed by the West in the Cold War struggle against the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Today’s infantry demands a weapon combining machine gun firepower with rifle accuracy and mobility.. Host Wil Willis traces this journey through iconic firearms.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: Special Forces operate deep behind enemy lines with top-of-the-line weapons.Host Wil Willis tests the Sig Sauer P226, the preferred choice like the Mark 25 by Navy SEALs, against competitors like the H&K Compact Tactical.

programme.title: Secret War: The Scholar and the Fight for Greece
programme.desc: Monty Woodhouse, a professor and a legend for blowing up the Gorgopotamos Bridge in Greece in 1942. In the British counter attack against Rommell at Al Alamein in North Africa it was vital to disrupt German supply routes, Greece.
programme.sub-title: The Scholar and the Fight for Greece

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Seizing Power
programme.desc: In 1930s Germany, Hitler capitalizes on economic woes blaming the Weimar Government and Jews. Despite scandals, Nazi rallies gain popularity and emerge as the largest party. Hitler becomes Chancellor in 1933, using the 'Enabling Act' to seize power.

programme.title: Secret War: The Banker, the Norwegians & the Bomb
programme.desc: Sir Charles attended Eton, and then joined the Coldstream Guards. He won the Military Cross on the Western Front and, having survived the war, returned to banking.
programme.sub-title: The Banker, the Norwegians & the Bomb

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Frenzied Killing
programme.desc: Flere mennesker blir drept i 1944 enn noen gang før på Auschwitz. Nazistene prøver å så forvirring blant de allierte i øst, og de vestlige allierte tar beslutninger om å forhandle med nazistene om jødene og bombe leiren.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: The activities of nations after World War I that lead to World War II.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Hitler's Killer Police
programme.desc: In Ukraine and Lithuania, Nazi invaders were welcomed as liberators. In Lithuania, Antanas Gecas led a militia that executed hundreds of Jews. Ukrainian nationalists participated in pogroms slaughtering 34,000 Jews in two days.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Gatling Gun, designed to change 19th-century battlefields, now reigns supreme in the skies as a high-speed offensive weapon. With a 150-year legacy of havoc it continues to be a formidable force.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Corruption
programme.desc: I 1943 er korrupsjonen løpsk på Auschwitz-Birkenau. Leiren får også en ny inntektskilde – klær og verdifulle eiendeler tatt fra jøder som kommer for å bli gasset.

programme.title: WWII's The Great Escapes: The Freedom Trails: Italy: Operation Galia
programme.desc: Monty’s journey sees him follow the path 33 SAS soldiers took after they were parachuted behind enemy lines to attack the enemy and create chaos to draw Nazi-fascist forces away from the front line.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: Germany makes critical errors during the bombing of Britain.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: In 1945, Germany is crumbly on both fronts. The Western Allies cross the Rhine and take most of Germany, while the Red Army quickly advances into Berlin. After Hitler's suicide, Germany surrenders and is divided among the allied powers.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Becoming Respectable
programme.desc: In 1924, Hitler is convicted for High Treason after the failed Nazi power grab. In prison, he writes Mein Kampf, articulating his anti-Semitic and expansionist beliefs. Upon release, Hitler rebrands the Nazi Party.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final 3 recreate some of Elle's most famous poses and there is a shock at elimination.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The winner of Britain's Next Top Model is decided in the first ever live final of the series.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson and the judges begin their search by holding auditions in Glasgow and London

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson and the judges Grace Woodward, Julien Macdonald and Charley Speed continue their UK tour, in Cardiff and Birmingham. They audition more girls hoping to make it in the world of modelling.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Grace Woodward, Julien Macdonald and Charley Speed judge the final round of auditions, giving hopefuls one last chance to secure a place at the boot camp

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls who have made it through the audition stage battle it out in boot camp. Twelve girls will be chosen to move into the house and the next stage of the competition.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls face their first challenge after moving into the house and learn there will be a double elimination this week. Janice Dickinson helps decide who will be the first two girls eliminated from the competition.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models are given complete makeovers before posing nude for a photo shoot. George Lamb joins the judging panel this week.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls have to pose with different birds of prey and tensions there ends up being tension between some of the girls. Jasmine Guinness joins the judging panel to decide who will be eliminated this week.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models go one-on-one interviews with The Wanted but for some girls the mistakes just keep coming. Fashion designer Henry Holland joins the judges at panel and it becomes time to rise and smize or become a catwalk casualty.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The seven remaining girls face another double elimination this week and find themselves being thrown in at the deep end. Katie Price joins the judges on the panel this week.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final five girls left in the running complete in a beauty shoot before preparing to fly off to Miami. In a dramatic turn of events one of the girls is left behind and her place in the contest becomes uncertain.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In Miami, the top four girls must try their hands at acting, before shaking their pompoms and becoming brides for the day

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: It's the penultimate week of the contest, and four girls remain. The quartet attend 'go sees' and complete the last photo shoot of the series. Who will make the final?

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: From thousands of hopefuls, just two remain to battle it out on the catwalk. Who will Elle Macpherson crown as Britain & Ireland's Next Top Model?

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 1
programme.desc: The show returns for an eighth series with 20 contestants all competing to impress judges Elle Macpherson, Tyson Beckford, Whitney Port and Julien Macdonald to win a contract with Models 1.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 2
programme.desc: The remaining 17 contestants meet with the judges for one-on-one interviews and are scheduled to have a photo shoot with camels in the desert, but it gets canceled due to a sandstorm.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 3
programme.desc: The 13 contestants move into the model house and have a housewarming party, where they are visited by Cycle 7 winner Jade Thompson.

programme.title: Man With A Plan

programme.title: Man With A Plan

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam needs to hire a new project manager, Andi accuses Adam of unconscious bias after he only interviews men for the job.

programme.desc: When the kids won't do their chores, Adam and Andi decide to go on strike too.

programme.title: Man With A Plan

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam takes his kids to work with him for the day, they accidentally give his biggest client lice. Also, Andi feels like a bad mom when she's the only one in the family not to get lice.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi agree on a present-free Valentine's Day, Adam gives the gift he planned for Andi to his mother instead.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi try to get back in their neighbors' good graces after no one shows up to their potluck.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam insists that pranks are harmless fun, Andi creates an elaborate hoax to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam is determined to figure out what Andi's hiding when he discovers she's been keeping secrets from him for his own good.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam is thrilled and honored to help Joe buy a new car but is caught off guard when Joe suddenly becomes irritable, and the negotiations go off track.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Don realize they need to bring in more business, they film a commercial advertising their company.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi set up Adam's boss on a date to boost her spirits in the hope that she'll then be in the mood to have Adam resume work on the mini-mall.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Andi proposes an exciting idea for Adam and her to go into business together when she isn't able to find work. Also, Adam tackles the most challenging job of his life - renovating Joe and Bev's (Swoosie Kurtz) kitchen.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam attempts to make the office feel more inviting since Andi will be joining him at work every day; Lowell hides a life-changing secret.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi have a disagreement at the office and must prevent it from becoming a problem at home; the kids try to extend Lowell's stay at their house after realizing he's an amazing cook.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The challenger is the first pizza expert to enter Kitchen Stadium. What pizza can he create with squid?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Shigeo Yuasa is the head chef of the Okayama International Hotel. With test tubes and litmus papers, Yuasa uses shocking cooking techniques to get his meals to exacting pH levels.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Chiyo Cho has the support from the people of Kobe as he challenges Iron Chef Chen to a titanic tofu tussle.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Called the 'Rokusaburo Michiba of the Atami region in Japan,' Challenger Kunio Santo battles it out with Iron Chef Sakai in the battle of clam.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Former challenger Kandagawa retaliates against the Iron Chefs by sending his head chef Keisuke Tamano. Tamano challenges Michiba to an ultimate grudge battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chairman Kaga welcomes Korean cuisine for the first time to Kitchen Stadium. Lee Myong Suk is the female evangelist of Korean cuisine in Japan.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The old and new of French cuisine battle each other. Challenger Isao Yanagidate opens the door to a long-term battle between Club Mistral and Club des Trentes.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Etsuo Joh, the god of sauces in classic French cuisine, takes on the Iron Chef Japanese, Rokusaburo Michiba.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chairman Kaga invites the very first diner cook to compete at Kitchen Stadium. Katsuo Omiya, trained in the French tradition, challenges Iron Chef Sakai to a tearful battle!

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Dissatisfied with the results of their last encounter, Club Mistral is back for a rematch. Kazutaka Okabe challenges Sakai to a rematch of extreme grandeur.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: In this battle of blue crab, Challenger Akaboshi Sou, a favorite cook of the royal family, takes on Iron Chef Michiba.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Esteemed chef and owner of the Italian restaurant Sabatini in Roppongi has sent his protégé Yukihiro Noda to go head-to-head with Iron Chef Chen in a fierce battle of sardines.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: In the battle of sole at Kitchen stadium, Iron Chef Sakai faces off against Chef Takayoshi Kawai who heads the kitchen of the Pan Pacific Hotel in San Francisco.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Returning to Kitchen Stadium is the prestigious and young Japanese chef Haruyoshi Omino. Omino's specialty is creating formal Japanese dishes and will go up against the French-trained Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chef Li Jinlun, the world-renowned master of Cantonese food from the prestigious Mandarin Oriental Hotel in Japan, heads to Kitchen Stadium to battle against Iron Chef Chen.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: How will Iron Chef Sakai fight in this battle against Shinichi Suematsu, a nature-loving challenger from Nara who's known for his one-of-a-kind Italian dishes?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Cooking show celebrity Hisama Hirano is invited to Kitchen Stadium to go head-to-head with Iron Chef Chen.
programme.sub-title: Sea Urchin: Battle to the Death

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: One of the fastest-rising chefs from Kyoto, the ancient capital of Japan, Chef Kenji Kaji is invited to battle with Iron Chef Michiba at Kitchen Stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Tonight's battle is a fierce tag-team event between the Cuomo brothers and Iron Chefs Sakai and Michiba. Who will come out as the champions in the Italian-inspired dual?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Female chef Yoshiko Takemasa is so fastidious that she only cooks fish caught by rods, not nets, to ensure no bruising.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Arthur bought his Cyclone new in 1967. Then, his father put 400,000 miles on it. Now, he wants FantomWorks to make it better than new. Antonio and his cousin Andres challenge Dan to build the fastest Mustang CS in Mexico.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Chris wants the 1950 F1 Truck he remembers from high school and Dean wants the 1968 Lincoln Continental he drove with his dad.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: David and Chuck want their family heirloom 1961 International Harvester Metro Van converted into a state-of-the-art restomod, with all the trimmings. David asks Dan to find and restore a very specific car he’s always wanted: a 1966 Lincoln Convertible.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: 67 Hemi GTX Convertible Resurrected
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Sean asks Dan to find a 1969 Camaro that can be built into the custom restomod of his dreams. Jeff wants to give his 1969 Cutlass a rare Hurst makeover, but the engine has never run and there are more parts in boxes than on the car.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Bo put his 1970 Corvette into storage thirty years ago. Dan discovers that the car needs repair of decades old vandalism. Steve’s 1964 GTO was smashed in an accident. Dan agrees to try and bring his mangled GTO back from beyond the grave.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Dude, Where's Allysa's Car?
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Jerry shows up with a car in pieces, a U-Haul full of parts and a dream of a perfect Plymouth Business Coupe that desperately needs Dan’s help. Bill asks Dan to find him a 1972 Gran Sport and to restore it with hard-to-find features.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Kansas City Royals pitcher Tim Collins wants a ‘super-fast’ 1968 Mustang, but Dan has to first undo a nightmare combination of bad repairs and unsafe systems. Bob needs a FantomWorks reality check to get his beloved 1950 Willy’s Jeep back on the road.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Charles wants Dan to find him a 1967 Corvette with a set-up that’s rare as hen’s teeth. Bob’s 1973 Cuda has been stored for most of its life – but even in storage time takes a heavy toll.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Emmett believes his 1964 Barracuda is all original. But Dan finds out that the car has hidden damage and a past that nobody expected. Velvet wants Dan to get her 1953 Studebaker Commander running as a surprise for her husband, Travis.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Walter loves the fast and futuristic look of his 1975 Bricklin. Unfortunately, the car drives like something from the dark ages. Dan restores a 1963 Split Window Corvette for a pair of owners who know him well – his Uncle Carl and Aunt Claire.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and team at Muscle Cars of Texas go under the hood of the 69 Malibu. The 63 Z06 factory race car, you have to see what it takes to make this race car look like it came out of the factory. Tagging and bagging time on the 72 Corvette.

programme.title: The Ride Life
programme.desc: Sung's dive into the world's car cultures takes him to Poland, a country that emerged from a repressive communist era. Sung finds that new freedoms have led to an explosion of optimist and energy, and one of the most exciting experiences of his life.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team at Muscle Cars of Texas are working in the paint booth on the Malicious Intent. The 1966 Mustang is sanding out the car to get it ready for the paint booth. The 86 Camaro is being converted into a sniper system under the hood.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Mickey’s 1970 Chevelle is perfect, but he wants FantomWorks to tear it apart and upgrade everything to make it his own. Thom’s 1963 Studebaker is a project car with a nightmare combination of leaks, bad parts and a rusted-out floor held together by glue.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team at Muscle Cars of Texas work on gluing the front panel on the 442 Restomod. This 67 Mercury Cougar has some issues with the rear brake pads.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas
programme.desc: Vinnie and the team at Muscle Cars of Texas take you on a tour of what is happening in the shop. Replacing the front end of a 64 Corvette resto mod. Painting racing stripes on a 67 442 convertible. A yellow Camaro underneath the hood of this car.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Daytona vs. Hellcat
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: What We Do for a Buck
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.
programme.sub-title: What We Do for a Buck

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Michael wants a new convertible top for his 1953 Morgan, but the Fantomworks team has no reference, no template and no anchor points. Butch entrusted his 1969 Camaro to a restoration rip-off artist. Can Fantomworks fix the worst work they’ve ever seen?
