programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark pose as priests in order to re-open an abandoned church as a shelter when a major fire breaks out in a neighborhood.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Wally is a hobo and street puppeteer whose caring and goodness have made him an angel without him knowing it.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A struggling pianist tries to start life again after a heart attack.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: High school seniors hope they get the dates they want for prom.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An estranged daughter is writing a vengeful expose about her mother, a much-beloved movie star.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark visit a halfway house for people who were confined to mental facilities but released because they were deemed no longer a danger to society.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A Vietnam vet is denied government assistance, despite having lost a leg and an arm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work as police detectives in a school. Their assignment: to investigate drug selling.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A fisherman's livelihood is in jeopardy because of the amount of time he devotes to his comatose son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A young man learns that the girl he's in love with is pregnant.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A lonely spy-story writer buys her murdered hero's sports car, which comes complete with his ghost.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A cold-hearted businessman is given the opportunity to relive the last week of his life. And he tries to do the right thing this time.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A runaway dog unites a boy in an orphanage with its human family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The orphan boy has formed an attachment to the dog, although he is going away to living with a new foster family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A trainer is reminded of his own shady past when a fighter he's been mentoring is asked to take a fall.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark must help a doctor confront a secret he's kept from everyone, including his own family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Jonathan helps a little boy get over his fears, and in the process, get even with his older sister!
programme.sub-title: I Was a Middle Aged Werewolf

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: John Thompson wants to get the mail out during the winters and comes up with creative ways to make it happen.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Doc Adams considers it a threat to both him and his patients when a woman doctor arrives to become his replacement.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A gunman kills a young challenger and becomes a target for revenge—from his own son, as well as the victim's family.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: In the conclusion of a two-part episode, Ben Snow tries to get his long-hidden gold back to civilization to use in fighting an old enemy.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Justin Gates must save a boy deathly ill after swallowing a concoction offered by a medicine man.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A cattle baron and a legendary frontiersman involve Marshal Matt Dillon in their life-and-death dispute over a hat.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A notorious gang of marauders known as The Dog Soldiers swears vengeance against Matt Dillon for the execution of one of their members.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured Western hero to lure tourists into his dying town.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The saga regarding the need for and development of blue jeans by Levi Strauss during the California Gold Rush.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A mine operator insists on having his workers continue in unsafe conditions that are prone to cave-ins.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Culture comes to a mining town with the arrival of a piano, but nobody knows how to play it.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Two prospectors play a cruel joke: they offer a friend shares in their mine if he'll marry the homely Aggie.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The Emperor of Brazil has an encounter with two imaginative youngsters while traveling to San Francisco.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Last Stand at Smoky Hill
programme.desc: Bat leads a group of hunters on a buffalo hunt believing huge herds have returned. When Earp learns the Apache have left their reservation to hunt them, he attempts to warn the group.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Judas Goat
programme.desc: A Deputy US Marshal from Topeka asks Earp to help capture a gang of outlaws led by Rocky Griswold.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Charlie Bates' dream about a hold-up becomes a reality — and he becomes the suspect.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A jack-of-all-trades man stumbles across a way to improve the water wheel.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Johnny Ringo recounts his rise as a gunslinger.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A greedy merchant creates panic by spreading rumors that the town's supply lines are cut off by snow.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Truth About Old Man Clanton
programme.desc: Wyatt Earp heads south to make peace when he learns that Old Man Clanton has sent his men into Mexico to rob the silver trains and steal the cattle of wealthy Mexican rancher Don Sebastian.
programme.sub-title: The Truth About Old Man Clanton

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Doc Fabrique's Greatest Case
programme.desc: Shotgun's mule Roscoe is sick and he wants Dr. McCarty to help. When he says the mule is drunk, Earp decides to call Doc Fabrique from Wichita to help.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A wounded Matt Dillon loses his memory and falls in love with an attractive widow.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Caught by a Whisker
programme.desc: Two brothers decide to rob the Dodge City State National Bank. However, a new alarm bell in the bank and a wise Earp expecting them pose problems for the men getting away.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Stagecoach driver Abe Williamson hunts down two outlaws who robbed his stagecoach.
programme.sub-title: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A princess agrees to be treated by a medical pioneer who uses a new method: blood transfusion.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A dramatization of the life of hat manufacturer John Stetson.
programme.sub-title: The Hat That Wore the West

programme.title: Harlequin: Hard to Forget
programme.desc: Privatdetektiv Max etterforsker Sandra Applewhites død og er overbevist om at hennes ektemann John Gilman drepte henne. Når han møter Sandras tvillingsøster Nicky, ber han henne om hjelp til å avsløre Gilman. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Diamond Girl
programme.desc: Playboy-advokaten Denny ser aldri på sin kjedelige og lojale assistent Claire Bernard. Men når han oppdager at Claire er en uslipt diamant, bestemmer han seg for å forvandle henne til en fortryllende skjønnhet. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Sarah og Amy er bestevenner for livet og nå arrangerer de sin første kunstutstilling i en liten by i New England. Når en mystisk fremmed dukker opp, starter et mysterium med narkotika, CIA og Sarahs elskede onkel. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Loving Evangeline
programme.desc: Robert får vite om sin brors dødelige båtulykke som får han til å dra for å hente liket. Der møter han Evie Shaw som er eieren av marinaen. Han blir besatt av sin brors mistenkelige død... og av Evie. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Recipe for Revenge
programme.desc: Caterer Carly Westin agrees to prepare a feast for a friend who wants to impress a man. But the couple is killed when she is in the kitchen. When police investigator Jack Brannigan gets involved, he must protect Carly before the killer strikes again.

programme.title: Harlequin: A Change of Place
programme.desc: When troubled twin Dominique asks her bookish sister Kimberly to assume her role for a month as a glamorous Parisian model, Kimberly hesitates.

programme.title: Harlequin: Another Woman
programme.desc: Da Lisa våkner på sykehuset, husker hun ingenting:at mannen hennes Paul vil skille seg fra henne, eller at hun ble brutalt slått og etterlatt for å dø. Når Paul tar henne med hjem, må Lisa lære alt på nytt. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Treacherous Beauties
programme.desc: Anne mistenker at broren Alans død ikke var en ulykke. Hun begynner å jobbe for en familie som kan ha hatt en finger med i spillet, men blir snart forelsket i den eldste sønn. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: Broken Lullaby
programme.desc: En foreldreløs jentes (Mel Harris) jakt etter fortiden begynner med et barndomsbilde av henne selv ved siden av en sjelden spilledåse, og fører henne til en lokkende skattejeger. NB Denne filmen vises uten norske undertekster.

programme.title: Harlequin: At the Midnight Hour
programme.desc: En vakker barnepike(Liz) fanger oppmerksomheten Richard, en enkemann og vitenskapsmann, og hans begavede sønn Andy. Liz' liv blir truet når hun kommer for nær sannheten om hvem som drepte den tidligere hans frue. NB Denne filmen vises uten norsketekster.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' lider Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av 'Konsertforvirring', får smaken på 'Søvnsnacks' og flykter fra noen 'Hissige sammenstøt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og medvert Lolo Wood det tøft når de flytter ut og blir 'Såre flyttefolk', møter noen nye medarbeidere som er 'Dumme på jobben' og finner ut at det er greit å gi opp i 'Vi kutter ut'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på trynet i gresset idet de 'Eter plen', blir veltrent og hårete med muskelforbundne 'Gymhunder' og går langt under null i 'Dypfryst moro'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en fare for seg selv i 'Selvfelling', drar på gymet for å få seg en 'Boksesekktrøkk' og går langt i å utfordre høydeskrekken med 'Elleville høyder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjør Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en smidig sorti over 'Sikkerhetsgjerder', trenger å rense bilinteriøret i 'Bil-kryp' og tester chuggekapasiteten i 'Styrterekyl'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne 'Ridiculousness' har Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med en spesiell gjest, Dee Snider, og møter rebeller i 'Tenker ikke å tåle det', opplever band som sliter i 'Kommer ikke til å slå gjennom' og blir nedstemt av spilt kaffe i 'Kaffetragedier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på konsekvensene ved å overse skilt i 'Skiltblind', lærer om merkelige ting som er 'Teknisk sett sant' og finner ut hvordan sprø ting blir 'Sprøere og sprøere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood syklister få seg en overraskelse i 'Uventede sykkelhinder', møter ondskapsfulle katter som viser 'Kattevrede' før de tar en titt på folk som setter hodet fast i 'Skallefeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg på 'Kostymekatastrofer', kommer i kontakt med 'Etikettefjerne folk' og blir vitner til 'Nære på-overganger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood se folk som snus opp ned av 'Påtvungne overslag', får seg en drink og to for mye med 'Pussa bestemødre' og finner ut grunnen til å unngå dansing med drinker i 'Ikke drikk og dans'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' med Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah får vi se strålende treffsikkerhet i 'Skallesnikskyting', finner ut av hva som er motsatt av å prestere under press i 'Vanære under press' og avslutter med noen 'Sjalu hjerter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' drar Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood for å skate med gjenstander på hjul som er 'Park-uforenlig', tar bilder og får seg en smell i 'Knipseattakk' og holder fast på verdisakene i møte med 'Mobile skurker'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood hvor ekstrem bordtennis kan være i 'Pinpongvondt', blir kilt, rosa, svart og blå i en 'Kiletrøkk' og får justert ryggraden med noen 'Bakoverbøyere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kommer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood farlig nær kanten i 'Uten kantfølelse', får bowlingvondt i 'Baneovertredelser' og trenger å slå av konsollen i 'Gamevrede'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood sinte i helt feil situasjoner i 'Malplassert raseri', stikker av fra flaue opplevelser med 'Skamsortier' og blir helt uspiselige på flyplassen i 'Terminaltroll'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood besøk av bestselgende forfatter Greg McKeown og gjør vanskelige ting 'Uten anstrengelse' og mister oversikten over hva som er viktig i 'Absolutt ikke essensielt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood smerte i vannparker i 'Vannparkskadet', møter par som elsker å gjøre stunt i 'Akropar' og ser på farene med fallende istapper i 'Risktapper'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I kveldens episode av 'Ridiculousness' sammenligner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood arr på haka i 'Hakesmeller', får se at drikking skader mer enn kjøring i 'Styrtdumt' før de ser på noen ville hoppere som 'Hopper uten å sjekke'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness feirer Rob, Steelo og Brooke Schofield mannehjernene i 'Guttesmart, er sammen med unike hunder i 'Merkelige bisker' og får uventet en smell i knollen i 'Hode mot hode'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' braser Rob, Steelo og Brooke Schofield gjennom døra i 'Pinefulle hjemkomster', samler jentene og får oppleve 'Partyjentepine' og ser på problemer med nettingdører i 'Unger mot skjermer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjør Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Skye Townsend opp og får oppleve 'Dumme vitser-kustus', raser over ende i 'Klubbfall' og ser på splitter nye biler som 'Taper verdi'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Skye Townsend i bakken på dansegulvet og opplever 'Dansesvie', får smarte tips av 'Oppfinnsomme fedre' og blir litt for opphisset av sport i 'Raserianfan'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood seg en dobbel dose med smerte i 'Smerteekko', møter noen onde bastarder i 'Barnehatende hunder' og blir satt ut av folk med 'Planløs langfinger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på folk som hviler i 'Liggende nedslag', blir frekke med eldre damer med sølvtunge i 'Bestemorsnert' og opplever fallskjermhoppere i trøbbel som gjør 'Tvilsomme hopp'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood å beskytte juvelene fra Penisslag', går fra dekk til dekk i 'Fra båt til båt' og blir blokkert i høytflyvende svev av 'Hopphinder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood fra stor høyde med folk som er 'Tyngdelovsikre', feirer romansen med 'Merkelig kjærlighetsspråk' og raser mot katastrofen i 'For raskt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' hopper Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood på sykkelen, men glemmer å holde 'Hendene på styret', finner belter til noen 'Bukseløse idrettsutøvere' og spiser lunsj på nifse restauranter med 'Frykt på menyen'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood høyhastighetsmoro i 'Snøet og tauet', opplever at elsparkesykling bør skje om dagen i 'Nattlig sparkesykling' og ser at du får en viss livsinnsikt når du har 'Lært av erfaring'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kaster Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood seg ut i skiløypene med litt 'Snøhjuling', utfordrer fedre i 'Fikser det ikke lenger' og blir gjennomvåte av 'Tristhetens bølger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hardt på isen i 'Frostbitere', klarer ikke å mestre hjulet med 'Hamstermenn' og får seg en humpete hjemtur i 'Ingen fyllekjøring i dag'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood besøk av komikerlegenden Pauly Shore og stiller tøffe spørsmål i 'Pauly går i dybden', ranes av fulle folk i 'Svekkede tyver' og får folk bort fra Vegas i 'Tilbake til Paulywood'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' mister Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ølen sin i noen 'Elendige båtkast', opplever folk som ikke klarer å skjule egne følelser i 'Null pokerfjes' og ser på skadene når ting er blitt 'Fyrverket'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood våte og ville i 'Vannsklie-kollisjoner', lærer å holde munn etter en 'Gudssmell på kjeften' og blir kastet av hesteryggen i 'Hestedropp'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kjører Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood terrengsykkel i 'Offroad-krasj', gjør ville triks på basketballbanen i 'Slurvete triksskudd' og opplever de to verste ordene i det engelske språket i 'Slangeoverraskelse'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på 'Farlige toaletter', spiller noen 'Kattepuss' og drar på 'Fuktige bilturer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood imot Yung Gravy og blir vitner til at cowboyer går i bakken i 'Landsens behandling', oppdager at scener er farlige i 'Danserfall' og møter noen heite eldre damer i 'Gravy-babes'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg en tur med 'Bæsjesteg', sjekker ut 'Fulle fall' og tester 'Kunstig Uintelligens'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah at varehus er farlige i 'Lagerskadet', blir terrorisert av kalkuner i 'Kalkunkrek' og møter folk som sier alt med ett blikk i 'Tause talere'.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når aspekter av Allisons drøm om å miste hele familien begynner å skje i virkeligheten, frykter hun at drømmen hennes kan gå i oppfyllelse.
programme.sub-title: Bring Me the Head of Oswaldo Castillo

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison og familien hennes må håndtere resultatene av hjerneoperasjonen hennes. Eieren av en lokal TV-stasjon ber også Devalos og Scanlon om å undersøke om sportsankeret hans blir forfulgt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir bekymret etter at Ariel begynner å vise merkelig oppførsel, og begynner å tenke at en myrdet stripper kan besitte henne.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Allisons kreftrammede venn dør uventet, mistenker hun at en sykehusansatt kan ha skylden. Bridgette skriver en historie veldig nær det som senere skjer på Joes jobbintervju.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir forvirret når hun begynner å se visjoner om merkelige symboler. Når en seriemorder slår Phoenix, oppdager hun at symbolene kan være ledetråder for å fange morderen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Et spedbarn blir kidnappet fra Allisons nabolag, og hun blir så fast bestemt på å finne barnet at Joe frykter at hun kan ha blitt besatt.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons mareritt utspiller seg i scener fra den klassiske filmen Night of the Living Dead, og får henne til å våkne opp med merkelige sår, men også med ledetråder i saken om et drap på en begravelsesagent.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison leier en SUV etter at bilen hennes er skadet, og hun oppdager at SUVens satellittradio lar henne lytte til andres samtaler.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Ariel begynner å date en gutt fra skolen, har Allison visjoner som indikerer at han kan være involvert i et lokalt mord.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Etter på merkelig vis å ha blitt følsom for lys, bruker Allison et par solbriller som viser merkelige tall som kan være relatert til folks forventede levealder.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons visjoner blir en viktig informasjonskilde for myndighetene når prøvene av en dødelig sykdom forsvinner. I mellomtiden tror Scanlon at han er klar til å fri til Lynn.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Hovedmistenkte i en drapssak dør, og politiet er overbevist om at han var skyldig. Men når den døde mannen kontakter Allison, sier han at han er uskyldig og at han vil hjelpe henne med å finne morderen.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når årsdagen for Devalos' datters død nærmer seg, blir Devalos hjemsøkt av minnene fra den traumatiske hendelsen, og Allison drømmer om hvor langt Devalos gikk for å sette datterens morder i fengsel.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om et schizofrent barn, men når hun møter henne i det virkelige liv, virker hun helt normal - men hun har en psykisk syk romkamerat.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison ser hele tiden ansiktet til en mann i ansiktene til andre mennesker, inkludert Joe, og må finne ut hvorfor. I mellomtiden har Ariel problemer med å sitte barnevakt for en rampete gutt.
programme.sub-title: Will the Real Fred Rovick Please Stand Up?

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison melder seg på selvforsvarskurs. I mellomtiden jobber Devalos med en tenårings voldtektssak, i tillegg til å undersøke et mistenkt mord som involverer en politimann.
programme.sub-title: How to Beat a Bad Guy

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Vi ser tilbake på Allison og Joes bryllup, og hvordan den økende styrken til Allisons "krefter" påvirket det snart gifte paret.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison og døtrene hennes har den samme drømmen om en merkelig jente som kan være knyttet til en rekke mord. I mellomtiden har Joe en ny konflikt med sjefen.
programme.sub-title: There Will Be Blood... Type A

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison oppdager at den merkelige jenta fra hennes og døtrenes drømmer er seriemorderens neste mål, og hun må beskytte jenta mot fare samtidig som hun prøver å samarbeide med henne for å fange morderen.
programme.sub-title: There Will Be Blood... Type B

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Elizabeth sends crates of books from Michaela's deceased father's collection, prompting her to open a public library. Many become alarmed at the content of some of the books and want to prevent people from reading them.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Brian rescues a man from a trap who has horrific burns to his face from a train crash. Michaela decides to perform reconstructive surgery to repair his face.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Cloud Dancing and the rest of the Cheyenne are told to move to a reservation where they would be dependent on handouts. Dr. Mike, Sully, and the children head to Washington to lodge a complaint and get the order changed.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Arriving in Washington, Dr. Mike and Sully find it difficult to find anyone to listen to their concerns. Sully is arrested for army desertion, while a plot against the president is overheard. Michaela must break Sully out of jail to expose the conspiracy.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When money becomes short for Sully, he tries everything to make ends meet rather than accept help from Dr. Mike.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully are traveling through dangerous Indian country when their stagecoach is robbed, and they are abandoned.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike discovers a lump in Dorothy's breast and tries to convince her to have surgery. Hank tries Ladies Night at the saloon, and Jake and Loren have a plan to get free drinks. Colleen deals with hurtful boyish pranks from classmates.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike has a hard time accepting Dorothy's decision not to have the surgery that will save her life. Jake tries to escape the two men who kidnapped him.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The town's Christmas spirit is in question when a family who are Jewish immigrants moves to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sully is appointed Indian agent to the Cheyenne and approaches it in an idealistic fashion. When the food intended for the tribe is diverted and illegal alcohol is plentiful, Sully becomes angry.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A newspaper report of a comet's imminent collision with Earth causes hysteria in town over the end of the world.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Sam Lindsay, an older independent woman, decides to end her medical treatment and take off into the wilderness.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Colleen and Brian's biological father Ethan returns to town with a new wife, intending to take the children away from Dr. Quinn.
programme.sub-title: Cooper Vs Quinn, Medicine Woman, Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Colleen and Brian run away to keep their father from taking them away from Dr. Mike and Sully. After they are found, it's discovered Colleen has developed pneumonia. Dr. Mike realizes she has to let them go to save them.
programme.sub-title: Cooper Vs Quinn, Medicine Woman, Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The town puts on a production of Romeo and Juliet. Brian tries to learn what love is so he can write a paper for school.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike convinces Robert E to take a job fixing a train boiler, then finds out it is a dangerous job.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A teenage Belle Star robs the saloon with the Younger brothers and is shot. Dr. Mike takes her home in an effort to show her a real home life, attempting to turn her from her life of crime.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: An abrasive Dr. John Porter arrives in town after hearing of the discovery of dinosaur bones.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Etter å ha kommet seg i sikkerhet, blir en lammet King Galen innlagt på sykehus. Joel utgir seg for å være lege for å få innpass i herskapshuset. Galen gir Alexis et stort løfte fra sykehussengen.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo får panikk når hun tror Blake vil oppdage at Krystle er fanget. Claudia og Adam pønsker ut hvordan de skal få oljebrønnen hennes tilbake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Rita frykter å bli avslørt når Blake bestiller henne time hos legen sin. Galen fortsetter å pønske ut hvordan han skal få tilbake tronen. Michael bestemmer seg for at han og Amanda skal få barn.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Joel forteller Rita at hun må ligge med Blake. Joel og den virkelige Krystle sees sammen på en veikro. Galen sender Michael til New York for å få hjelp.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Når Blake truer med skilsmisse, tar Rita drastiske grep. Galen skjuler at han er bedre og planlegger hvordan han skal ta tilbake tronen. Jonathan takker ja til en stilling hos Bart Fallmont.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake får den dødelige giftdosen. Sammy Jo oppdager en mistenkelig medisinflaske. Krystle prøver å flykte to ganger. En slåsskamp bryter ut over rørledningen. Dex kjemper for byggerettigheter.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Galen pønsker ut sitt comeback. Alexis' søster dukker plutselig opp. Joel og Rita planlegger sitt siste trekk. Blakes liv er i fare.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo får panikk da hun tror Blake vil oppdage at Krystle er fanget. Claudia og Adam vil ha oljebrønnen hennes tilbake. Galen lover å gjøre Alexis til en mektig kvinne, mens han prøver å ta tilbake tronen.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle utgir seg for å være Rita og rømmer. Joel og Rita kjører utfor et stup. Alexis planlegger å ødelegge alt for Krystle. Dex konfronterer Galen.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: En sladderreporter får Krystle til å bryte sammen. Fallon vender hjem og skjuler en foruroligende hemmelighet. Amanda bestemmer seg for å skille seg fra Michael. Dex og Amanda tilbringer natten sammen.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis finner Amanda og Dex sammen i sengen. Krystle får overtaket på Alexis. Adam graver i Bart Fallmonts fortid.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake trapper opp jakten på Rita og Joel. Alexis driver Dex og Amanda i armene på hverandre igjen, mens Blake prøver å skille dem. Adam truer med å avsløre Barts hemmelighet. Caress besøker Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle og Alexis "gjørmebryter" over Blake. Bart avslører sine følelser for Steven, mens en privatetterforsker avdekker Barts tidligere kjærlighetsforhold. Garretts mistanker om hvem som er Jackies far vokser.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis tar Ben Carrington med på maskeradeballet. Adams plan om å utpresse Bart Fallmont settes i verk. Garrett konfronterer Dominique med mistanken om at Jackie er datteren hans.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Barts hemmelige fortid er en triumf for Denver-Carrington, men Blake står overfor et mulig nederlag i rettssaken mot broren, Ben. Dex avviser Amanda.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jackie oppdager at faren hennes står oppført som «ukjent» på fødselsattesten. Alexis kjøper selskapet som planlegger å publisere Caress' bok.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blakes håp om seier knuses av et beruset vitne. Bart blir vraket som senatorkandidat. Kvinnen som kan renvaske Blakes navn er tvunget til å skjule sin identitet.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake taper rettssaken og frykter at han skal miste Denver-Carrington. Ben og Alexis setter seg opp mot Blake og Caress. Garrett finner ut at han er Jackies far.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Vi besöker Gardasjön i Italien och får en fantastisk cykeltur.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är Rickard Olsson i Berlin tillsammans med Scandorama och deras gruppresa. Tillsammans med gruppen åker han på dagsutflykter till historiska platser men får även uppleva det nya Berlins mest populära och trendiga områden.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här ger Rickard Olsson tips om saker du inte får missa när du er på Åland.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är det dags för Rickard Olsson att ta sig till Normandie för att besöka de historiska platserna från Andra Världskriget.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här åker Rickard Olsson ned med Springtime Travel för att testa på en av deras träningssresor.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Här besöker Rickard Olsson, Almunécar. Han tar sig ut på kulturhistoriska platser såväl som världsberömda vingårdar eller träningsresor över hela världen. Missa inte den enda unika och skräddarsydda reseprogrammet för dig som är 55-plus.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången är det dags för att ta sig ned till Schweiz för att prova på att åka med den berömda Glaciärexpressen.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard tar sig ned till Polen för en rundresa till Krakow och Warzawa

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard tar sig med på en Whiskeyresa och tågresa till Skottland

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Rickard reser till storstaden London för att se vad den har att erbjuda. Följ med honom när han utforskar julmarknader, åker skridskor och besöker världsberömda platser.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Följ med Rickard på en resa till Rostock för den perfekta julekänslan.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Følg med oss på resa til Afrika.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Denna gången befinner vi oss i Kroatien tillsammans med More Sailing som arrangerar seglingsresor över hela världen.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Programmet leds av en av Sveriges allra mest rutinerade teveprofiler, Rickard Olsson. Han tar sig till platser, städer och områden som han är nyfiken på. Missa inte den enda unika och skräddarsydda reseprogrammet för dig som är 55-plus.

programme.title: Nyfiken På
programme.desc: Det är dags för ett nytt avsnitt av reseprogrammet "Nyfiken På" med Rickard Olsson på afterworktv.se Denna gången åker vi till Italien för att följa med Rolf Flyg och Buss på en vinresa

programme.desc: Inter, en av verdens mest berømte fotballklubber, åpner arkivet sitt for en helt ny kanal med ikoniske Nerazzurri-legender og historiske sportsøyeblikk. Fra klubbens storhetstid til de siste triumfene, som førte til den «andre gylne stjernen».

programme.desc: News reports of Lt. Enrique Vilas escape from El Salvador are accompanied by offers of a $100,000 reward for his capture.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: After a dispute over a repair bill, a young motorcycle mechanic is murdered in cold blood by a maniacal cutthroat.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno's vacation in Las Vegas is derailed when Bobby enlists him to track down a bail jumper.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: For Reno Raines, taking refuge in a small-town saloon becomes hazerdous.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: When Reno witnesses the cold-blooded murder of one of his trusted street pals, Reno himself becomes the victim of a brutal beating at the hands of the killers.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: At the moment before Reno apprehends a murderer, a helmeted motorcycle rider breaks up the party with a pistol.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: The pipe-bomb murder of Reno's ex-partner Jack Varnell sends Reno and Bobby south of the border in search of the cop-killer.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno's latest job gets personal - the bounty is on the head of Earl Lyons, an ex-Army Ranger from Reno's unit.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E4 - Throne For A Loss
programme.desc: Rygel is captured and held for ransom by some bounty hunters.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E4 - Throne For A Loss

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E5 - PK Tech Girl
programme.desc: After finding the legendary Peacekeeper battleship, Zelbinion, dead in space Crichton, Aeryn, and D'Argo find a Peacekeeper tech under Crais's command.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E5 - PK Tech Girl

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E6 - Thank God It's Friday, Again
programme.desc: The crew visits a planet full of happy workers. Soon D'Argo and Zhaan start working and refuse to return to the ship.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E6 - Thank God It's Friday, Again

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E7 - I, E.T.
programme.desc: A peacekeeper beacon goes off and Moya has to land on an alien planet to prevent its signal being intercepted and Moya being discovered.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E8 - That Old Black Magic
programme.desc: Crichton's spirit is captured by Maldis. The sorcerer thrives on vengeance and hate, he brings Crais's spirit down. And the two spirits battle.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E8 - That Old Black Magic

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E9 - DNA Mad Scientist
programme.desc: A scientist extracts DNA from several of Moya's crew, promising them that he would be able to use it to find the location of their home planets.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E9 - DNA Mad Scientist

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E10 - They've Got A Secret
programme.desc: During routine searches for Peacekeeper beacons, D'Argo falls down a chute, destroys a Peacekeeper shield and gets ejected into open space.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E10 - They've Got A Secret

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E11 - 'Til The Blood Runs Clear
programme.desc: While flying Crichton's ship near a sun with high flare activity, John and Aeryn narrowly avoid getting sucked into an unstable wormhole.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E11 - 'Til The Blood Runs Clear

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E12 - The Flax
programme.desc: Aeryn takes Crichton out in a transport pod for flying lessons but unfortunately they get stuck in the Flax, a space trap.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E13 - Rhapsody In Blue
programme.desc: The crew finds a colony of Delvians. Z'han goes down to be with her own people for a while, but one of them wants something from Z'han.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E13 - Rhapsody In Blue

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E14 - Jeremiah Crichton
programme.desc: Crichton is left behind in Farscape One when Moya suddenly starbursts as a result of her pregnancy.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E15 - Durka Returns
programme.desc: When a Starburst goes badly wrong, Moya collides with a Nebari ship.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E16 - A Human Reaction
programme.desc: When Moya travels to an unstable wormhole that appears to lead to Earth, Crichton leaves on Farscape One in the hopes of returning home.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E16 - A Human Reaction

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E17 - Through The Looking Glass
programme.desc: Moya tries to starburst to prove to the crew that she still can. It goes slightly wrong though and she gets stuck in starburst.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E17 - Through The Looking Glass

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E18 - A Bug's Life
programme.desc: A peacekeeper ship is approaching Moya, so Crichton and Aeryn pose as peacekeeper officers on a secret mission.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E18 - A Bug's Life

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E19 - Nerve
programme.desc: Aeryn has been critically wounded. She needs some tissue samples to heal. The only source is the Secret base the Peacekeeper mentioned.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E20 - The Hidden Memory
programme.desc: Scorpius attempts to extract the wormhole technology from Crichton's mind, while Aeryn mounts a rescue operation.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S1 E20 - The Hidden Memory

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: A computer virus attacks a large software company owned by a suspected member of The Marked. Maia visits Promise City and receives an unexpected birthday gift.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Isabelle works with Tom in order to get close to Jordan. Shawn recruits a small band of promicin positives to break Kevin out of Promise City. Tom and Diana face off in the backroom of a grocery store, and Diana is forced to shoot Tom.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Danny Farrell's newfound ability to spread promicin leads to several hundred deaths, including his mother. With Seattle in chaos, NTAC is forced to accept Promise City's offer of help.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: A comet is due to pass by Earth, but its trajectory changes to a collision course, causing widespread panic. When the comet appears to slow down - as if it's coming in for a landing - 4,400 people are deposited in an explosion over Highland Beach.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: The 4400 returnees have been missing from months to years. None have any memory of where they've been, none have aged, and a small number are beginning to manifest paranormal abilities. Tom Baldwin and Diana Skouris are appointed to investigate.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Carl Morrissey is a lowly supermarket employee who happens to be one of the 4400. He uses his new found powers - enhanced reflexes and strength - to become a vigilante and fight crime in his neighborhood.
programme.sub-title: The New and Improved Carl Morrissey

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Tom and Diana are sent out to investigate a homicide that resembles the MO of a serial killer who was never caught nor heard of for 21 years. The first suspect is Oliver Knox, a member of the 4400.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: The 4400 are attacked by a series of bombings after Barbara Yates makes their names and addresses known to the public. Tom, Diana and Dennis try to put an end to the bombings, while at the same time Tom is coping with Kyle's erratic behaviour.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Tom is furious after finding out that Lytell has taken his son Kyle into custody. Diana offers to help him in getting Kyle back. Meanwhile, Richard suspects that Collier is trying to take control of Lily's life.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: It's been one year since the 4400 returned. After a period of intense medical observation, Tom has returned to NTAC in a limited capacity, assigned only to desk duty. Diana finally finds a way to cut through the red tape and get Tom back.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: It's been one year since the 4400 returned. After a period of intense medical observation, Tom has returned to NTAC in a limited capacity, assigned only to desk duty. Diana finally finds a way to cut through the red tape and get Tom back.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Gary Navarro, a minor league baseball player, finds that he is hearing everyone's unspoken thoughts. His new found ability quickly drives him to the edge of madness.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Tom and Diana investigate Trent Appelbaum, a 4400 whose saliva causes rapid acceleration of a person's metabolism.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: A school teacher terrifies parents with her ability to inspire talents within students. Meanwhile, Richard and Lily are confronted by police, and Jordan warns Shawn not to overuse his healing gift.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Maia sees a vision of Jordan Collier's death. Kyle's frightening blackouts are disrupting Tom's personal life. Diana is asked to hand over Maia's diary to NTAC.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: When Tom arrives at NTAC, he learns that no one has ever heard of the 4400. Tom and Diana track down a man to a museum, and during the chase, Tom finds a mysterious lab that only he can see.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Tom and Diana investigate a 4400 who has released a plague that has wiped out an entire town's population. Meanwhile, a Washington D.C. lobbyist joins the 4400 Center in order to add some political muscle to the movement.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: Tom and Diana investigate Edwin Mayuya, a 4400 who has the ability is to heal damaged fetal chromosomes while in utero. Unfortunately, it turns out this man is responsible for the slaughter of an entire clinic.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: NTAC follows a series of clues that lead them to Jordan Collier's killer. Tom faces a difficult choice when he must choose between the law or his family.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: A 4400 launches a terrorist attack against NTAC that causes the males to revert to their primal instincts.

programme.title: The Millers: Plus One
programme.desc: Nathan's excitement at scoring a ticket for himself and a guest to a dinner with President Obama turns to dread when he has to pick one of his family members to be his "plus one."

programme.title: The Millers: Walk-n-Wave
programme.desc: Worried that his mother has made him feel like he's better than other people, Nathan befriends a hopeless co-worker, Doug, who turns out to be a social outcast and more than Nathan knows how to handle.

programme.title: The Millers: Cancellation Fee
programme.desc: Nathan tries to date his mother's dentist in secret after Carol adds her to the Miller Family Blacklist for charging her a $75 cancellation fee for being late to her appointment.

programme.title: The Millers: 72
programme.desc: When Tom proudly tells the family he's dating a much younger woman, Nathan goes undercover to spy on him and make sure his father isn't being scammed by a gold digger.

programme.title: The Millers: Sex Ed Dolan
programme.desc: Nathan introduces his boss, Ed Dolan, to Tom in hopes they'll hit it off and hang out together, but surprisingly, Dolan only has eyes for Carol. Jeffrey Tambor guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Mother's Day
programme.desc: Carol has the worst Mother's Day ever when Nathan forgets to get her a present.

programme.title: The Millers: Movin' Out (Carol's Song)
programme.desc: Carol begins her search for a new apartment, causing Nathan and Debbie to race each other to find her a place that is the farthest away from each of them.

programme.title: The Millers: CON-Troversy
programme.desc: Nathan is assigned to cover a Sci-Fi Fest for his workplace and runs into a famous book author who has hated him since grade school.

programme.title: The Millers: Reunited and It Feels So Bad
programme.desc: Tom and Carol decide to formally end their marriage but are surprised when they both hesitate to finalize the divorce, sending Nathan and Debbie into a panic at the thought of their parents reconciling.
programme.sub-title: Reunited and It Feels So Bad

programme.title: The Millers: Give Metta World Peace a Chance
programme.desc: Nathan lands the biggest interview of his career with professional basketball player Metta World Peace, but when karma catches up with him, he risks ruining his professional reputation.
programme.sub-title: Give Metta World Peace a Chance

programme.title: The Millers: Diggin' Up Bones
programme.desc: In an attempt to get Carol to be more daring, Kip encourages her to confront her old Central Elementary School work nemesis, Miss Pam (Molly Shannon), at the teacher's retirement party.

programme.title: The Millers: You Are the Wind Beneath My Wings, Man
programme.desc: When Ray points out that Nathan has a history of being the worst wingman ever, Nathan embarks on a mission to be a better friend by becoming less self-involved.
programme.sub-title: You Are the Wind Beneath My Wings, Man

programme.title: The Millers: When The Pope Comes Marching In
programme.desc: When the Pope is scheduled to come to town, Nathan's planned week-long series of reports hits a snag when Ray gets a job offer to become the cameraman for a rival field reporter.
programme.sub-title: When The Pope Comes Marching In

programme.title: The Millers: Papa Was a Rolling Bone
programme.desc: The Millers decide to spend Thanksgiving apart for the first time ever, but they rethink the new family tradition when all their individual Turkey Day plans hit unexpected snags.

programme.title: The Millers: Louise Louise
programme.desc: When The Millers get a visit from their elderly Aunt Louise (Cloris Leachman), they rally to help her figure out what her legacy will be when she worries that she hasn't left her mark on the world yet.

programme.title: The Millers: Highway to the Manger Zone
programme.desc: When staging their church's annual living nativity scene does not go as planned, Kip urges the Millers to stage their own rival show.

programme.title: The Millers: Hero
programme.desc: When Nathan decides he should have a better relationship with his niece Mikayla, he agrees to use his celebrity status to help Debbie and Adam get her into a popular school.

programme.title: The Millers: Pilot
programme.desc: Nathan and his sister, Debbie, are upset when their parents announce they're divorcing after 43 years of marriage.

programme.title: The Millers: Stuff
programme.desc: Nathan hatches a plan to get his parents back together by showing them all of their sentimental family possessions in the hopes it will make them remember the good times they've had.

programme.title: The Millers: The Phone Upgrade
programme.desc: Nathan and Debbie trade parents when they each think the other sibling has it easier.

programme.title: The Millers: Plot Twists
programme.desc: When Carol dictates that it's time to rearrange the family's positions in the Millers cemetery plot because of the two divorces.

programme.title: The Millers: The Mother Is In
programme.desc: When Carol finds out that Nathan is seeing a therapist, she secretly makes an appointment for herself in order to find out what's going on.

programme.title: The Millers: Giving The Bird
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and Nathan, Debbie, and Adam take Mikayla trick-or-treating to the house of an old woman who everyone in the neighborhood thinks is a witch.

programme.title: The Millers: Driving Miss Crazy
programme.desc: When Nathan gets frustrated after he's forced to drive Carol around town for errands once again, he demands that she either learn how to drive or find another chauffeur.

programme.title: The Millers: Internet Dating
programme.desc: When Nathan helps Carol set up her profile on an Internet dating site, he and Ray get so excited about one of her potential suitors, they start corresponding with him, pretending to be Carol.

programme.title: The Millers: You're In Trouble
programme.desc: When Nathan learns why Debbie is Tom's favorite child instead of him, he decides it's time to fill his parents in on some of Debbie's childhood secrets.

programme.title: The Millers: The Talk
programme.desc: When Carol finds out that Tom never had "the talk" with Nathan about the birds and the bees, she insists it's not too late to gather the family together and do it now.

programme.title: The Millers: Carol's Parents Are Coming to Town
programme.desc: When Carol's overbearing mother and father announce they're coming to visit for Christmas, Carol recruits Nate and Tom to cover up their failed relationships and present a happy facade.
programme.sub-title: Carol's Parents Are Coming to Town

programme.title: The Millers: Dear Diary
programme.desc: When Debbie suspects Nathan and Carol of secretly reading her diary, she and Adam plant a fake entry about Tom in order to prove it. Ernie Hudson guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Miller's Mind
programme.desc: Nathan learns to appreciate Carol's incessant rants after he mimics one of them at work and is rewarded with his own news segment to complain on the air.

programme.title: The Millers: Carol's Surprise
programme.desc: Nathan is determined to finally, just once, surprise the "unsurpriseable" Carol on her birthday. Brandon Routh guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: You Betcha
programme.desc: Nathan asks Tom to spend the weekend with him in the hopes of finding something they have in common.

programme.title: The Millers: Bahama Mama
programme.desc: Just as Nathan begins to unwind on his vacation in the Bahamas, Carol's surprise appearance gets him riled up all over again until they meet Ganja Pete.

programme.title: The Millers: Tomlandia
programme.desc: When Nathan pitches a children's show to his boss, Ed Dolan, based on Tom's imaginary comic book, Tom has an adverse reaction to the tweaks made to his cherished world. Jeffrey Tambor guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Plus One
programme.desc: Nathan's excitement at scoring a ticket for himself and a guest to a dinner with President Obama turns to dread when he has to pick one of his family members to be his "plus one."

programme.title: The Millers: Walk-n-Wave
programme.desc: Worried that his mother has made him feel like he's better than other people, Nathan befriends a hopeless co-worker, Doug, who turns out to be a social outcast and more than Nathan knows how to handle.

programme.title: The Millers: Cancellation Fee
programme.desc: Nathan tries to date his mother's dentist in secret after Carol adds her to the Miller Family Blacklist for charging her a $75 cancellation fee for being late to her appointment.
